core: 【短语】as well (也；同样地；还不如), as well as (也；和…一样；不但…而且), as one (一致的)

zh: adj. 静止的，固定的；n. 静电干扰
en: adj. not moving, changing, or developing；n. noise caused by electricity in the air that blocks or spoils the sound from radio or TV
core: 【记忆】stat(坐) + ic → 坐着的 → 静止的 | 【短语】static electricity (n. 静电；静位觉), static state (静态状态), static pressure (静压)
ex: Economists predict that house prices will remain static for a long period.
exz: 经济学家预测，房价将长期保持稳定。

en: adj. not necessary because something else means or does the same thing
core: 【记忆】red(=re一再) + und(波动) + ant(形容词后缀)→ 反复波动， 反复出现 → 多余的， 过剩的； 累赘的 | 【短语】redundant information (冗余信息), redundant system ([计]冗余系统), redundant code (冗余码)
ex: the removal of redundant information
exz: 多余信息的删除

zh: auxiliary verb. at；auxiliary verb. odds；auxiliary verb. with；sb与. 有争执
en: auxiliary verb. used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs；auxiliary verb. used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs；auxiliary verb. used with a present participle to form the  continuous 4  tenses of verbs
core: 【短语】so be it (诚心所愿；顺其自然), let be (听任；不干涉，不打扰)
ex: Don’t disturb me while I’m working.
exz: 我工作的时候不要打扰我。

zh: n&a. 社会精华(的)，高贵者(的)
en: n&a. You can refer to the most powerful, rich, or talented people within a particular group, place, or society as the elite
core: 【记忆】e + lite(看作词根 lig， 选择) → 选出来的都是精英 → 精英 | 【短语】elite education (精英教育，英才教育)
ex: ...a government comprised mainly of the elite.
exz: …主要由精英组成的政府。

zh: adj. 经济的；经济学的，便宜的
en: adj. relating to trade, in-dustry, and the management of money
core: 【短语】economic development (经济发展；经济开发), economic growth ([经]经济增长，经济成长), economic system (经济体制；经济体系，经济系统；经济制度)
ex: Economic growth is slow.
exz: 经济增长缓慢。

en: n. someone whose job is to look after a school or other large building
ex: Ed Roberts had been a school janitor for a long time.
exz: 埃德·罗伯茨做学校的看门人已很久了。

en: n. a piece of equipment that measures the temperature of the air, of your body etc
core: 【短语】infrared thermometer (红外测温仪；红外线温度计), digital thermometer (数字（式）温度计), clinical thermometer (体温计，体温表)
ex: The thermometer registered over 100˚C.
exz: 温度计显示高于100摄氏度。

en: v. to tell the public about a product or service in order to persuade them to buy it
core: 【短语】advertise for (登广告征求（寻找）某物；登招请（待聘等）广告)
ex: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events.
exz: 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

en: v. to begin or to start something
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + men(引导) + ce → 共同引导 → 开始， 着手 | 【短语】commence business (开始营业)
ex: Work will commence on the new building immediately.
exz: 新大楼即将破土动工。

zh: n. 方案，计划；v. 设计；投影；抛
en: n. a carefully planned piece of work to get information about something, to build something, to improve something etc；v. If you project a film or picture onto a screen or wall, you make it appear there
core: 【记忆】pro(向前) + ject(投， 掷) → 向前掷 → (使)突出， (使)伸出 | 【短语】project oneself (表现自己；突出自己), project management (项目管理；专案管理), construction project (建筑计划，建设项目；基建计划)
ex: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
exz: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

en: n&v. the sale of goods in shops to customers, for their own use and not for selling to anyone else
core: 【记忆】re + tail(切割) → 切割成小块卖 → 零售 | 【短语】retail business (零售业务；小生意), retail price (零售价), retail trade (零售业)
ex: a retail price of £8.99
exz: 8.99英镑的零售价

zh: n. 后部，后面；vt&vi. 培植，饲养
en: n. the back part of an object, vehicle, or building, or a position at the back of an object or area；vt&vi. to look after a person or animal until they are fully grown
core: 【短语】front and rear (在前后), rear axle (后桥；后轴), rear wheel (后轮；后车轮)
ex: He settled back in the rear of the taxi.
exz: 他在出租车后座，往后靠着坐好了。

zh: adj. 生命的；必需的；极期重要的
en: adj. extremely important and necessary for something to succeed or exist
core: 【记忆】vit(生命) + al → 事关生命的 → 生死攸关的 | 【短语】vital part (要害部位), vital energy (生命力), vital force (n. 生机；生命力)
ex: The work she does is absolutely vital.
exz: 她所做的工作至关重要。

en: n. an important job that involves travelling somewhere, done by a member of the air force, army etc, or by a spacecraft
core: 【记忆】电影《碟中谍》Mission Impossible， 可直译为《不可能完成的任务》 | 【短语】mission statement (宗旨), space mission (太空任务；航天任务), mission impossible (不可能的任务，棘手的任务)
ex: He was sent on over 200 missions before being killed in action.
exz: 在阵亡之前他奉命执行过200多次军事任务。

en: v. if something paralyses you, it makes you lose the ability to move part or all of your body, or to feel it
ex: Her legs were partly paralysed in the crash.
exz: 在撞车事故中她的双腿部分瘫痪。

en: adj. very large, solid, and heavy
core: 【短语】massive retaliation (大规模报复)
ex: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
exz: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

en: n. a large mass of ice which moves slowly down a mountain valley
core: 【记忆】glac(冰) + ier → 冰川， 冰河 | 【短语】glacier national park (冰河国家公园；国家冰川公园（美国）)
ex: The glacier calved a large iceberg.
exz: 冰川崩解而产生一个大冰山。

en: n. a substance which is produced when a substance is combined with oxygen
core: 【记忆】ox(=oxy氧) + ide → 氧化物 | 【短语】zinc oxide (n. 氧化锌), nitric oxide (氧化一氮), iron oxide (氧化铁)
ex: iron oxide
exz: 氧化铁

zh: v. 发生；想起，想到；存在
en: v. to happen
core: 【记忆】oc(向) + cur(跑) → 跑向 → 发生 | 【短语】occur as (以...的形式出现), occur for (发生在…时候)
ex: A third of accidental deaths occur in the home.
exz: 有三分之一的意外死亡发生在家里。

zh: v. 传送，运送；带有；支持；赞同
en: v. to take people or things from one place to another in a vehicle, ship, or plane
core: 【短语】carry out (vt. 执行，实行；贯彻；实现；完成), carry on (继续), carry forward (发扬；推进)
ex: The ship was carrying drugs.
exz: 这艘船上载有毒品。

zh: n. 借出物，贷款；借出；v. 借
core: 【记忆】“漏” → 账本有漏洞， 因为把钱借出去了 → 贷款， 借 | 【短语】on loan (借用；借贷；借调), bank loan (银行贷款), mortgage loan (按揭贷款；抵押借款)

en: v. to not notice something, or not see how important it is
ex: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.
exz: 那样的小细节很容易被忽略。

en: n. a long tube with mirrors fitted in it, used to look over the top of something, especially to see out of a  submarine
ex: Submarines are most vulnerable to detection when the submarine commander uses a periscope to assess the situation on the surface.
exz: 当潜艇指挥官使用潜望镜对海面态势进行评估的时候最容易被探测到也最容易被攻击。

en: adj. having the usual features or qualities of a particular group or thing
core: 【记忆】typ(e)(典型) + ical → 典型的 | 【短语】typical of (是……的典型特征), typical form (典型式，代表式), typical project (样板工程)
ex: typical British weather
exz: 典型的英国天气

en: adj. before other people or things
core: 【短语】give priority to (优先考虑；认为优先), top priority (最优先的), first priority (最优先；绝对优先权)
ex: Members receive priority bookings and reduced ticket prices to all concerts.
exz: 会员可优先预订所有音乐会的门票，并享受优惠票价。

en: vt&vi. to make cloth, a carpet, a basket etc by crossing threads or thin pieces under and over each other by hand or on a loom
core: 【短语】plain weave (平纹梭织，平纹布；平布), twill weave (斜纹组织；斜纹织；斜织法), satin weave (缎织；缎纹组织)
ex: hand-woven scarves
exz: 手织围巾

zh: adj. 公开的，明显的，公然的
en: adj. overt actions are done publicly, without trying to hide anything
ex: an overt attempt to silence their political opponents
exz: 他们想压制政敌言论的明显企图

zh: n&vi. 胁，侧翼，包抄的侧翼
en: n&vi. the side of an animal’s or person’s body, between the  ribs  and the  hip
core: 【短语】tooth flank (齿腹), flank wear (侧面磨损)
ex: We were attacked on our left flank.
exz: 我们的左翼受到攻击。

en: v. to successfully control a feeling or problem that prevents you from achieving something
core: 【记忆】来自词组come over(战胜； 支配) | 【短语】overcome difficulties (克服困难；战胜困难)
ex: He struggled to overcome his shyness.
exz: 他努力克服自己的羞怯。

en: v. to change, or to make someone or something change
core: 【记忆】本身为词根， 意为“改变状态” | 【短语】alter ego (n. 密友；个性的另一面；至交)
ex: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
exz: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

zh: n. 间隔的时间，间隔；间歇
en: n. the period of time between two events, activities etc
core: 【记忆】inter(在…之间) + val → 处在两者之间的 → 间距； 间隔 | 【短语】time interval (时间间隔), at intervals (时时，不时；相隔一定距离（或时间）), confidence interval (置信区间，可靠区间)
ex: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.
exz: 他离开房间，过了一会儿就带回来一条消息。

en: adj. A sheer cliff or drop is extremely steep or completely vertical
core: 【记忆】she(她) + er(表人) → 她是个十足的女人 → 十足的 | 【短语】sheer nonsense (一派胡言)
ex: There was a sheer drop just outside my window.
exz: 就在我的窗外有一个陡坡。

zh: adj. 细长的，轻微的；v. 轻视，怠慢
en: adj. small in degree；v. to offend someone by treating them rudely or without respect
core: 【记忆】s + light(轻的) → 轻微的 | 【短语】slight fever (微热，低烧), slight pain (轻微疼痛), slight illness (小病；不适；头疼脑热)
ex: a slight improvement
exz: 些许的改进

en: v. to make or produce something that is not real but has the appearance or feeling of being real
core: 【记忆】simul(相同) + ate(使…) → 使相同 → 模仿
ex: a machine that simulates conditions in space
exz: 一台模拟太空环境的机器

en: n. the quality of being suitable or useful for a particular purpose, especially by making something easier or saving you time
core: 【记忆】con(共同) + ven(来) + ience → 共同行动来维护便民设施 → 便利设施 | 【短语】for the convenience of (为了…的方便), convenience store (便利商店), for convenience (为了方便起见)
ex: Ready meals sell well because of their convenience.
exz: 即食餐因为方便销路好。

zh: adj. 电子的，用电子操纵的
en: adj. electronic equipment, such as computers and televisions, uses electricity that has passed through computer chips, transistors etc
core: 【记忆】来自electric(a. 电的) | 【短语】electronic commerce (电子商务), electronic equipment (电子设备), electronic control (电子控制)
ex: electronic games
exz: 电子游戏

zh: adj. 言语的，字句的；口头的
en: adj. spoken rather than written
core: 【记忆】verb(言语) + al(形容词后缀) → 口头的； 言辞的， 文字的 | 【短语】verbal communication (语言通信), verbal ability (n. 言语能力；语言能力), verbal abuse (言语虐待；口头谩骂；说粗话，用污言秽语)
ex: verbal skills
exz: 语言技能

en: n&v. a white or grey substance that grows on walls or other surfaces in wet, slightly warm conditions
core: 【短语】powdery mildew (白粉病；白粉菌), downy mildew (霜霉病；霜霉菌；大豆霜霉病；露菌病)
ex: The room smelled of mildew.
exz: 该房间有股霉味。

zh: n. 性情，气质；布置；配置
en: n. a particular type of character which makes someone likely to behave or react in a certain way
core: 【短语】disposition plan (配置平面图), disposition effect (处置效应；处分效果)
ex: the disposition of assets on death
exz: 身后财产的处置

zh: n. 令人惊奇的事；创造奇迹
en: n. You can describe something or someone as a marvel to indicate that you think that they are wonderful
core: 【短语】marvel at (v. 对…惊奇)
ex: The whale, like the dolphin, has become a symbol of the marvels of creation.
exz: 鲸，和海豚一样，已经成为造物杰作的象征。

zh: n. 运货，货物；v. 运输
en: n. goods that are carried by ship, train, or aircraft, and the system of moving these goods；v. to send goods by air, sea, or train
core: 【短语】freight forwarding (货运代理；货物发运；运费由提货方支付), air freight (航空运费；空运的货物), freight transport (货物运输)
ex: freight services
exz: 货运公司

en: v. to laugh at someone and make jokes in order to have fun by embarrassing them, either in a friendly way or in an unkind way
core: 【记忆】tea(茶) + se → 以茶代酒， 戏弄别人 → 揶揄， 戏弄
ex: Don’t get upset. I was only teasing .
exz: 别生气，我只是在逗你玩。

zh: adj. 间歇的，断断续续的
en: adj. stopping and starting often and for short periods
core: 【短语】intermittent operation (间歇式操作，间歇运行), intermittent claudication ([医]间歇性跛行), intermittent production (间歇生产)
ex: The weather forecast is for sun, with intermittent showers.
exz: 天气预报为晴，有阵雨。

zh: adj. 驯服了的；(人)顺从的，听话的
en: adj. used to describe a person who is willing to do what other people ask, even if it is slightly dishonest
ex: If you have a tame doctor, he might give you a sick note.
exz: 要是你的医生好说话，他可能会给你开个病假条。

core: 【短语】sluggish economy (萧条的经济), sluggish market (呆滞的市面)
ex: Alex woke late, feeling tired and sluggish.
exz: 亚历克斯醒得很晚，感到很倦怠。

en: v. to do or provide what is necessary or needed
core: 【记忆】ful(看作full， 充满的) + fil(l)(装满) → 做得圆满， 把梦想实现 → 实现
ex: There is little doubt that the scheme fulfils a need for our community.
exz: 毫无疑问，这计划会满足我们社区的需求。

en: n. an instrument that shows directions and has a needle that always points north
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + pass(通过) → 双边共同通过的地方 → 界限， 范围 | 【短语】within the compass of (在…的范围内), magnetic compass (磁罗盘，磁罗经), compass needle (罗盘针，罗针；罗经磁针)
ex: a map and compass
exz: 地图和指南针

core: 【短语】paternity test (亲权认定；父权检验；试验), paternity leave (陪产假)
ex: The paternity of the child is in dispute.
exz: 这个孩子的生父是谁尚有疑问。

en: adj. violent, dangerous, and frightening
ex: a ferocious, hungry lion
exz: 一头凶猛的饿狮

zh: adj. 强烈的，剧烈的，热情的
en: adj. having a very strong effect or felt very strongly
core: 【记忆】in(在…之中) + tense(紧张) → 处于紧张之中 → 紧张的 | 【短语】intense competition (激烈的竞争), intense emotion (激情), intense pain (剧烈疼痛；剧痛)
ex: Young people today are under intense pressure to succeed.
exz: 如今的年轻人面临要出人头地的巨大压力。

en: n. the amount of water contained in the air
core: 【记忆】humid(潮湿的) + ity → 湿度； 潮湿 | 【短语】temperature and humidity (温度与湿度), relative humidity (相对湿度), high humidity (高湿度；湿度大；最高湿度)
ex: The room is kept at 72 degrees and 50% relative humidity.
exz: 房间的温度保持在72度，相对湿度50%。

zh: adj. 复杂的；详尽的；v. 做详细说明
en: adj. having a lot of small parts or details put together in a complicated way；v. to give more details or new information about something
core: 【记忆】e(出) + labor(劳动) + ate → 辛苦劳动做出来的 → 精心制作的 | 【短语】elaborate on (详细说明)
ex: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
exz: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

zh: adj. 含蓄的，潜在的；在下面的
en: adj. The underlying features of an object, event, or situation are not obvious, and it may be difficult to discover or reveal them
core: 【记忆】under(在…下) + lying(躺着的) → 在下面躺着的 → 在下面的 | 【短语】underlying surface (下垫面，下伏面；伏面), underlying asset (标的资产；基础资产；相关/指定资产), underlying strata (底板岩石)
ex: To stop a problem you have to understand its underlying causes.
exz: 要解决问题，你得了解其潜在原因。

en: v. to give a college, hospital etc a large sum of money that provides it with an income
core: 【短语】endow with (赋予；具有)
ex: The ambassador has endowed a $1 million public-service fellowships programme.
exz: 大使资助了一个100万美元的公共服务奖学金项目。

zh: v. 占先，预先处理；预料
en: v. to expect that something will happen and be ready for it
core: 【记忆】anti(在…之前) + cip(拿， 取) + ate(动词后缀) → 在…之前取得 → 先于…行动
ex: Sales are better than anticipated.
exz: 销量比预期要好。

zh: a&ad. 离岸的(地)；近海的(地)
core: 【短语】offshore platform (海上平台；近海平台), offshore drilling (海底钻探), offshore engineering (近海工程；离岸工程)
ex: The building can accommodate all of the offshore workers and protect them from hurricane damage.
exz: 这个建筑能容纳所有的海上工人并且保护他们不受飓风的伤害。

en: n. harm or damage
core: 【短语】to the detriment of (对…不利)
ex: Work hard to succeed but not to the detriment of others.
exz: 在不损害他人利益的前提下为成功艰苦奋斗。

en: n. something that helps a feeling, idea, or belief to grow stronger
ex: His favorite fruits and vegetables as well as 55 lb. of bamboo will be on board for nourishment.
exz: 除了它最喜爱的水果和蔬菜以外还有55磅的竹子将会作为它在飞机上的食物。

zh: n&vt. 舔；(火焰)卷过；(波浪)轻拍
en: n&vt. to move your tongue across the surface of something in order to eat it, wet it, clean it etc
core: 【短语】lick up (v. 舔光；吞噬)
ex: The dog jumped up and licked her face.
exz: 那只狗跳起来舔她的脸。

en: n. an area of low flat ground that is always wet and soft
core: 【记忆】mars(火星) + h → 火星上可能会有沼泽 → 沼泽 | 【短语】marsh gas (甲烷，沼气), salt marsh (盐沼；盐碱滩)
ex: He led them away from a marsh.
exz: 他把他们带离沼泽。

en: v. if you perspire, parts of your body become wet, especially because you are hot or have been doing hard work
ex: Willie was perspiring heavily .
exz: 威利大汗淋漓。

zh: "n. 标准尺寸,(铁道)轨矩;雨量器；(电线)直径 "
en: "n. the width of the barrel of a gun

en: v. to burst, or to make something burst, into small pieces, usually with a loud noise and in a way that causes damage

en: adj. extremely interesting

ex: All living organisms have to adapt to changes in environmental conditions.

zh: adj. 空闲的；剩余的；n. 备用件

zh: n. 比率，比例；大小，容积

core: 【记忆】pro + portion(部分) → 比例； 部分 | 【短语】in proportion (成比例；相称), a large proportion of (一大部分), direct proportion (n. 正比；正比例)

zh: adj. (文学，图画)猥亵的，淫秽的

en: adj. very quiet and gentle and unwilling to argue with people

en: n. a small plant that is used to improve the taste of food, or to make medicine

zh: n. 分，备忘录；adj. 微小的，细致的
en: n. a unit for measuring time. There are 60 minutes in one hour；adj. extremely small
core: 【短语】every minute (n. 完全，彻底；时时刻刻), in a minute (马上；立即), at the last minute (到最后一刻)
ex: It takes me ten minutes to walk to work.

core: 【短语】open outcry (公开喊价)
ex: The closure of the local hospital has caused a huge public outcry.

en: n&v. an introduction at the beginning of a book or speech

en: n. a small electric lamp that you carry in your hand

en: n&a. someone whose behaviour is considered to be morally unacceptable

ex: Bright colours characterize his paintings.

zh: v. 阅兵整队；列队行进，游行；夸耀；炫示

en: v. to allow someone to do something

en: adj. strange, unexpected, or unsuitable in a particular situation

en: n&a. someone who is walking, especially along a street or other place used by cars

core: 【记忆】cap(帽子) + sule(音似： seal，“密封”) → 帽状物 → 胶囊； 密封舱 | 【短语】soft capsule (软胶囊剂), in a capsule ([口语]概括地说，简单扼要地讲), time capsule (时代文物密藏器)
ex: a space capsule orbiting the Earth
exz: 沿地球轨道飞行的太空舱

zh: adj. 紧急的，必要的，强制的，祈使语气
en: adj. extremely important and needing to be done or dealt with immediately
core: 【短语】imperative sentence (祈使句；命令句), imperative mood (祈使语气；命令语气；祈使式)
ex: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators.
exz: 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

en: n. a set of instructions for cooking a particular type of food
core: 【记忆】re + cip(拿， 取) + e → 抓住关键， 才是诀窍 → 秘诀， 秘方 | 【短语】secret recipe (秘方；秘密配方), recipe for disaster (造成灾难的因素), formulating of recipe (配方设计)
ex: a recipe book
exz: 一本烹饪书

zh: v. 漂流，流浪；n. 漂流，漂流物，趋势
en: v. to move slowly on water or in the air；n. a slow change or development from one situation, opinion etc to another
core: 【短语】temperature drift (温度漂移), genetic drift (遗传漂变，基因漂变), zero drift (零点漂移；最小容量；起点电容)
ex: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
exz: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

en: v&n. to make a low continuous sound
core: 【记忆】“哼” → 蚊子、 苍蝇的哼哼声
ex: Machines hummed on the factory floor.
exz: 机器在车间里嗡嗡作响。

en: adj. relating to a whole group of things rather than to one thing
core: 【记忆】gen(产生) + er + ic → 产生不同种属的 → 种的， 属的； 注意不要和genetic(a. 遗传的； 起源的)相混 | 【短语】generic term (通用术语；地理通名), generic type (类属型), generic name (属名；总名称；通用名称)
ex: Parmesan is a generic term used to describe a family of hard Italian cheeses.
exz: 巴尔马干酪是一个用来描述一类坚硬的意大利奶酪的通用名称。

en: n. when people vote in order to make a decision about a particular subject, rather than voting for a person
ex: The city council agreed to hold a referendum on the issue in November.
exz: 市政会同意在11月就此问题进行全民投票。

zh: n. 流体；adj. 流动的，不固定的
en: n. a liquid；adj. a situation that is fluid is likely to change
core: 【短语】drilling fluid (钻井液；钻孔液体；钻液；钻井泥浆), fluid flow (流体流动), supercritical fluid ([热力]超临界流体)
ex: He is not allowed solid food yet, only fluids.
exz: 他还不能吃固体食物，只能进流食。

en: adj. a painting, document, book etc that is authentic has been proved to be by a particular person
ex: an authentic work by Picasso
exz: 毕加索的真迹

en: n. land that is always very wet or covered with a layer of water
ex: I spent one whole night by a swamp behind the road listening to frogs.
exz: 我整个晚上都在这条路后面的一个沼泽地旁听蛙鸣。

en: n&v. to raise and then lower your shoulders in order to show that you do not know something or do not care about something
core: 【记忆】shru(像拼音shu舒) + g(音似： 胳) → 耸肩 | 【短语】shrug off (摆脱；抖去；不屑理睬；耸肩表示蔑视；扭身脱掉衣服)
ex: I just shrugged my shoulders and ignored him.
exz: 我只是耸耸肩，没有理睬他。

zh: n. 奔流，兴奋，激动；adj. 齐平的；富有的
en: n. a sudden feeling of anger, embarrassment etc；adj. if two surfaces are flush, they are at exactly the same level, so that the place where they meet is flat
core: 【记忆】在闪烁(flash)的镁光灯下， 她的脸通红(flush) | 【短语】flush with (由于…而脸红；因…而兴奋), flush out (冲掉，排出；驱赶出来), in the first flush (◎一时兴起)
ex: She felt a sudden flush of anger.
exz: 她突然感到一阵愤怒。

en: v. to send someone back to their own country
core: 【记忆】re(重新) + patr(父亲； 祖国) + iate → 重新送回祖国 → 把(某人)遣返回国； 归国
ex: After the war, prisoners were repatriated.
exz: 战后，战俘被遣返。

en: n. a piece of equipment fastened to the back of people who jump out of planes, which makes them fall slowly and safely to the ground
core: 【短语】golden parachute (金降落伞；黄金降落伞), parachute jump (跳伞)
ex: a parachute jump
exz: 跳伞

zh: n&vt. 水坝，筑坝，抑制，阻拦
en: n&vt. a special wall built across a river or stream to stop the water from flowing, especially in order to make a lake or produce electricity
core: 【短语】arch dam (拱坝，拱形坝), dam body (坝体；坝身), dam foundation (坝基)
ex: Once she allowed her anger to show, it could not be dammed up again.
exz: 她一旦发起脾气来就不可收拾。

en: n. a person who is responsible for a particular place and whose job is to make sure its rules are obeyed
core: 【短语】traffic warden (n. 交通管理员)

zh: n. 追赶；追求；从事，消遣
en: n. when someone tries to get, achieve, or find something in a determined way
core: 【记忆】钱包(purse)被小偷偷去， 赶忙追赶(pursuit) | 【短语】in pursuit of (寻求，追求), in hot pursuit (穷追不舍；紧随其后)
ex: The quarterback sprinted toward the end zone with Jansen in hot pursuit (= following closely behind ) .
exz: 那名四分卫快速冲向底线区，詹森穷追不舍。

en: v. to see someone doing something that they did not want you to know they were doing
core: 【短语】catch oneself (发觉自己讲错而突然住嘴), catch up (赶上；把…缠住), catch up with (赶上，追上；逮捕；处罚)
ex: He was caught red-handed (= as he was doing something wrong ) taking money from the cash register.
exz: 他从现金出纳机偷钱时被当场抓住。

zh: n. 小块土地；阴谋，情节；v. 绘制，标绘
en: n. the events that form the main story of a book, film, or play；v. to draw marks or a line to represent facts, numbers etc
core: 【短语】plot of land (地块；基址), plot against (暗算；阴谋策划), plot out (划分；分配；描绘，提出…纲要)
ex: The plot was a little confusing.
exz: 情节有些费解。

en: n&v&a. if a vehicle or its driver reverses, they go backwards
core: 【记忆】re(反) + vers(转动) + e → 反转 → 颠倒 | 【短语】in reverse (adv. 相反，向相反方向，倒（退），逆（行、转等）), reverse engineering (逆向工程), reverse osmosis (反渗透，逆向渗透)
ex: I owe you nothing. If anything, the reverse is true (= you owe me ) .
exz: 我不欠你什么。 如果说欠的话，是你欠我才对。

en: n. the quality or state of being pure
core: 【短语】high purity (高纯度), optical purity (光学纯度)
ex: the purity of tap water
exz: 自来水的纯净度

zh: n. 统计，统计数字；统计学
en: n. quantitative data on any subject, esp data comparing the distribution of some quantity for different subclasses of the population
core: 【短语】mathematical statistics (数理统计；数学统计), bureau of statistics (统计局), according to statistics (据统计)
ex: statistics for earnings by different age groups

zh: adj. 可防守的，守得住的；可保持的，可维持的
core: 【记忆】ten(维持， 保持) + able → 能够维持的 → 站得住脚的
ex: an idea which is no longer tenable
exz: 不再成立的观点

zh: adj. 可触知的；明确的；确实的
en: adj. clear enough or definite enough to be easily seen or noticed
core: 【短语】tangible benefits (显著实惠，有形利益), tangible asset (有形资产), tangible and intangible assets (有形和无形资产；有形资产和无形资产)
ex: The scheme must have tangible benefits for the unemployed.
exz: 这个计划一定要对失业者有实实在在的好处。

zh: v. 解散；解雇；不考虑；消除
en: v. to remove someone from their job
core: 【记忆】dis(分开) + miss(送， 放出) → 解散， 解雇 | 【短语】dismiss from (解雇；开除)
ex: The government has dismissed criticisms that the country’s health policy is a mess.
exz: 有人认为国家医疗政策一塌糊涂，政府对这种批评持否认态度。

zh: v. 开发票；n. 发票，装货清单
en: v. to send someone an invoice；n. a list of goods that have been supplied or work that has been done, showing how much you owe for them
core: 【记忆】in + voice(声音) → 大声把人叫进来开发票 → 发票； 给…开发票 | 【短语】invoice value (发票价值), commercial invoice (商业发票，正式签证的贸易发票), proforma invoice (形式发票；试算发票；备考货单)
ex: The agency invoices the client who then pays the full amount to the agency.
exz: 那个代销处给客户开具发票，然后客户向代销处支付全部的款项。

en: n. the process of giving or getting the right type of food for good health and growth
core: 【记忆】nutri(营养) + tion → 营养； 营养学 | 【短语】animal nutrition (动物营养学), human nutrition (人类营养学，人体营养), nutrition and health care (营养与保健)
ex: Nutrition and exercise are essential to fitness and health.
exz: 营养和运动是保持健康所必不可少的。

zh: adj. 憔悴的，瘦弱的；荒凉的
en: adj. very thin and pale, especially because of illness or continued worry
ex: the old man’s gaunt face
exz: 老人那瘦削的脸庞

zh: n. 被告；adj. 处于被告地位的
en: n. the person in a court of law who has been  accused  of doing something illegal
core: 【记忆】defend(辩护) + ant → 需要为自己辩护的一方 → 被告
ex: We find the defendant not guilty.
exz: 我们裁定被告无罪。

en: v. if a price or amount fluctuates, it keeps changing and becoming higher and lower
core: 【记忆】flu(流动) + ctu + ate → (水)流动 → 起伏， 涨落
ex: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
exz: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

zh: v. 提高(强度、力量、数量等)，增加(进)
en: v. to improve something
ex: Good lighting will enhance any room.
exz: 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

ex: That’s a terrific idea!
exz: 这个主意真棒！

en: vt&n. an arrangement of things for people to look at or buy
core: 【记忆】dis(分开) + play(播放， 表演) → 分开播放 → 陈列， 展览 | 【短语】on display (展览，公开展出), digital display ([计]数字显示), lcd display (n. 液晶显示器；液晶屏幕)
ex: a dazzling display (= very good display ) of flowers
exz: 令人目眩神迷的花卉展

en: n. a long piece of music usually in four parts, written for an  orchestra
core: 【记忆】sym(共同) + phon(声音) + y → 奏出共同的声音 → 交响乐 | 【短语】symphony orchestra (交响乐团), boston symphony orchestra (波士顿交响乐团)
ex: Bruckner’s Fifth Symphony
exz: 布鲁克纳的《第五交响曲》

zh: n&a. 滋补品，补药；强身的，健体的
en: n&a. a drink that you have as a medicine to give you more energy or strength when you feel tired
core: 【短语】hair tonic (生发油), tonic wine (滋补酒), tonic water (开胃水；奎宁水)
ex: A lot of people need a tonic at the end of the winter.
exz: 很多人冬末需要进补。

zh: n. 生理组织；薄纸；棉纸；织物；一套
en: n. light thin paper used for wrapping, packing etc
core: 【短语】tissue engineering (组织工程学), soft tissue (软组织), tissue culture (组织培养；体素培养)
ex: a box of tissues
exz: 一盒面巾纸

en: n. teaching, especially in small groups
core: 【短语】tuition fee (学费), tuition waiver (学费减免)
ex: I had to have extra tuition in maths.
exz: 我不得不上数学补习课。

zh: n. 学术性刊物，期刊；日记
en: n. a serious magazine produced for professional people or those with a particular interest
core: 【记忆】journ(日) + al → 每日都有的 → 日报； 日志 | 【短语】wall street journal (华尔街日报), medical journal (医学期刊), academic journal (学报，学术期刊)
ex: the British Medical Journal
exz: 《英国医学杂志》

en: n. the part of a nut or seed inside the shell, or the part inside the stone of some fruits
core: 【短语】kernel function ([数]核函数), walnut kernel (核桃仁), kernel mode ([计]核心态)
ex: The kernel of that message was that peace must not be a source of advantage or disadvantage for anyone.
exz: 那一信息的核心是和平绝不应该成为对任何人有利或不利的根源。

en: n. the part of your hand that is shaped like a thick short finger and helps you to hold things
core: 【短语】rule of thumb (经验法则), thumbs down (vt. 拇指向下；责备), green thumb (有特殊园艺才能)
ex: a baby sucking its thumb
exz: 吮着大拇指的婴儿

en: n. a small book that advertises a school, college, new business etc
ex: ...a prospectus for a new issue of stock.
exz: …新发行股票的招股说明书。

en: v. to find out what illness someone has, or what the cause of a fault is, after doing tests, examinations etc
core: 【记忆】dia + gno(知道) + se → 专家会诊， 知道病情 → 诊断； 判断
ex: How did they diagnose you?
exz: 他们怎么给你的诊断的？

zh: a&ad&n. 额外的/地，非常，另外；额外的人
en: a&ad&n. Extras are additional amounts of money that are added to the price that you have to pay for something
core: 【记忆】本身为词根， 意为“额外的； 特别的” | 【短语】extra time (额外时间；[体]加赛时间), extra money (额外的钱；[英国俚语]超速罚款单), extra work (加班；额外工作)
ex: There are no hidden extras.
exz: 没有任何隐蔽的额外费用。

en: "vi. to gradually become less and less or smaller and smaller
core: 【记忆】d + wind(风) + le → 随风而去， 越来越小 → (使)缩小
ex: The elephant population is dwindling.
exz: 大象的数量在减少。

zh: n. 补钉；眼罩；斑点；小块土地；v. 补缀
en: n. a small area of something that is different from the area around it；v. to repair a hole in something by putting a piece of something else over it
core: 【短语】patch clamp (膜片箝), patch up (修补；平息；拼凑), in patches (在有些部分；在有些时候)
ex: Look out for icy patches on the road.
exz: 小心路上结冰的地方。

zh: n. 草图，素描;；n. 短剧；简述；v. 草拟
en: n. a simple, quickly made drawing that does not show much detail；n. a short humorous scene on a television programme, in a theatre etc, that is part of a larger show
core: 【短语】sketch map (示意图，草图), design sketch (设计图), sketch out (v. 概略地叙述；草拟)
ex: So if we just sketch that.
exz: 那么如果我们把那画个草图。

zh: adj. 难看的，简陋的；吝啬的，自私的；n. 中间
en: adj. not wanting to spend money, or not wanting to use much of something；n. a method of doing something which is between two very different methods, and better than either of them …
core: 【短语】in the mean (当其时；同时；在此期间), mean time (n. 平均时间（平均太阳时）), mean square (均方；均方差；均方值)
ex: He’s too mean to buy a present for his wife.
exz: 他很吝啬，给他妻子买件礼物都不肯。

zh: n. 痕迹；足迹；微量；v. 描绘，勾出轮廓
en: n. a small sign that shows that someone or something was present or existed；v. to copy a drawing, map etc by putting a piece of transparent paper over it and then drawing the lines you can see through the paper
core: 【记忆】描绘(trace)车轮的痕迹(track) | 【短语】trace element ([化]微量元素), without a trace (无影无踪地；渺无踪迹地), trace back (追溯)
ex: There was no trace of anyone having entered the room since then.
exz: 没有任何迹象表明在那以后有人进过这房间。

zh: n. 防卫 防护 防御物 辩护 被告律师
en: n. something that you say or do in order to support someone or something that is being criticized
core: 【记忆】来自defend(v. 防护； 辩护) | 【短语】national defence (国防), air defence (防空；空防), defence against (防御；保卫)
ex: The land was flat, giving no scope for defence.
exz: 土地非常平坦，无法做防卫之用。

en: n. the act of forcing someone to leave a place
ex: The headmaster threatened the boys with expulsion.
exz: 校长警告这几名男生说要开除他们。

zh: adj. 潜在的;；adj. 可能的；n. 潜能；潜力
en: adj. likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future；adj. likely to develop into a particular type of person or thing in the future；n. the possibility that something will develop in a particular way, or have a particular effect
core: 【记忆】po + tent(伸展) + ial → 无限伸展的 → 潜在的； 可能的； 潜能 | 【短语】market potential ([经]市场潜力；市场潜在需求量), potential energy (势能), development potential (发展潜力；发展前景)
ex: The company has identified 60 potential customers.
exz: 该公司已确定了60位潜在的客户。

en: n. a small official document that you get from your government, that proves who you are, and which you need in order to leave your country and enter other countries
core: 【记忆】pass(通过) + port(港口) → 通过港口所需的文件 → 护照 | 【短语】passport number (护照号；护照号码), passport control (护照检查处；入境检验；验护照)
ex: I have an Irish passport.
exz: 我持爱尔兰护照。

zh: n. 工艺；手工业；船；技巧；诡计
en: n. a job or activity in which you make things with your hands, and that you usually need skill to do
core: 【记忆】c + raft(筏) → 筏也就是船 → 船 | 【短语】craft brother (n. 同行), art and craft (工艺品), space craft (宇宙飞船)
ex: traditional rural crafts
exz: 传统的乡村手工艺

zh: n&vi. 微光，闪光，短暂而微弱的闪现
en: n&vi. to shine softly
ex: His teeth gleamed under his moustache.
exz: 他的八字须下面，牙齿晶莹发亮。

en: v&n. if a river, lake, or container overflows, it is so full that the liquid or material inside flows over its edges
core: 【短语】buffer overflow (缓冲区溢出), overflow valve (溢流阀), overflow weir (溢流堰)
ex: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
exz: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

zh: adj. 庄严的，严肃的，隆重的
en: adj. very serious and not happy, for example because something bad has happened or because you are at an important occasion
core: 【记忆】sol(太阳) ＋ emn → 古时把太阳看作是神圣庄严的 → 庄严的 | 【短语】solemn promise (庄严承诺；誓言), solemn ceremony (隆重的典礼)
ex: a solemn expression
exz: 严肃的表情

en: n. plants in general
core: 【短语】natural vegetation (自然植被，天然植物羣), vegetation cover (植被（覆盖）；植物覆盖层), vegetation type (植被型，植被种类)
ex: Lefkas has an abundance of lush green vegetation.
exz: 莱夫卡斯有葱郁茂盛的植被。

zh: adj. 易弯的，柔韧的；易受影响的
en: adj. able to bend without breaking or cracking
ex: a shoe made of soft pliable leather
exz: 柔韧的皮革做成的鞋子

en: n. anxiety about the future, especially about dealing with something unpleasant or difficult
ex: a feeling of apprehension
exz: 担忧的心情

zh: v. 胡言乱语；热衷谈论；n. 热情赞扬
en: v. to talk in an angry, uncontrolled, or crazy way；n. enthusiastic or extravagant praise
core: 【短语】rave about (对…倾倒；热情地谈论；激愤地说), rave review (哄动热烈的好评；狂热褒评)
ex: He was still ranting and raving the next morning.
exz: 第二天上午他仍在大叫大嚷。

zh: n. 解决困难，解答问题；溶解；溶液

en: n. the set of tools and machines that you use for a particular scientific, medical, or technical purpose

core: 【短语】competitive advantage (竞争优势), competitive power (竞争能力), competitive price (竞争价格；公开招标价格)

ex: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.
exz: 他跌下去竟然能够生还，真不可思议。

en: v. to replace or balance the effect of something bad
core: 【记忆】com(以) + pens(偿还) + ate → 以某物来偿还 → 补偿， 赔偿； 弥补 | 【短语】compensate for (赔偿，补偿)
ex: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate.
exz: 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

zh: adj. 歇斯底里的, 狂热的
en: adj. unable to control your behaviour or emotions because you are very upset, afraid, excited etc
ex: Janet became hysterical and began screaming.
exz: 珍妮特歇斯底里起来，开始尖叫。

en: vt&n. to put your arms around someone and hold them tightly to show love or friendship
core: 【短语】bear hug (粗鲁或紧紧得拥抱；[摔跤]熊抱；[金融]接管策略)
ex: We stood there crying and hugging each other.
exz: 我们站在那里哭着互相拥抱。

en: v. if animals or people inhabit an area or place, they live there
ex: The woods are inhabited by many wild animals.
exz: 很多野生动物栖居在这片森林里。

en: n. a small tool that has two narrow pieces of metal joined at one end, used to pull or move very small objects
core: 【短语】optical tweezers (光镊子，光学镊子；光钳；雷射光钳（optical tweezer的复数）)
ex: She was plucking her eyebrows with a pair of tweezers .
exz: 她正拿着一把小镊子在拔眉毛。

en: v. to be in charge of a group of workers and check that a piece of work is done satisfactorily
core: 【记忆】over(在…之上) + see(看) → 监督
ex: A team leader was appointed to oversee the project.
exz: 任命了一位组长来监管该工程。

en: adj. relating to the sides of something, or movement to the side
core: 【记忆】later(侧面， 边) + al → 侧面的 | 【短语】lateral displacement (横向位移，侧向位移；侧方移位), lateral pressure (侧压；旁压力), lateral stiffness (横向刚性，横向刚度)
ex: The wall is weak and requires lateral support.
exz: 墙体不坚固，需要从侧面加以支撑。

en: n. a long piece of paper that can be rolled up, and is used as an official document
core: 【短语】scroll bar ([计]滚动条), scroll down (向下滚动；向下卷动), silk scroll (绢本)
ex: Ancient scrolls were found in caves by the Dead Sea.
exz: 在死海边的洞穴里发现了古代的卷轴。

en: n. at or from the beginning of an event or process
core: 【短语】at the outset (开始；起初), from the outset (从一开始)
ex: It was clear from the outset that there were going to be problems.
exz: 从一开始就很清楚会有问题出现的。

zh: n. (公共场所存衣帽的)小橱柜
en: n. A locker is a small metal or wooden cabinet with a lock, where you can put your personal possessions, for example in a school, place of work, or sports club
core: 【短语】locker room (衣帽间)
ex: a meat locker
exz: 肉类冷藏间

en: adj. relating to an empire or to the person who rules it
core: 【短语】imperial palace (n. 宫城；皇城), imperial examinations (科举), imperial college (（英）帝国理工学院)
ex: Britain’s imperial expansion in the 19th century
exz: 19世纪英帝国的扩张

en: n. the process of keeping something in good condition
ex: Poorer people find it hard to pay for their pet’s upkeep.
exz: 经济不宽裕的人难以负担养宠物的开销。

zh: adj. 自愿的，志愿的；有意的
en: adj. done willingly and without being forced
core: 【记忆】volunt(意愿) + ary → 出于自身意愿的 → 自愿的 | 【短语】voluntary contributions (自愿捐款), voluntary agreement (自愿协议), voluntary withdrawal (自动撤销；自动退学)
ex: Workers are being encouraged to take voluntary redundancy.
exz: 工人被鼓励主动离职。

zh: adj. 无情的，不仁慈的，残酷的
en: adj. strict, cruel, or determined, without ever stopping
core: 【记忆】relent(变温和) + less → 缺少温和 → 无情的， 残酷的
ex: her relentless determination to succeed
exz: 她要成功的坚定决心

en: vi&n. to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
core: 【记忆】和slide(n./v. 滑动)一起记
ex: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.
exz: 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

en: adj. beautiful and impressive
core: 【记忆】splend(明亮) + id → 让人眼前一亮的 → 壮观的
ex: All the rooms have splendid views.
exz: 所有的房间都能看到漂亮的景致。

zh: n. 怪诞的思想、行动或事件；畸形的
en: n. someone who is considered to be very strange because of the way they look, behave, or think
core: 【短语】freak out (使处于极度兴奋中；崩溃), control freak (喜欢控制一切的人；对控制上瘾者), freak accident (特殊事件；不寻常的事故)
ex: These glasses make me look like a freak.
exz: 我戴这副眼镜看上去像个怪人。

zh: adj. 精力充沛的；动力的；n. (pl)力学，动力学
en: adj. full of energy and new ideas, and determined to succeed；n. something that causes action or change
core: 【记忆】dynam(力量) + ic → 力量的 → 动力的； 活跃的 | 【短语】dynamic model (动态模型；动力模型), dynamic response (动态响应；动力特性), dynamic analysis (动态分析；动力特性分析)
ex: dynamic and ambitious people
exz: 精力充沛且雄心勃勃的人

zh: adj. 主要的，基本的；n. 深红色；基数
en: adj. very important or basic；n. a  cardinal number
core: 【短语】cardinal number ([数]基数), cardinal point (基点；方位基点), cardinal virtues (基本道德)
ex: Having clean hands is one of the cardinal rules when preparing food.
exz: 双手洁净是准备食物时的一项最基本要求。

en: n. a fine cloth made with patterns of many very small holes
core: 【短语】lace up (用带子束紧), shoe lace (鞋带)
ex: a handkerchief trimmed with lace
exz: 饰有蕾丝花边的手绢

en: adj. a derelict building or piece of land is in very bad condition because it has not been used for a long time
core: 【记忆】de(表加强)  + re(后) + lict(分离) → 完全置后 → 被抛弃的
ex: Her body was found dumped in a derelict warehouse less than a mile from her home.
exz: 她的尸体被发现丢在离她家不到一英里的一座废弃的仓库里。

en: adj. able to continue to live or to develop into a living thing
core: 【记忆】vi(道路) + able(能…的) → 有路可走 → 可行的， 可实施的
ex: viable seeds
exz: 可存活的种子

en: n. A fusion of different qualities, ideas, or things is something new that is created by joining them together
core: 【记忆】fus(流) + ion → 流到一起 → 熔合 | 【短语】nuclear fusion (n. 核聚变；[物]核子融合), fusion welding ([化]熔焊；熔焊接), protoplast fusion (原生质体融合)
ex: His previous fusions of jazz, pop and African melodies have proved highly successful.
exz: 他先前对爵士乐、流行乐和非洲音乐旋律的融合已经证明是非常成功的。

core: 【短语】recede from (v. 收回；撤回)

en: n. a statement that something will happen in the future, especially one made by someone with religious or magic powers
core: 【短语】self-fulfilling prophecy (自我应验的预言)
ex: She had the gift of prophecy.
exz: 她有预言的天赋。

zh: n. 自我，自己，个人思考和感觉能力
en: n. the opinion that you have about yourself
core: 【短语】alter ego (n. 密友；个性的另一面；至交), ego identity (自我同一性；自我统合), ego trip (n. 追求个人满足)
ex: That promotion really boosted her ego (= made her feel better about herself ).
exz: 那次晋升确实增强了她的自信心。

zh: adj. 肌肉的；肌肉发达的
en: adj. having large strong muscles
core: 【短语】muscular dystrophy ([医]肌肉萎缩症), muscular atrophy (肌肉萎缩)
ex: She was fast and strong, with a slender, muscular body.
exz: 她动作敏捷，身体强壮，身材苗条，肌肉结实。

zh: a&n. 外部的；外来的，外表
en: a&n. the outside of something, especially a building
core: 【记忆】金玉其外(exterior)， 败絮其中(interior) | 【短语】exterior wall (外墙), exterior surface (外表面；盖外表面), exterior quality (外观品质)
ex: The dome is tiled on the exterior.
exz: 穹顶表面铺了瓦片。

en: v. to provide someone with a place to stay, live, or work
core: 【短语】accommodate with (向…供应；提供；以…供应)
ex: The island was used to accommodate child refugees.
exz: 该岛用于收容儿童难民。

en: v. to disobey or do something against an official agreement, law, principle etc
ex: 34 protesters were arrested for violating criminal law.
exz: 34名抗议者因违反刑法而被逮捕。

en: adj. feeling unhappy because someone has something that you wish you had
core: 【短语】jealous of (妒忌)
ex: She got insanely jealous and there was a terrible fight.
exz: 她变得过分地猜忌，接着是一场激烈的打斗。

zh: v. 创始，着手，介绍某人为(会员等)
core: 【记忆】in(向内) + it(走) + iate → 向里走 → 开始； 让…加入
ex: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper.
exz: 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

zh: n. 混凝土；adj. 有形的；具体的；v. 浇混凝土于
en: n. a substance used for building that is made by mixing sand, small stones,  cement  , and water；adj. definite and specific；v. to cover something such as a path, wall etc with concrete
core: 【记忆】con + cre(产生) + te → 产生(事物) → 具体存在的事物 → 实在的； 具体的 | 【短语】reinforced concrete (n. 钢筋混凝土), in the concrete (实际上，具体的), concrete structure (混凝土结构；具体结构；混凝土建造物)
ex: The posts have to be set in concrete.
exz: 这些柱子必须固定在混凝土中。

en: n. a political situation in which people protest or behave violently
core: 【短语】social unrest (社会动荡；社会不安)
ex: There is growing unrest throughout the country.
exz: 全国各地日益动荡不安。

en: v. to make a formal request, usually written, for something such as a job, a place at a university, or permission to do something
core: 【记忆】这家服务站免费提供(supply)打气筒给行人使用(apply) | 【短语】apply oneself (减少对…之消耗量；努力，致力于…), apply for (申请，请求), apply for a job (求职；申请工作)
ex: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.
exz: 我们建车库需要申请规划许可。

en: n. a situation in which there is a lot of damage or a lack of order, especially so that it is difficult for something to continue in the normal way
core: 【短语】wreak havoc (肆虐；造成严重破坏), play havoc with (毁坏；使陷入大混乱)
ex: policies that would wreak havoc on the country’s economy
exz: 会危害该国经济的政策

zh: n. 招贴画，广告；广告画
en: n. a large printed notice, picture, or photograph, used to advertise something or as a decoration
core: 【短语】poster design (海报设计), poster child (n. 作为模范的人或物), poster board (广告纸板；海报用纸；写布告用的硬纸板)
ex: A team of volunteers were putting up posters .
exz: 一队志愿者正在张贴海报。

en: v. to make something become twisted and caught in a rope, net etc
ex: The blade of the oar had entangled itself with the strap of her bag.
exz: 桨叶和她包的带子紧紧缠在了一起。

en: v. to force people to leave a place or organization because the people in power do not like them
core: 【短语】purge gas (净化气体；吹扫用的气体), purge of (清洗，清除), air purge (空气吹扫；空气净化)
ex: Anorexics may overeat before purging themselves or vomiting.
exz: 厌食症患者会在暴饮暴食之后服用泻药或者把吃下去的东西呕吐出来。

en: n&v. someone who officially introduces or supports a proposal for a new law
core: 【记忆】spons(看作spoon， 勺子) ＋ or(表人) → 揭勺而起者 → 发起者
ex: Dozens of companies, including Hewlett-Packard, are sponsoring the event.
exz: 包括惠普在内的许多公司都在赞助这项赛事。

zh: n. 标题；题目；称号；法律权利，所有权
en: n. the name given to a particular book, painting, play etc
core: 【短语】job title (n. 职称), title bar (标题栏), professional title (职称；专业头衔)
ex: "Patience and Sarah" was first published in 1969 under the title "A Place for Us."
exz: 《耐心与萨拉》于1969年以《我们的地方》为书名首次出版。

en: n. a  steamship
n. the feeling that someone or something is stupid or does not deserve respect
ex: Researchers greeted the proposal with scorn.
exz: 研究者们对这个提议报以轻蔑的态度。

en: n. the force that keeps an object in the same position or keeps it moving until it is moved or stopped by another force
core: 【短语】moment of inertia (惯性矩，转动惯量), inertia force (惯性力), thermal inertia (热惰性；热惯性（温升速率的倒数）；热惯量)
ex: political inertia
exz: 政治上的保守

en: n. a short performance by an actor, singer etc that someone watches to judge if they are good enough to act in a play, sing in a concert etc
core: 【记忆】aud(听) + ition → 试听 | 【短语】audition for (向…试唱，试演；参加…面试；面试)
ex: ...an audition for a Broadway musical.
exz: …一部百老汇歌舞剧的试演。

en: n. a field with wild grass and flowers
core: 【记忆】mea(看作meal， 美餐) + dow(看作cow， 母牛) → 母牛在草地上吃草， 享受美餐 → 草地 | 【短语】alpine meadow (高山草甸), meadow soil (草甸土；湿草原土)
ex: The meadow has been ploughed up.
exz: 那片草地已用犁翻过。

en: v. to look after someone very kindly, for example by giving them the things that they want and making them feel warm and comfortable
ex: She spent her childhood as the pampered daughter of a wealthy family.
exz: 她出身于一个富裕家庭，从小娇生惯养。

en: n. a  memo
core: 【记忆】memor(记忆) + and + um → 辅助记忆的东西 → 备忘录 | 【短语】memorandum of understanding (n. 谅解备忘录，理解备忘录；学术合作备忘录), explanatory memorandum (说明书), memorandum book (备忘录)
ex: ...a memorandum from the Department of Defense on its role.
exz: …一份来自国防部的有关其角色的备忘录。

en: adj. slow and unwilling
core: 【记忆】“驴拉坦克” → 不情愿的， 勉强的 | 【短语】reluctant to help (不情愿帮忙)
ex: She gave a reluctant smile.
exz: 她勉强笑了笑。

zh: adj. 褴褛的，外形参差不齐的
en: adj. wearing clothes that are old and torn
core: 【短语】in rags (穿着破衣，衣衫褴褛), from rags to riches (由穷致富), red rag (斗牛用的红布；激怒人的东西)
ex: Crowds of ragged children played among the rocks.
exz: 一群群破衣烂衫的孩子在岩石间玩耍。

en: n. one of the long thin parts of a sea creature such as an  octopus  which it uses for holding things
ex: Free speech is being gradually eroded year after year by new tentacles of government control.
exz: 言论自由正被政府控制的新触角逐渐侵蚀。

en: adj. related to land that is owned or controlled by a particular country
core: 【短语】territorial integrity (领土的完整), territorial waters (领海), territorial sea (领海)
ex: a territorial dispute
exz: 领土争端

en: n. a book that you put photographs, stamps etc in
core: 【短语】photo album (相册；相簿), debut album (首张专辑；处女专辑), stamp album (n. 集邮册)
ex: a photograph album
exz: 相册

en: v. to make something return to its former state or condition
core: 【记忆】灾后重建(restore)， 包括商店(store) | 【短语】backup and restore (备份与还原)
ex: She was hoping that the Mediterranean climate would restore her to full health.
exz: 她希望地中海的气候能使她的身体完全复原。

zh: v. 爬行；缓慢移行；(时间)悄悄过去；蔓延
en: v. if something such as an insect, small animal, or car creeps, it moves slowly and quietly
core: 【短语】creep deformation (蠕变), creep test (蠕变试验；耐蠕变试验), creep resistance (抗蠕变性；蠕变强度；抗蠕阻力；蠕变阻力)
ex: He crept back up the stairs, trying to avoid the ones that creaked.
exz: 他蹑手蹑脚地回楼上，尽量避开那些嘎吱作响的梯级。

en: v. to produce something, for example by putting the different parts of it together
core: 【短语】make sure (确信；证实), make up (弥补；组成；化妆；整理), make full use of (充分利用)
ex: I’m going to show you how to make a box for your tools.
exz: 我来教你怎么做一个箱子存放工具。

zh: v. 系上；附上；依恋；认为
en: v. to fasten or connect one object to another
core: 【记忆】at + tach(接触) → 接触上 → 贴； 使附属 | 【短语】attached please find (附上…请查收[书信用语]), attach file (附件)
ex: It’s easy to become attached to the children you work with.
exz: 你很容易就会喜欢上工作中接触到的孩子。

en: n. one of the large groups of stars that make up the universe
core: 【短语】milky way galaxy (银河系), galaxy securities (n. 中国银河证券有限责任公司), spiral galaxy (n. 螺旋星云（等于spiral nebula）)
ex: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
exz: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

en: vt&n. to experience something, especially problems or opposition
core: 【记忆】en(使…) + counter(相反的) → 使从两个相反的方面来 → 遇到， 遭遇 | 【短语】encounter with (遭遇，遇到), close encounter (近距离接触；紧密交会)
ex: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
exz: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

en: n. a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
core: 【记忆】suit(一套衣服) + case(箱子) → 衣箱
ex: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.
exz: 安德鲁没有用多长时间就整理好了手提箱。

zh: n. 分隔栏；售货摊；前排座位
en: n. a table or a small shop with an open front, especially outdoors, where goods are sold
core: 【记忆】sta(看作stand， 立) + ll(像两根柱子) → 两根柱子撑起的狭小空间 → 货摊； 小隔间 | 【短语】market stall (街市档位)
ex: a market stall
exz: 市场摊位

en: n. People who are part of a particular staff are often referred to as staff
core: 【记忆】与stuff(n. 材料)一起记 | 【短语】technical staff (技术人员), teaching staff (教育工作者（总称）), medical staff (医务人员)
ex: 10 staff were allocated to the task.
exz: 10名员工被分派做这项任务。

en: v. to reduce or limit something
core: 【记忆】cur(关注) + tail(切割) → 专注地切短 → 缩短， 削减
ex: The new law will curtail police powers.
exz: 这条新法规将削弱警方的权力。

zh: v. vi大声哀号，恸哭；呼啸，尖啸
en: v. to say something in a loud, sad, and complaining way
ex: ‘But what shall I do?’ Bernard wailed.
exz: “但我该怎么办呢？”伯纳德哭喊道。

ex: This gives you the opportunity to pray for and bless the other thereby blessing yourself.
exz: 它其实是给了你一个机会，去为他人祈祷和祝福，从而赐福给你自己。

en: adj. not very good
core: 【记忆】medi(中间) + ocre → 中间状态 → 平庸的， 平凡的
ex: I thought the book was pretty mediocre.
exz: 我认为这本书非常一般。

en: n. an area of lower land between two lines of hills or mountains, usually with a river flowing through it
core: 【短语】river valley (河谷；山涧), happy valley (欢乐谷（游乐场）；跑马地（香港一高级住宅区）), napa valley (纳帕谷（美国加州葡萄酒的主要产地）)

core: 【短语】issue in (v. 导致), new issue (n. 新发行的证券), key issue (关键议题)
ex: Abortion is a highly controversial issue.
exz: 堕胎是个很有争议的话题。

en: n&v. a list that shows the times that buses, trains etc leave or arrive at a particular place
core: 【记忆】“筛斗” → 古代拿筛漏计时 → 时刻表 | 【短语】on schedule (adv. 按时；按照预定时间), ahead of schedule (adv. 提前), according to schedule (按照预定计划)
ex: How can he fit everything into his busy schedule ?
exz: 他是怎么把所有的事情都排进自己忙碌的时间表的？

en: n. a unit for measuring length, equal to three feet or 0.91 metres
core: 【短语】back yard (后院), front yard (前院), storage yard (堆货场；存车场)
ex: a hundred yards away
exz: 100码外

zh: adj. (江河、海洋)可航行的，可通航的
en: adj. a river, lake etc that is navigable is deep and wide enough for ships to travel on
core: 【记忆】nav(船) + ig(开动) + able(能…的) → 船可以开动的 → 可通航的
ex: ...the navigable portion of the Nile.
exz: ...尼罗河的适航河段。

zh: adj. 感情强烈的；热烈的；(人)有强烈感情的
en: adj. showing very strong feelings or opinions
ex: She suddenly became very vehement and agitated, jumping around and shouting.
exz: 她突然变得十分激动和不安，四处暴跳并大喊大叫。

en: v. to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
core: 【记忆】e(出) + limin(界限) + ate → 划在界限之外 → 消灭， 消除 | 【短语】eliminate poverty (消除贫困), eliminate noise (消除噪声), eliminate illiteracy (扫盲，扫除文盲)
ex: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
exz: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

zh: n. 偏见，成见；(法律)损害，伤害
en: n. an un-reasonable dislike and distrust of people who are different from you in some way, especially because of their race, sex, religion etc – used to show disapproval
core: 【短语】without prejudice (无偏见), pride and prejudice (《傲慢与偏见》), prejudice against (vt. 对……的偏见)
ex: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
exz: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

en: adj. having two of something or two parts
core: 【短语】dual function (双重职能), dual role (双重角色), dual purpose (双重目的；双用途的)
ex: a dual system of education
exz: 二元[双元]教育体系

core: 【记忆】ess(存在) + ential → 存在的东西 → 要素； 实质， 本质 | 【短语】essential oil (香精油，精油), essential condition (必要条件), essential hypertension (原发性高血压；特发性高血压)
ex: She packed a few essentials.
exz: 她把几件生活必需品装进箱子。

en: v. If people promote something, they help or encourage it to happen, increase, or spread
core: 【记忆】pro(向前) + mot(动) + e → 向前动 → 促进 | 【短语】promote sales (促销；推销商品), promote reform (促进改革), promote cooperation (促进合作)
ex: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
exz: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

en: v. used to thank someone in a polite way or to say that you are grateful for something they have done
core: 【记忆】ap(向) + preci(价值) + ate → 对价值予以肯定 → 赏识
ex: Thanks ever so much for your help, I really appreciate it.
exz: 多谢你的帮助，我真的很感激。

en: n. a short sentence or phrase giving a rule on how to behave, which expresses the aims or beliefs of a person, school, or institution
core: 【短语】olympic motto (奥林匹克格言), school motto (校训)
ex: ‘Be prepared’ is the motto of the Boy Scouts.
exz: “时刻准备着”是童子军的格言。

en: v. if a small child toddles, it walks with short, unsteady steps
ex: ...once your baby starts toddling.
exz: ...一旦你的小孩开始蹒跚学步。

en: n&vt. an angry and often violent quarrel between two people or groups that continues for a long time
core: 【短语】at feud with (与…有仇，与…不和), blood feud (族仇；世仇)
ex: Insults only served to inflame the feud.
exz: 侮辱只是起到了加剧长期不和的作用。

en: n. an official process of counting a country’s population and finding out about the people
core: 【短语】census register (户籍登记簿), census data (n. 户口普查资料), census bureau (人口统计局，人口调查局；人口普查局)
ex: a traffic census
exz: 交通状况调查

zh: adj. (语言、词汇等)古代的，已不通用的
en: adj. old and no longer used
ex: archaic words
exz: 古词

zh: v. 使液化，融化；使解散
en: v. if a solid dissolves, or if you dissolve it, it mixes with a liquid and becomes part of it
core: 【记忆】dis(分开) + solve(解决) → 分开解决 → 溶解； 解散 | 【短语】dissolve in (vt. 溶入)
ex: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
exz: 一直搅拌到糖溶解掉。

zh: n. 运货人；带菌者；运输军队的交通工具
en: n. a company that moves goods or passengers from one place to another
core: 【短语】aircraft carrier (n. 航空母舰；全能篮球中锋), carrier frequency (载波频率), carrier phase (载波相位)
ex: an international carrier
exz: 跨国运输公司

en: n. an action or event that is a signal for something else to happen
core: 【记忆】线索(clue)有提示(cue)作用 | 【短语】on cue (恰好在这个时候), cue ball (撞球台上的白色球，母球), cue in (v. 插入；提供消息)
ex: She stood nervously in the wings waiting for her cue.
exz: 她紧张地站在台侧等待出场的提示。

zh: a&ad. 无准备的(地)；即兴的(地)

en: v. to surprise someone very much
ex: Dave amazed his friends by suddenly getting married.
exz: 戴夫突然结婚，令朋友们非常吃惊。

zh: adj. 疲倦的，困乏的；令人厌倦的
en: adj. very tired or bored, especially because you have been doing something for a long time
core: 【短语】weary of (疲倦；厌烦于), weary with (因…而厌烦)
ex: She found Rachel in the kitchen, looking old and weary.
exz: 她发现雷切尔在厨房里，看上去苍老而疲惫。

en: n. a feeling of calm confidence about your own abilities, or that you are right about something
core: 【记忆】assur(=assure保证) + ance → 保证 | 【短语】quality assurance (质量保证；品质保证), assurance company (保险公司), life assurance (n. 人寿保险；（保险公司付给的）人寿保险金；（被保险人缴纳的）人寿保险费)
ex: the calm assurance with which she handled the horse
exz: 她对付马儿时的从容镇定

en: n. the use of computers and machines instead of people to do a job
core: 【短语】industrial automation (工业自动化), office automation (办公自动化), automation equipment (自动化设备；自动化装置)

zh: v. 同意，答应；着手做某事
en: v. to accept that you are responsible for a piece of work, and start to do it
ex: He undertook to pay the money back in six months.
exz: 他保证在六个月之内还钱。

en: n. a tendency to believe that bad things will happen
ex: ...universal pessimism about the economy.
exz: …对经济形势普遍的悲观看法。

zh: n. 代理权，代表权；代理人
en: n. if you do something by proxy, you arrange for someone else to do it for you
core: 【短语】proxy server (代理服务系统), proxy service (代理服务), proxy war (代理战争；代理人战争)
ex: You can vote by proxy.
exz: 你可以请人代你投票。

en: v. to make someone who is ill become healthy again, especially by using natural powers or prayer
core: 【短语】heal up (痊愈；治愈), self heal (自我治愈；夏枯草)
ex: a preacher who claims that he can heal the sick
exz: 自称可以治病的传道士

zh: adj. 食品不新鲜的；陈旧的
en: adj. bread or cake that is stale is no longer fresh or good to eat
core: 【记忆】s + tale(传说) → 传说说多， 陈词滥调 → 陈腐的
ex: French bread goes stale (= becomes stale ) very quickly.
exz: 法式面包极易变味。

en: adj. causing damage to people or things
core: 【记忆】de(去掉) + struct(建立) + ive(形容词后缀)  → 毁坏建好的东西 → 破坏(性)的 | 【短语】destructive power (破坏力), destructive testing (破坏性试验), destructive effect (破坏性)
ex: the destructive power of modern weapons
exz: 现代武器的破坏力

zh: v. 突然袭击；抓住；n. 突袭，猛扑
en: v. to suddenly move forward and attack someone or something, after waiting to attack them；n. the act of pouncing; a spring or swoop
core: 【短语】pounce on (猛扑向；突然袭击)
ex: The cat was hiding in the bushes, ready to pounce.
exz: 猫躲在灌木丛中，准备扑上去。

zh: v. 投递，解救；发表；接生
en: v. to make a speech etc to a lot of people
core: 【记忆】de(使…) + liver(=liber 自由) → 使自由 → 递送； 释放 | 【短语】deliver the goods (交货；履行诺言), deliver goods (交货), deliver a speech (发表演讲；发表讲话)
ex: The king delivered a televised speech to the nation on November 5.
exz: 国王在11月5日向全国发表了电视讲话。

zh: v. 公然反抗，蔑视，拒绝服从
en: v. If you defy someone or something that is trying to make you behave in a particular way, you refuse to obey them and behave in that way
ex: This was the first (and last) time that I dared to defy my mother.
exz: 这是我第一次（也是最后一次）胆敢违抗我母亲。

zh: v. 委派为代表，授权；n. 代表
en: v. to give part of your power or work to someone in a lower position than you；n. someone who has been elected or chosen to speak, vote, or take decisions for a group
core: 【短语】chief delegate (首席代表)
ex: A good manager knows when to delegate.
exz: 一个好的经理知道何时该放权。

en: v. to avoid talking about something, especially because you are trying to hide something
core: 【短语】evade tax (逃税)
ex: I could tell that he was trying to evade the issue.
exz: 我看得出他在极力回避这个问题。

ex: a hilarious story
exz: 极有趣的故事

core: 【短语】septic shock (感染性休克；败血性休克；脓毒性休克), septic tank (化粪池)
ex: Put some anti-septic cream on it.
exz: 涂上一些防止败血症的药膏。

en: v. to cover a path, road, area etc with a hard level surface such as blocks of stone or  concrete
core: 【短语】pave the way for (为…做好准备；为…铺平道路), pave the way (为...作准备；为...铺平道路), paved with good intentions (充满着善意的)
ex: a paved courtyard
exz: 地面铺砌过的院子

en: n&v. to make a deep, very loud noise
ex: We heard a lion roar.
exz: 我们听到狮子在吼叫。

zh: n. 文学，文学作品，文献，著作
en: n. books, plays, poems etc that people think are important and good
core: 【记忆】liter(文字) + ature → 文学(作品)； 文献 | 【短语】literature review (文献回顾；文献综述；文献评论), literature and art (文艺；文学与艺术), english literature (英国文学；英语文化)
ex: He has read many of the major works of literature.
exz: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

en: adj. a historic event or act is very important and will be recorded as part of history
core: 【短语】historic site (古迹；历史遗迹；历史地段), historic monument (历史碑石)
ex: a historic meeting of world leaders
exz: 具有历史意义的世界领导人会议

zh: n. 曲调，旋律；协调，调动
en: n. a series of musical notes that are played or sung and are nice to listen to
core: 【记忆】转动(turn)旋钮调音(tune) | 【短语】out of tune (走调；不协调；（对某事）没有兴趣), in tune (一致；合调子), tune in (收听；调谐；使…协调)
ex: That’s a nice tune.
exz: 那曲调很美。

en: adj. very determined to succeed or get what you want
core: 【记忆】ag + gress(行走) + ive(形容词后缀) → 不断行走， 四处闯荡 → 有进取心的 | 【短语】aggressive behavior (攻击行为；侵犯行为), aggressive action (侵蚀作用；腐蚀性), aggressive attitude (侵犯态度)
ex: A successful businessman has to be aggressive.
exz: 成功的实业家必须得有股冲劲。

zh: n. 认出，识别；身分证明
en: n. official papers or cards, such as your passport, that prove who you are
core: 【记忆】ident(一样的， 相同的) + ific(使…) + tion(名词后缀) → 查看是否相同 → 鉴定； 证明 | 【短语】system identification (系统辨识；系统识别), fingerprint identification (指纹鉴定), identification card (身份证；[计]标识卡)
ex: Do you have any identification?
exz: 你有什么身份证明文件吗？

zh: n. 大惊，小怪；v. 忙乱，使烦躁
en: n. anxious behaviour or activity that is usually about unimportant things；v. to worry a lot about things that may not be very important
core: 【短语】fuss about (大惊小怪；忙乱), make a fuss (大惊小怪，小题大做；吵吵闹闹), fuss over (焦虑；过分关心，过分体贴)
ex: James said he’d better be getting back or there’d be a fuss .
exz: 詹姆斯说他最好回来，否则就会有人小题大做了。

en: n. the study in  mathematics  of the angles and shapes formed by the relationships of lines, surfaces, and solid objects in space
core: 【短语】fractal geometry ([数]分形几何；碎形几何；不规则碎片几何体), differential geometry (微分几何), analytic geometry (解析几何；分析几何学)
ex: ...the very ordered way in which mathematics and geometry describe nature.
exz: …数学和几何学描述自然的条理性。

en: n. the process of moving goods or people from one place to another
core: 【记忆】trans(越过， 穿过) + it(走) → 从一地走到另一地 → 运输， 运载； 通过， 经过 | 【短语】in transit (在运输中；在途中), rail transit (城市轨道交通；铁路直达运输), mass transit (公共交通；集体运输，大众运输)
ex: baggage that is lost or damaged in transit
exz: 在运输过程中丢失或损坏的行李

en: adj. having a very powerful effect or influence on your body or mind
ex: potent drugs
exz: 强效药物

en: n. when something changes from one form or state to another
core: 【记忆】trans(穿过) + it(走) + ion → 穿过一地走到另一地 → 转变 | 【短语】transition period (过渡时期), phase transition (相变), transition temperature ([电]转移温度)
ex: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
exz: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

en: n. sudden noisy activity
core: 【短语】civil commotion (民众骚乱)
ex: They heard a commotion downstairs.
exz: 他们听见楼下一阵骚动。

en: n. one of the two imaginary lines around the world, either the Tropic of Cancer which is 23.5˚ north of the  equator  , or the Tropic of Capricorn which is 23.5˚ south of the equator
core: 【短语】tropic of cancer (北回归线), tropic of capricorn ([天]南回归线)
【记忆】as(表加强) + sert(放置) → 强行放入 → 断言 | 【短语】assert oneself (坚持自己的权利或意见)

zh: adj. (金属)可锻的;有延展性的;(性格)可训练的
en: adj. something that is malleable is easy to press or pull into a new shape
core: 【记忆】malle(锤子) + able → 可锤打的 → 易改变的 | 【短语】malleable iron (展性铸铁，可锻铸铁), malleable cast iron (可锻铸铁；展性铸铁)
ex: malleable steel
exz: 展性钢

zh: n. 坚决，坚定；决定，决议；决心，解决
en: n. a formal decision or statement agreed on by a group of people, especially after a vote
core: 【短语】high resolution (高分辨；高分辨率), spatial resolution (空间分辨率；空间解析度), dispute resolution ([法律]调解纠纷)
ex: a resolution calling for a ban on dumping nuclear waste
exz: 要求禁止倾倒核废物的决议

en: n. a group of ships, or all the ships in a navy
core: 【记忆】舰队(fleet)遇到问题赶紧逃跑(flee) | 【短语】a fleet of (机群；一队…), fleet management (车队管理；船队管理), fleet street (佛里特街（英国几家报馆办事处所在地）；伦敦报业；伦敦新闻界)
ex: the US seventh fleet
exz: 美国第七舰队

zh: n. 摘要，概要；adj. 概括的；即时的
en: n. a short statement that gives the main information about something, without giving all the details；adj. done immediately, and not following the normal process
core: 【记忆】summ(＝sum 总的) + ary → 摘要， 概要 | 【短语】in summary (总之；概括起来), summary procedure (简易程序；即决裁判程序), summary report (汇总报表；概要报表)
ex: A brief summary is given on a separate sheet.
exz: 摘要另写一页。

zh: n. 反话，冷嘲，讽刺性的事件、情况等
en: n. a situation that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
core: 【记忆】iron(铁) + y → 像铁一样冷冰冰的话 → 反话， 讽刺
ex: Life is full of little ironies.
exz: 生活中充满了小小的讽刺。

zh: n. 透视；透视画法；视角，观点
en: n. a way of thinking about something, especially one which is influenced by the type of person you are or by your experiences
core: 【记忆】per(贯穿) + spect(看) + ive → 贯穿看 → 角度， 方法； 透视法 | 【短语】in perspective (正确地；符合透视法地), new perspective (新观点), historical perspective (历史展望)
ex: the artist’s use of perspective
exz: 那位画家对透视法的运用

zh: adj. 南(北)极的；极端相反的
en: adj. close to or relating to the North Pole or the South Pole
core: 【短语】polar bear (北极熊), polar coordinate (极坐标；极座标；极坐标系统), polar region (极地；近极区域)
ex: As our climate warms up, the polar ice caps will begin to melt.
exz: 随着地球气候逐渐变暖，极地的冰冠将开始融化。

en: n. someone whose job is to look after or help customers in a public place
core: 【短语】flight attendant (空中服务人员), room attendant (客房服务员), train attendant (列车服务员)
ex: a car park attendant
exz: 停车场的服务员

zh: v. 妨碍；n. 障碍，残废
en: v. to make it difficult for someone to do something that they want or need to do；n. if someone has a handicap, a part of their body or their mind has been permanently injured or damaged. Many people think that this word is offensive.
core: 【短语】mental handicap (心理缺陷；心智障碍), physical handicap (身体缺陷；生理缺陷)
ex: The charity is handicapped by lack of funds.
exz: 这个慈善机构因为缺乏资金难以开展工作。

en: adj. someone who is eligible for something is able or allowed to do it, for example because they are the right age
core: 【记忆】e + lig(=lect选择) + ible → 能被选择出来的 → 符合条件的 | 【短语】eligible for (合格；够资格), eligible bidders (合格的投标商), eligible products (合格产品)
ex: Stephen was regarded as an eligible bachelor.
exz: 斯蒂芬被认为是一个钻石王老五。

en: adj. bent, twisted, or not in a straight line
core: 【短语】crooked line (曲线；弯曲测线)
ex: Your tie’s crooked.
exz: 你的领带歪了。

zh: adj. 外交的；外交手腕的
en: adj. relating to or involving the work of diplomats
core: 【短语】diplomatic relations (外交关系), diplomatic ties (外交关系；邦交), diplomatic mission (使馆；外交使团)
ex: Diplomatic efforts to end the fighting began on October 25.
exz: 停战的外交努力于10月25日开始。

en: n&v. a piece of farm equipment used to turn over the earth so that seeds can be planted
core: 【短语】disc plough (圆盘犁)

ex: In an editorial, The New York Times suggests the victory could turn nasty.
exz: 在一篇社论中，《纽约时报》认为该胜利会转成恶梦。

en: n. your family
core: 【短语】of kin (◎有亲戚关系的), next of kin (最近的血亲，最亲的亲戚), kith and kin (朋友和亲属)
ex: We’ll have to notify the next of kin of his death.
exz: 我们得把他去世的消息通知他的直系亲属。

en: v. to compete against someone in order to gain something
core: 【短语】contend with (对付；与…作斗争)
ex: Inevitably, fights break out between the members of contending groups.
exz: 争权夺利的几个团体之间不可避免地发生了打斗。

en: n. the action of separating a country into two or more independent countries
core: 【短语】partition wall (隔断（墙），间隔墙), partition off (分隔成；隔开), partition coefficient (分配系数（等于distribution coefficient）)
ex: ...fighting which followed the partition of India.
exz: …印度分裂后的争斗。

en: n. if there is an outbreak of fighting or disease in an area, it suddenly starts to happen
ex: a cholera outbreak
exz: 霍乱的爆发

zh: adj. 有权威的；命令的；可靠的
en: adj. an authoritative book, account etc is respected because the person who wrote it knows a lot about the subject
core: 【短语】authoritative information (官方消息), authoritative source (权威人士；权威来源)
ex: the most authoritative work on English surnames
exz: 有关英语姓氏的最权威著作

zh: adj. 表面光滑的，(人)不老实的，不可靠的
en: adj. something that is slippery is difficult to hold, walk on etc because it is wet or  greasy
core: 【记忆】slipp(=slip滑) + ery → 滑的 | 【短语】slippery slope (n. 灾难性的急剧下滑), slippery road (滑路), slippery elm (榆树)
ex: In places, the path can be wet and slippery.
exz: 路上有些地方可能又湿又滑。

en: n. something that you hope to achieve in the future
core: 【短语】ultimate goal (最终目标；终极目标), strategic goal (战略目标), common goal (共同目标)
ex: Your goal as a parent is to help your child become an independent adult.
exz: 身为父母，你的目标就是要培养孩子成为独立的成年人。

en: v. to do something better than someone else or be more successful
ex: We outstripped all our competitors in sales last year.
exz: 去年我们的销售额超过了所有竞争对手。

en: adj. happening or coming before the time, place, or part mentioned
core: 【记忆】pre(在…前面) + ced(走) + e → 走在前面 → 先于
ex: As we saw in the preceding chapter, groups can be powerful agents of socialization.
exz: 如我们在前一章所见，团组可以是社会化的有力动因。

en: v. to completely change the appearance, form, or character of something or someone, especially in a way that improves it
core: 【记忆】trans(越过； 交叉) + form(形状) → 使形状交叉 → 使改观 | 【短语】fourier transform (傅里叶变换), fast fourier transform (快速傅里叶变换), transform into (转变成)
ex: Increased population has transformed the landscape.
exz: 人口的增加使景观发生了变化。

zh: v. 浏览，略读；掠过，抹去
en: v. to remove something from the surface of a liquid, especially floating fat, solids, or oil
core: 【记忆】一眼掠过(skim)， 只见皮(skin)毛 | 【短语】skim milk (脱脂牛奶), skim through (v. 浏览；掠过；滑过), skim over (v. 掠过，滑过；浏览)
ex: Julie skimmed the sports page.
exz: 朱莉浏览了体育版。

en: v. to buy insurance so that you will receive money if something bad happens to you, your family, your possessions etc
core: 【短语】insure against (v. 给……保险以防)
ex: Have you insured the contents of your home?
exz: 你给家庭财产投保了吗？

en: n. the pieces of something that are left after it has been destroyed in an accident, explosion etc
core: 【记忆】“堆玻璃” → 一堆碎玻璃 → 碎屑， 残骸 | 【短语】debris flow (泥石流), wear debris (磨屑；磨损产物), rock debris (岩屑)
ex: She was hit by flying debris from the blast.
exz: 她被爆炸产生的飞散碎片击中。

en: n. a half of the Earth, especially one of the halves above and below the  equator
core: 【记忆】hemi(半) + spher(球) + e → 半球 | 【短语】northern hemisphere (北半球), southern hemisphere (南半球), western hemisphere (西半球)
ex: the Northern hemisphere
exz: 北半球

en: adj. Someone or something that is dominant is more powerful, successful, influential, or noticeable than other people or things
core: 【记忆】domin(统治) + ant → 统治的 | 【短语】dominant role (主要角色), dominant effect (显性效应；显性效果), diagonally dominant (对角占优；对角优势的)
ex: ...a change which would maintain his party's dominant position in Scotland.
exz: …巩固他的政党在苏格兰支配地位的一场变革。

en: n. a word that means the opposite of another word
ex: a dictionary of synonyms and antonyms
exz: 同义词和反义词词典

en: v. to appear or come out from somewhere
core: 【记忆】e(出) + merg(浸没) + e → 从浸没物之中出来 → 显露 | 【短语】emerge from (自…出现；从…显露出来), emerge in endlessly (层出不穷)
ex: The flowers emerge in the spring.
exz: 花儿在春天开放。

en: vt&vi. to press something firmly together with your fingers or hand
core: 【记忆】s + quee(看作queen， 女王) + ze → 想与女王握手的人很多 → 挤入， 挤过 | 【短语】squeeze casting (模压铸造，压挤铸造), squeeze out (挤出；榨出；排出), credit squeeze (贷款紧缩，银根紧缩)
ex: She smiled as he squeezed her hand.
exz: 他捏了捏她的手，她笑了。

zh: n. 细微的区别及差异
en: n. a small detail or point of difference, especially one that is usually considered to be part of the correct way of doing something
core: 【短语】to a nicety (恰到好处地；精确地)
ex: social niceties
exz: 社交上的细节

en: n. the character played by an actor in a play or film
core: 【短语】role of (……的角色), play an important role (起到重要作用), leading role (主导作用；主导地位)
ex: She has just landed the lead role in their latest production.
exz: 她刚在他们最新的作品中取得了主角。

en: v. to make someone remember something that they must do
core: 【记忆】re(又， 再) + mind(注意) → 使再次注意 → 提醒 | 【短语】remind of (提醒；使记起；使回想起), that reminds me ([用来转换话题]我想起来了)
ex: Yes, I’ll be there. Thanks for reminding me.
exz: 是的，我会去那里的。 谢谢提醒。

zh: vt&n. 拷打，折磨，使受剧烈痛苦
en: vt&n. an act of deliberately hurting someone in order to force them to tell you something, to punish them, or to be cruel
ex: He died after five days of excruciating torture.
exz: 遭受了五天的严刑拷打之后，他死了。

en: v. if a gas condenses, or is condensed, it becomes a liquid
core: 【记忆】con + dense(密集的) → 变得密集的 → (使)压缩 | 【短语】condense into (把…缩短；把…压缩)
ex: the mist which condensed on every cold surface
exz: 每个冰冷的表面上凝结的水汽

zh: adv. 专门地，排除其他地
en: adv. Exclusively is used to refer to situations or activities that involve only the thing or things mentioned, and nothing else
ex: ...an exclusively male domain.
exz: …一个由男性独占的领域。

zh: adj. 构成整体所必需的，完整的
en: adj. forming a necessary part of something
core: 【记忆】in(不) + tegr(触摸) + al → 未被触摸的 → 完整的， 完备的 | 【短语】integral part (积分部分；整数部份；主要的部分), integral equation (积分方程), integral method (积分法)
ex: Vegetables are an integral part of our diet.
exz: 蔬菜是我们膳食中不可缺少的一部分。

zh: n&a. 标专，记号；象征性的
en: n&a. something that represents a feeling, fact, event etc
core: 【短语】by the same token (同样地；出于同样原因), as a token of (作为…的标志), token ring (令牌环（一个环状的区域网路）)
ex: After normalization of attributes, you can count on every token in an attribute being separated from its neighbors by whitespace.
exz: 在属性规范化后，可以依靠的属性中的每个记号是通过空白来与其邻居区分开来。

zh: v. 转变，移动；n. 位置转移，性格转变；轮班
en: v. to change a situation, discussion etc by giving special attention to one idea or subject instead of to a previous one；n. a change in the way people think about something, in the way something is done etc
core: 【记忆】电脑键盘上的切换键即Shift键 | 【短语】phase shift (相移), frequency shift (频移), night shift (夜班；夜班工人)
ex: He stopped, shifting his cane to his left hand.
exz: 他停下来，把手杖移到左手。

en: n. the system of charging taxes
core: 【短语】double taxation ([经]双重征税；[经]重复课税), taxation law (税法；税收法), avoidance of double taxation (避免双重课税)
ex: the government’s economic and taxation policy
exz: 政府的经济和税收政策

en: vt&n. to pull a vehicle or ship along behind another vehicle, using a rope or chain
core: 【短语】in tow (拖着；在一起), tow truck (n. 拖车；牵引车), on tow ((车辆等)被拖(带)着)
ex: The ship had to be towed into the harbor.
exz: 那艘轮船不得不被拖进港口。

en: adj. someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
core: 【短语】reliable quality (质量可靠), reliable data (可靠数据), reliable information (可靠的信息)
ex: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable
exz: 既便宜又可靠的避孕方法

en: adj. a deft movement is skilful, and often quick
ex: He sketched her with quick, deft strokes.
exz: 他给她画素描，下笔又快又熟练。

en: n. A potion is a drink that contains medicine, poison, or something that is supposed to have magic powers
ex: ...a magic potion that will make Siegfried forget Brunnhilde and fall in love with Gutrune.
exz: …一种会使齐格弗里德忘掉布伦希德尔德而爱上古特鲁内娜的魔剂。

en: n&vt. the state of being untidy or not organized
ex: The nation is in disarray following rioting led by the military.
exz: 该国发生由军队发动的暴乱后，陷入一片混乱。

zh: adj. 包括一切的，全部的；n. 罩衫，工装裤
en: adj. considering or including everything；n. a loose-fitting piece of clothing like a coat, that is worn over clothes to protect them
core: 【记忆】over(从头到尾) + all(所有的) → 全面的； 全部的 | 【短语】overall situation (大局；总体形势), overall quality (综合质量；总的质量), overall development (综合开发)
ex: The overall cost of the exhibition was £400,000.
exz: 展览会的全部费用是40万英镑。

en: n. something such as useful land, or minerals such as oil or coal, that exists in a country and can be used to increase its wealth
core: 【记忆】re(再， 又) + source(源泉) → 可再用的源泉 → 资源 | 【短语】human resource (人的资源), resource management (资源管理), water resource (水资源)
ex: Canada’s vast mineral resources
exz: 加拿大丰富的矿产资源

en: n. a group of animals or plants whose members are similar and can breed together to produce young animals or plants
core: 【记忆】科学家从一些生物物种(species)中选取好的制成标本(specimen) | 【短语】species diversity (物种多样性；歧异度), species composition (物种组成；种类成分), species richness (物种丰富度；种繁富度)
ex: Seven species of birds of prey have been observed.
exz: 已有七种猛禽被观察到。

zh: n. 月台，站台；讲台；(政党的)政纲，党纲
en: n. the raised place beside a railway track where you get on and off a train in a station
core: 【记忆】plat(平的) + form(形态) → 形状是平的 → 平台 | 【短语】service platform (工作台；操作平台), offshore platform (海上平台；近海平台), open platform (开放平台)
ex: The Edinburgh train will depart from platform six.
exz: 开往爱丁堡的火车将从六号站台发车。

zh: adj. 弹性的，有伸缩性的；n. 橡皮圈
en: adj. a material that is elastic can stretch and then go back to its usual length or size
core: 【记忆】e(出) + last(延长) + ic(形容词后缀) → 可延长的 → 有弹性的； 灵活的 | 【短语】elastic modulus ([机]弹性系数；弹性模数), elastic deformation (弹性形变), elastic wave (弹性波)
ex: the horny elastic pad in a horse’s hoof
exz: 马蹄上粗硬而有弹性的肉掌

en: n. the period of time that someone rents a house, land etc
core: 【短语】tenancy agreement (租约), joint tenancy (联权共有；共同租借权)
ex: a six-month tenancy
exz: 六个月的租赁期

zh: adj. 最小的；最低限度的
en: adj. very small in degree or amount, especially the smallest degree or amount possible
core: 【记忆】min(小) + imal → 最小的
ex: The storm caused only minimal damage.
exz: 暴风雨只造成了轻微破坏。

zh: adj. 不可避免的，照例必有的
en: adj. certain to happen and impossible to avoid
core: 【记忆】in(不) + evitable(可避免的) → 不可避免的
ex: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable.
exz: 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

en: v. to disagree with something, especially by saying that the opposite is true
core: 【记忆】contra(反) + dict(说话； 断言) → 说反话 → 反驳 | 【短语】contradict oneself (自相矛盾)
ex: Deborah opened her mouth to contradict, but closed it again.
exz: 黛博拉张口想要反驳，但又把嘴闭上了。

en: n. money that is paid by a government or organization to make prices lower, reduce the cost of producing goods etc
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + sid(坐) + y → 在台下就坐领津贴 → 津贴， 补助金 | 【短语】government subsidy (政府补助金，政府补贴), export subsidy (出口补贴)
ex: European farmers are planning a massive demonstration against farm subsidy cuts.
exz: 欧洲的农场主们正在策划一场反对削减农场补贴的大游行。

zh: vi&n. 熊熊燃烧，突然燃烧，火光；v&n. 张开
en: vi&n. to suddenly begin to burn, or to burn more brightly for a short time；v&n. if a person or animal flares their  nostril s (= the openings at the end of the nose )  , or if their nostrils flare, their nostrils become wider because they are angry
core: 【短语】flare up (突然发怒；突然燃烧，骤然), solar flare (太阳耀斑；[天]日晕), lens flare (镜头光晕；透镜光晕；镜头光斑；眩光)
ex: The fire flared up again.
exz: 火又忽地旺了起来。

zh: v. 消化；领会，融会贯通；n. 文摘，摘要
en: v. to change food that you have just eaten into substances that your body can use；n. a short piece of writing that gives the most important facts from a book, report etc
core: 【记忆】di(分开) + gest(搬运) → 运来食物， 接着分解 → 消化
ex: Most babies can digest a wide range of food easily.
exz: 大多数婴儿能轻易地消化很多种食物。

en: n&v. a loud unpleasant noise that continues for a long time
core: 【短语】din rail (符合德国工业标准的导轨)
ex: They tried to make themselves heard over the din of the crowd.
exz: 他们竭力让自己的声音盖过人群的喧闹声。

en: n. a large group of fish swimming together
ex: Among them swam shoals of fish.
exz: 在他们之中游动着一群群鱼儿。

en: adj. done in a hurry, especially with bad results
core: 【记忆】hast(看作fast， 快的) + y → 快速完成的 → 匆忙的
ex: He soon regretted his hasty decision.
exz: 他很快就对自己仓促作出的决定感到后悔了。

zh: v. 使绝缘，使绝热，隔离
en: v. to cover or protect something with a material that stops electricity, sound, heat etc from getting in or out
core: 【记忆】insul(岛) + ate(使…) → 使成为孤岛 → 隔离； 使隔绝
ex: an insulated attic
exz: 隔热[隔音]的阁楼

en: n. a country or area that is under the political control of a more powerful country, usually one that is far away
core: 【记忆】col(耕种) + on + y(表场所， 名词后缀) → 在某处耕种 → 将那里变为自己的殖民地 → 殖民地 | 【短语】bacterial colony (n. （细菌）菌落；细菌聚落), colony formation (群体形成；集落形成), crown colony (英国直辖殖民地)
ex: Algeria was formerly a French colony.
exz: 阿尔及利亚以前是法国的殖民地。

en: vi&vt. to be sorry for something and wish you had not done it – used especially when considering your actions in a religious way
core: 【短语】repent of (v. 后悔)
ex: Those who refuse to repent, he said, will be punished.
exz: 他说，那些不肯悔悟的人将受到惩罚。

en: n. an idea or opinion that is wrong, especially about yourself
core: 【记忆】il(不， 无) + lus(看作lust， 光) + ion(名词后缀)→ 看到根本没有的光 → 幻觉， 假象 | 【短语】optical illusion (视错觉，错视；光幻觉), visual illusion (视觉错误)
ex: She was under no illusion that he loved her.
exz: 她不再幻想他爱她了。

en: n. the process of arranging to join a school, university, course etc
core: 【记忆】enrol(登记； 入学) + ment → 登记； 入学
ex: Enrolment will take place in September.
exz: 注册将于9月进行。

en: n. a situation in which everything is happening in a confused way and nothing is organized or arranged in order
core: 【记忆】chao(拼音“吵”) + s(音似： 死) → 吵死啦！ → 混乱 | 【短语】in chaos (混乱；纷乱), chaos theory (混沌理论), chaos and confusion (混乱与浑沌)
ex: The country was plunged into economic chaos.
exz: 这个国家陷入了经济大混乱。

zh: v. 消瘦，衰弱；n. 松树
en: n. a tall tree with long hard sharp leaves that do not fall off in winter
core: 【记忆】松树(pine)的叶子像根针(pin) | 【短语】pine tree (松树), korean pine (红松；海松), pine wood (松木)
ex: an ancient pine forest
exz: 一片古老的松树林

ex: There are no rules about when to transfuse and who to do it to.
exz: 从来没有相关规定，在什么时候什么人应该被输血。

zh: adj. 喜剧的，滑稽的n连环漫画杂志；喜剧演员
en: adj. amusing you and making you want to laugh
core: 【短语】comic book (连环漫画册), comic strip (连载漫画；四格漫画), comic relief (n. 喜剧性穿插；喜剧性调剂)
ex: a comic novel
exz: 滑稽小说

en: adj. an infectious illness can be passed from one person to another, especially through the air you breathe
core: 【短语】infectious disease (传染病), infectious mononucleosis (传染性单核细胞增多), infectious disease hospital (传染病院)
ex: infectious diseases
exz: 传染性疾病

zh: adj. 有倾向的；可能遭受的；有责任的
en: adj. legally responsible for the cost of something
core: 【短语】liable for (adj. 对……有责任), liable to tax (应纳税；应课税)
ex: The car is liable to overheat on long trips.
exz: 这辆汽车跑长途容易过热。

en: adj. made up of different parts or materials
core: 【短语】composite material (复合材料), composite structure (组合结构；复合机构；混合结构), composite index (复合指标；财经综合指数)
ex: The author builds up a useful compo-site picture of contemporary consumer culture.
exz: 作者勾勒出了一幅实用的当代消费文化全景图。

en: n. hair that grows on a man’s upper lip
ex: He’s shaved off his moustache.
exz: 他剃去了小胡子。

core: 【短语】acquaint with (熟悉；使认识，使了解)
ex: I need to acquaint myself with the new regulations.
exz: 我得熟悉一下新的规章制度。

ex: A vacant plot of land adjoins his house.
exz: 有一块空地紧挨着他家。

zh: n. 球，球面；天体；(兴趣,活动,势力等)范围 "
en: n. a ball shape
core: 【记忆】spher(球) + e  → 球(体)
ex: Because the earth spins, it is not a perfect sphere.
exz: 因为地球旋转，所以它不是个完完全全的球体。

en: n. a short story based on your personal experience
core: 【记忆】a + nec(看作neck， 脖子) + dote(溺爱) → 一个人伸着脖子听喜爱的趣闻、 轶事 → 趣闻， 轶事
ex: The book is full of amusing anecdotes about his life in Japan.
exz: 这本书里全是他在日本生活的趣闻轶事。

zh: n. 分隔间；火车车厢的分隔间
en: n. a smaller enclosed space inside something larger
core: 【短语】compartment syndrome (筋膜室综合征；间室症候群), passenger compartment (乘客舱；客厢；包房), engine compartment (机舱；发动机室；机器间)
ex: The bag is divided into separate compartments .
exz: 这个包有一些独立的隔层。

zh: adj. 耐用的；n. 耐用品
en: adj. staying in good condition for a long time, even if used a lot
core: 【记忆】dur(持续) + able(可…的) → 耐久的； 耐用的 | 【短语】durable goods (耐用品), durable press (耐久压烫), durable material (耐久物料；耐用材料)
ex: Wood is a durable material.
exz: 木头是耐用材料。

en: v&n. Growl is also a noun
ex: Their noise modulated to a concerted menacing growl punctuated by sharp yaps.
exz: 它们的喧闹声逐渐变为整齐划一的、带有威胁性的吼叫，还夹杂着刺耳的狂吠。

en: v. to give a plan, piece of writing etc to someone in authority for them to consider or approve
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + mit(放) → 放在下面 → 屈从； 提交 | 【短语】submit registration (提交登记表；提交注册), submit applications (提交申请)
ex: In desperation, Mrs. Jones submitted to an operation on her right knee to relieve the pain.
exz: 绝望中，琼斯夫人不得已接受了一次她右膝的手术以减轻疼痛。

en: adj. behaving in an unpleasant or rude way because you think you are more important than other people
ex: He was unbearably arrogant.
exz: 他的傲慢让人无法忍受。

en: v. to treat someone cruelly or unfairly over a period of time, especially because of their religious or political beliefs
ex: The Puritans left England to escape being persecuted.
exz: 清教徒离开了英国以躲避迫害。

en: n. a long narrow hole in a surface, that you can put something into
core: 【短语】time slot (时间空档；（电视或广播电台的）播放时段), slot machine (自动售贷机), slot antenna (缝隙天线；槽孔天线)
ex: Alan dropped another quarter into the slot on the pay phone.
exz: 艾伦往付费电话的投币口里又塞了一枚 25 分的硬币。

en: n. the way you use to enter a building or reach a place
core: 【记忆】ac + cess(走) → 走进去 → 进入 | 【短语】access control (访问控制), have access to (使用；接近；可以利用), internet access (互联网接入)
ex: Access is by means of a small door on the right.
exz: 入口是右边的一扇小门。

en: adj. relating to the Earth rather than to the moon or other  planets
core: 【记忆】terr(地) + estr + ial → 陆地的， 陆生的 | 【短语】terrestrial ecosystem (陆地生态系统), terrestrial heat (地热), terrestrial stress (地应力)
ex: ...terrestrial life forms.
exz: …地球上的生命形态。

en: n. a round hole in the ground made by something that has fallen on it or by an explosion
core: 【短语】crater lake (n. 火山口形成的深湖), explosion crater (爆裂火口；爆破漏斗)
ex: craters on the moon’s surface
exz: 月球表面的坑

zh: v. 指控；控告；冲锋；要价；充电
en: v. to state officially that someone may be guilty of a crime
core: 【短语】in charge (负责，主管；在…看管下), in charge of (负责；主管), charge of (负责；管理)
ex: Even local nurseries charge $150 a week.
exz: 即便当地的托儿所每周也要收$150的费用。

en: n&vt. to feed and take care of a child or a plant while it is growing
core: 【记忆】大自然(nature)滋养(nurture)着人类 | 【短语】nature and nurture (先天与后天，遗传与环境；先天遗传说和后天培养说)
ex: plants nurtured in the greenhouse
exz: 在温室里培育的植物

zh: v&n. 溅水，泼水；显示，鼓吹
en: v&n. If you splash around or splash about in water, you hit or disturb the water in a noisy way, causing some of it to fly up into the air
core: 【短语】splash zone (浪溅区，飞溅区；干湿交替段), splash into (溅入；滴入), make a splash (引起轰动；发出溅泼声)
ex: A lot of people were in the water, swimming or simply splashing about.
exz: 很多人在水里游泳或者只是戏水。

zh: adj. 谦让的，适度的；有礼貌的
