ex: They had spent the night at a modest hotel.

zh: n. 灵感，鼓舞人心的人或事，好主意
en: n. a good idea about what you should do, write, say etc, especially one which you get suddenly
core: 【记忆】in(进入) + spir(呼吸) + ation → 吸入灵气 → 灵感
ex: The Malvern Hills have provided inspiration for many artists and musicians over the decades.
exz: 几十年来，莫尔文丘陵为很多艺术家和音乐家提供了灵感。

en: adv. used when saying that something is almost certain to happen or be true
ex: Doubtless there would be lots of rumours.

en: n. someone’s version of an event is their description of it, when this is different from the description given by another person
core: 【记忆】vers(转) + ion → 从原文转化而来 → 译本 | 【短语】english version (英文版本；英译本), latest version (最新版本), original version (原始著作，原始版本)
ex: Could Donna’s version of what happened that night be correct?
exz: 唐娜对那晚发生的事情的描述是否正确呢？

zh: adj. 懈怠的；萧条的；呆滞的；松驰的；不紧的
en: adj. hanging loosely, or not pulled tight

zh: v. 洪水退落；土地下沉；建筑物沉降

en: n. something, especially money, that you give to a person or an organ-ization in order to help them
core: 【记忆】don(给予) + ation → 免费给予 → 捐赠 | 【短语】blood donation (献血；捐血；供血), charitable donation (慈善捐款)

en: v&n. to give you a particular physical feeling, especially when you touch or hold something
core: 【短语】feel oneself (镇定；感觉很好；觉得身体正常), feel like (想要；感到好似), feel free (随便，轻松)
ex: It’s nice fabric - it feels like velvet.
exz: 面料不错——摸上去像丝绒。

zh: n. 海上掠夺；侵犯版权
core: 【短语】software piracy (软件盗版)

en: n. the usual or normal situation, way of doing something etc

exz: 乔伊斯的写作风格与传统的文学风格大相径庭。

zh: v. 踩，践踏；蔑视，粗暴对待

core: 【短语】trample on (v. 践踏；蹂躏), trample down (践踏)

zh: n. 敬意，赞扬；问候；v. 恭维；称赞
en: n. used by a person or company when they send or give something to you；v. to say something nice to someone in order to praise them
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + pli(满， 填满) + ment(名词后缀) → 一起满足某人的愿望 → 赞美 | 【短语】compliment someone on (称赞某人的…), left-handed compliment (言不由衷(或挖苦人)的恭维话)

zh: adj. 真正的，名副其实的

core: 【记忆】gen(出生， 产生) + uine → 生来就有的 → 真正的 | 【短语】genuine leather (真皮), genuine gold (纯金，赤金), genuine diamond (真钻石的)
ex: ‘Did he really?’ Her surprise seemed genuine.
exz: “他真的这样？”她好像是真的惊讶。

zh: adj. 颜色鲜艳的;奇特的n&v想象力,设想,爱好

ex: Harry took me to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.
exz: 哈里带我去了一家豪华餐厅，庆祝我们的结婚纪念日。

en: v. to increase the value, amount, effectiveness etc of something

zh: adj. 漂亮的；聪明的；轻快的

core: 【短语】smart card (智能卡), smart phone (智能电话), little smart (小灵通（中国网通和中国电信联合推出的移动通信产品）)

en: adj. clothes, colours etc that are gaudy are too bright and look cheap – used to show disapproval

en: v. to form a general principle or opinion after considering only a small number of facts or examples

en: n. someone whose job is making and repairing wooden objects

en: adj. a feeling, belief, or statement that is sincere is honest and true, and based on what you really feel and believe
core: 【记忆】sin(罪) + cere → 把罪过一一坦白， 态度真诚 → 真诚的 | 【短语】sincere desire (诚心诚意)

en: vi&n. a light that is not very bright

exz: 微弱的闪光

en: n. a part of a cell in a living thing that controls what it looks like, how it grows, and how it develops. People get their genes from their parents

exz: 人类基因

zh: adj. 破坏性的，毁灭性的

exz: 如果工厂关闭，对该镇来说将是沉重的打击。

en: v&n. an official order or decision, especially one made by the ruler of a country

exz: 皇帝下诏令取消了军事管制。

en: n. a lake, especially an artificial one, where water is stored before it is supplied to people’s houses
core: 【短语】gas reservoir (气藏；气田；煤气存储器；天然气储层), oil reservoir (油箱；储油器), reservoir engineering (油藏工程)

exz: 所有这些地震都发生在紫坪铺水库水位很低的时候。

en: v. To jeopardize a situation or activity means to do something that may destroy it or cause it to fail

exz: 他损害了他的前程。

ex: Sterilize the bottles with boiling water.

core: 【短语】break the deadlock (打破僵局)
ex: The talks have reached a complete deadlock .
exz: 会谈完全陷入僵局。

zh: n. 圣歌，赞美诗；v. 唱，歌颂

core: 【短语】gregorian chant (格列高利圣咏（教皇格列高利一世采用，常无伴奏）)
ex: ...a Gregorian chant.
exz: …一首格列高利圣歌。

core: 【短语】rupture strength (抗裂强度；断裂强度), creep rupture (蠕变断裂), rupture of membranes (胎膜破裂；羊水破裂)
ex: The pipe will rupture at its weakest point.
exz: 管道最薄弱的地方会破裂的。

zh: n. 宗教仪式，典礼；仪式的程序；adj. 仪式的
en: n. a ceremony that is always performed in the same way, in order to mark an important religious or social occasion；adj. done as part of a rite or ritual
core: 【记忆】rit(e)(典礼， 仪式) + ual → 典礼， 仪式 | 【短语】ritual dance (仪式之舞；祭祀之舞)
ex: ancient pagan rituals
exz: 古老的异教仪式

zh: n. 散页的印刷品，传单
en: n. a small book or piece of paper advertising something or giving information on a particular subject
core: 【记忆】leaf(树叶) + let(表小东西) → 大街上的传单如落叶般铺天盖地 → 传单
ex: Campaigners handed out leaflets on passive smoking.
exz: 发起人分发了关于被动吸烟的传单。

en: adj. happening or coming after something else
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + sequ(跟随) + ent → 继…之后的， 随后的 | 【短语】subsequent events (财务报表编制后发生的事项), subsequent handling (后续工序)

exz: 这些技能代代相传。

en: n. the science or practice of flying in aircraft
core: 【记忆】avi(鸟) + at + ion(名词后缀) → 像鸟一样飞 → 航空， 飞行 | 【短语】civil aviation (民用航空), aviation industry (航空工业；飞机制造业), aviation safety (航空安全，飞行安全)
ex: ...the aviation industry.
exz: …航空工业。

en: n. the crime of deceiving people in order to gain something such as money or goods
core: 【记忆】“富饶的” → 骗子愿意去富饶的地区骗人 → 骗子 | 【短语】accounting fraud (假帐；做假账), click fraud (点击欺诈), credit fraud (信用欺诈)
ex: {"COLLOINEXA":["electoral fraud"]}
exz: 选举欺诈

zh: adj. 最初的；n. 人名的首字母；v. 签名首字母于
en: adj. happening at the beginning；n. the first letter of someone’s first name；v. to write your initials on a document to make it official or to show that you agree with something
core: 【记忆】in(向里) + it(走) + ial → 开始的 | 【短语】initial stage (原始期), initial value (初始值；原始价值；基础资料), initial period (初始期)
ex: an initial investment of £5,000
exz: 5,000英镑的初始投资

en: v. to remove writing from paper
ex: Some of the names had been accidentally erased.
exz: 有几个名字无意中被擦掉了。

en: adv. quickly and easily
core: 【短语】readily accessible (易接近的；易达到的；可存取的)
ex: Boats are readily available to visitors.
exz: 游客可以很方便地租到船只。

en: n. an arm or leg
core: 【记忆】多喝点维C饮科， 手臂(limb)有力就能爬(climb)上高山了 | 【短语】lower limb ([医]下肢；腿), out on a limb (孤立无援；处于危险的境地), upper limb (上肢；上翼；上边缘)
ex: She would be able to stretch out her cramped limbs and rest for a few hours.
exz: 她将可以伸开蜷缩的四肢，休息几个小时。

en: n. a small plant with green leaves that have a fresh smell and taste and are used in cooking
core: 【短语】mint condition (崭新的), mint julep (（美）薄荷朱利酒), in mint condition (adj. 崭新的；完全的)
ex: new potatoes sprinkled with chopped mint
exz: 撒上薄荷屑的嫩马铃薯

zh: n. 球场；声音的高低度；沥青；程度v投掷
en: n. a marked out area of ground on which a sport is played
core: 【短语】pitch in (投入；作出贡献), tar pitch (焦油沥青), coal tar pitch (沥青；煤焦油沥青；硬煤沥青)
ex: He ran the length of the pitch and scored.
exz: 他跑过全场，得分了。

zh: n. 柜台；v. 反对，反击
en: n. the place where you pay or are served in a shop, bank, restaurant etc；v. to say something in order to try to prove that what someone said was not true or as a reply to something
core: 【记忆】与count(v. 计算)一起记 | 【短语】counter measure (对策；防范措施；反措施), particle counter (粒子计数器；粒子计数管；颗粒测量计数器), over the counter (成药；直接交易)

exz: 他在想柜台后面的那个女孩是否认出了他。

zh: v. 奉献，供奉，题献(著作)
en: v. to say at the beginning of a book or film, or before a piece of music, that it has been written, made, or performed for someone that you love or respect
core: 【记忆】de(表加强) + dic(分配， 分派) + ate(动词后缀) → 为…献出 → 献(身)

exz: 她把她的第一张唱片献给伍迪·艾伦，她说艾伦理解她的痴迷。

en: v. to prove that someone or something is right or true
ex: The decision to advertise has been vindicated by the fact that sales have grown.
exz: 销售增长的事实证明做广告宣传的决定是正确的。

zh: adj. 当前的；通用的；流行的；n. 水流；气流
en: adj. happening or existing now；n. a continuous movement of water in a river, lake, or sea
core: 【短语】current situation (现状，目前形势；现况), current status (当前状态；目前状况), current state (现行状态；初速电流状态)

exz: 现任总统

en: v. to show your money, success, beauty etc so that other people notice it – used to show disapproval
ex: The rich flaunted their wealth while the poor starved on the streets.
exz: 富人摆阔，穷人却在大街上饿肚子。

en: n. the group of people who are elected to make a country’s laws and discuss important national affairs

zh: adj. 沉重的，笨重的；(文章)冗长的
en: adj. Ponderous writing or speech is very serious, uses more words than necessary, and is dull
ex: He had a dense, ponderous style.
exz: 他的风格是词藻堆砌、冗长沉闷。

core: 【记忆】de(向下) + grade(级别) → 降低级别 → 降级
ex: a movie that degrades women
exz: 贬损女性的影片

core: 【记忆】con(表加强) + firm(坚固的) → 使更加坚固 → 证实； 肯定 | 【短语】confirm in (v. 使更坚定)
ex: X-rays have confirmed that he has not broken any bones.
exz: X光片已经证实他没有骨折。

zh: n. 解剖刀，(外科用)小刀
en: n. a small, very sharp knife that is used by doctors in operations
ex: I pointed with my scalpel to the chest cavity, where nothing but a black lump of coal squatted in the lipstick-red center.
exz: 我用解剖刀指着她的胸腔，那里只有一团黑乎乎的煤块，伏在唇膏般红色的胸腔中部。

zh: n. 肤色；情况；局面；气质
en: n. the natural colour or appearance of the skin on your face
core: 【短语】sallow complexion (面色萎黄)
ex: Drinking water is good for the complexion.
exz: 喝水让气色变好。

zh: a&n. 被遗弃的；被遗弃者，被逐出者
en: a&n. someone who is not accepted by the people they live among, or who has been forced out of their home
ex: Smokers often feel as though they are being treated as social outcasts.
exz: 吸烟者常常觉得自己遭到社会排斥。

en: adj. existing or arranged before something else or before the present situation
core: 【记忆】pri(第一) + or → 排在第一的 → 在前的， 优先的 | 【短语】prior notice (事先通知；预先通报), prior art (先前技术), prior approval (事先批准；预先审批；事前批准；事前许可；预先核准)
ex: You do not need any prior knowledge of the subject.
exz: 你无需事先具备该方面的知识。

en: n. a small raised red spot on your skin, especially on your face
ex: Belushi imitates a giant pimple by squeezing his cheeks and spewing chewed food out of his mouth.
exz: 我们在等候某个毕业生领文凭的同时，可以欣赏像《动物屋》这样与学校有关的经典电影的片断：约翰-贝鲁西模仿一个脸上长满丘疹的巨人，双手挤着脸，从嘴里喷出嚼过的东西。

en: n. the crime of stealing
core: 【短语】identity theft (身份盗窃，身份盗用), guard against theft (防盗), grand theft (重偷窃罪)
ex: Car theft is on the increase.
exz: 汽车盗窃案在上升。

zh: v. 组成，构成；创作；排字；使安静
en: v. to write a piece of music
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + pos(放) + e → 放到一起 → 组成， 构成 | 【短语】compose oneself (镇静), compose of (由…组成)
ex: Barrington has composed the music for a new production of ‘A Midsummer Night’s Dream’.
exz: 巴林顿为新版的《仲夏夜之梦》谱了曲。

zh: v. 传染，受影响，受感染
en: v. to give someone a disease
ex: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
exz: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

en: n. the quality of being symmetrical
core: 【短语】axial symmetry (轴对称性), rotational symmetry (旋转对称；轴对称), symmetry axis (对称轴)
ex: ...the incredible beauty and symmetry of a snowflake.
exz: …雪花令人难以置信的美丽和对称。

zh: adj. 意义深长的；重要的
en: adj. having an important effect or influence, especially on what will happen in the future
core: 【记忆】来自signify(v. 有重要性)； sign(标记) + ify(使…) → 重点部分标上记号 → 有重要性 | 【短语】significant difference (显著性差异), significant change (显著变化；有效变化量), statistically significant (统计上显著的)
ex: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
exz: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

en: n. the system or type of money that a country uses
core: 【短语】foreign currency (n. 外币), reserve currency (储备货币), currency exchange (货币兑换；外汇兑换)
ex: The bank can supply you with foreign currency .
exz: 这家银行能为你提供外币。

en: n. if an event is a prelude to a more important event, it happens just before it and makes people expect it
ex: Living together as a prelude to marriage is now considered acceptable in many countries.
exz: 婚前同居如今在许多国家都已被接受。

en: n. a very violent tropical storm
core: 【记忆】“台风”
ex: The football match have to stand over next week for the typhoon storm.
exz: 由于台风风暴，这场足球赛延期到下个星期举行。

en: v. to treat a person or group differently from another in an unfair way
core: 【记忆】dis(分开) + crimin(分开) + ate → 分开对待 → 区别； 歧视 | 【短语】discriminate against (歧视；排斥)
ex: He is incapable of discriminating between a good idea and a terrible one.
exz: 他没能力在一个好主意和一个坏主意之间进行区分。

en: n. a disadvantage of a situation, plan, product etc
core: 【记忆】draw(拉) + back(向后) → 拖后腿 → 缺点； 不利条件
ex: It’s a great city – the only drawback is the weather.
exz: 这是座很不错的城市，唯一的不足就是天气。

zh: adj. 空的；未被占用的；空虚的，无表情的
en: adj. a vacant seat, building, room or piece of land is empty and available for someone to use
core: 【记忆】vac(空) + ant(形容词后缀) → 未占用的 | 【短语】vacant space (空舱位；未用空间), vacant room (空房), vacant position (职位空缺；空座)
ex: Only a few apartments were still vacant.
exz: 只有几套公寓仍然空着。

en: n&v. Tracks are marks left in the ground by the feet of animals or people
core: 【短语】track and field (田径；田径赛), on track (走上正轨), keep track (通晓事态，注意动向)
ex: The only evidence of pandas was their tracks in the snow.
exz: 有熊猫活动的惟一证据就是它们在雪中的足迹。

zh: n. 人类能力的高度发展，文化，教养，文明
en: n. the beliefs, way of life, art, and customs that are shared and accepted by people in a particular society
core: 【短语】traditional culture (传统文化), corporate culture (企业文化，公司文化), enterprise culture (企业文化)
ex: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
exz: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

en: v. if a scientist or archaeologist excavates an area of land, they dig carefully to find ancient objects, bones etc
core: 【记忆】ex(出) + cav(洞) + ate (动词后缀) → 挖出洞 → 挖掘， 开凿
ex: Schliemann excavated the ancient city of Troy.
exz: 谢里曼发掘出特洛伊古城。

zh: adj. (病的)发作，痉挛；v&a. n合适,试穿,安装；v. "
en: v&a. to put a piece of equipment into a place, or a new part onto a machine, so that it is ready to be used
core: 【短语】fit for something (使胜任某事，使适应(或适合)某事), fit for (adj. 适于；适合的，恰当的), keep fit (保持（身体）健康)
ex: You must be very fit if you do so much running.
exz: 如果你经常这样跑步，身体肯定很健康。

zh: n. 运动，动态；手势；眼色，姿势；提议
en: n. the process of moving or the way that someone or something moves
core: 【记忆】mot(移动) + ion → 运动 | 【短语】in motion (在开动中，在运转中), motion control (运动控制，拖动控制；动作控制，移动控制), wave motion (波动)
ex: Newton’s first law of motion
exz: 牛顿第一运动定律

en: v. to officially force someone to leave a school or organization
core: 【记忆】ex(出) + pel(驱动， 推) → 把…开除； 驱逐 | 【短语】expel from (v. 驱逐出；开除；排出)
ex: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating.
exz: 五千多名中学生因考试作弊而被开除。

en: n. an amount of money that you are given regularly or for a special purpose
core: 【记忆】allow(允许) + ance → 允许， 容忍 | 【短语】allowance for (…的留量；…的修正值), housing allowance (n. 住房津贴), make allowance (体谅；留余地)
ex: Sales staff get a generous mileage allowance or a company car.
exz: 销售人员有优厚的里程补贴或者公司提供的专用汽车。

en: n. someone who is not at all brave
ex: Try it. Don’t be such a coward.
exz: 试一下，别那么胆小。

en: n. The germ of something such as an idea is something which developed or might develop into that thing
core: 【记忆】本身是词根， 意为“芽” → 微生物， 细菌 | 【短语】in germ ([比喻]处于初级阶段，处于萌芽阶段), wheat germ (小麦的胚芽，麦芽), germ cell ([生]生殖细胞；胚细胞)
ex: This was the germ of a book.
exz: 这是一本书的创作萌芽。

zh: n&v. 闪光，闪现；简讯，浮华
en: n&v. to shine suddenly and brightly for a short time, or to make something shine in this way
core: 【短语】in a flash (瞬间；立刻), flash memory (闪速存储器), flash point (闪点；燃点)
ex: Lightning flashed overhead.
exz: 头顶上电光闪闪。

en: v. to take a number or an amount from a larger number or amount
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + tract(拉) → 拉下来 → 减去； 去掉 | 【短语】subtract from (减去)
ex: The pupil could add and subtract but hadn't learned to divide.
exz: 这名小学生能做加法和减法，但还没学会做除法。

en: vi&n. to shine brightly with flashing points of light
core: 【记忆】g + litter(看作little， 小) → 一闪一闪小星星 → 闪光
ex: The river glittered in the sunlight.
exz: 阳光下河面波光粼粼。

en: adj. if something or someone is predictable, you know what will happen or what they will do – sometimes used to show disapproval
ex: The snow had a predictable effect on traffic.
exz: 这场雪对交通造成的影响可以预见。

en: adj. more than is reasonable, suitable, or necessary
core: 【短语】undue influence (n. 不正当影响；[律]不正当压力), undue delay (不当延误；不应有的延误)
ex: De Gaulle felt that America had undue influence in Europe.
exz: 戴高乐感到美国在欧洲影响力过大。

zh: n. 标，镖；v. 投掷；v. 急冲
en: n. a small pointed object that is thrown or shot as a weapon, or one that is thrown in the game of darts；v. If you dart a look at someone or something, or if your eyes dart to them, you look at them very quickly；v. to move suddenly and quickly in a particular direction
ex: a poisoned dart
exz: 毒镖

zh: v. 恰好相合，时间巧合；意见一致

core: 【记忆】co(共同) + in + cid(切) + e → 切成一样的 → 一致 | 【短语】coincide with (符合；与...相一致), happen to coincide (不约而同；不谋而合)
ex: The interests of the US and those of the islanders may not coincide.
exz: 美国的利益和这些岛民的利益可能并不一致。

en: adj. consecutive numbers or periods of time follow one after the other without any interruptions
core: 【记忆】con + secut(跟随) + ive → 一个接一个的 → 连续不断的， 连贯的 | 【短语】consecutive days (连续营业日；连续作业日), consecutive interpreting (交替传译), consecutive reaction (连锁反应)
ex: It had rained for four consecutive days.
exz: 雨接连下了四天。

zh: prep. favour；of赞成，以. 为收款人

core: 【短语】in on (参与，参加), in between (在中间), in a big way (大规模地，彻底地)
ex: a room furnished in the modern style
exz: 一间以现代风格装饰的房间

en: v&n. to risk money or possessions on the result of something such as a game or a race, when you do not know for certain what the result will be
core: 【记忆】gamb(看作game， 游戏) + le → 赌博可不仅仅是小小的游戏 → 赌博 | 【短语】gamble on (对…打赌), gamble away (赌光)
ex: Their religion forbids them to drink or gamble.
exz: 他们的宗教禁止饮酒和赌博。

en: n. a group of people chosen to do a particular job, make decisions etc
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + mitt(=mit 发送) + ee(表人) → 共同发送指令的人 → 委员会， 全体委员 | 【短语】party committee (党委), standing committee (常务委员会), central committee (中央委员会)
ex: a committee meeting
exz: 委员会会议

zh: adj. 哑的；暂不说话的；愚笨的
en: adj. stupid
core: 【短语】deaf and dumb (聋哑的，又聋又哑), dumb waiter (n. 小型送货升降机；送菜升降机，餐用升降机)
ex: What a dumb question.
exz: 多么愚蠢的问题。

en: n. the practice of keeping yourself and the things around you clean in order to prevent diseases
core: 【短语】food hygiene (食品卫生学), personal hygiene (个人卫生), oral hygiene (口腔卫生)
ex: the importance of personal hygiene
exz: 个人卫生的重要性

zh: v. 使窒息，使闷死；闷住；抑制；忍住
en: v. to kill someone by putting something over their face to stop them breathing
core: 【记忆】s(看作she， 她) + mother(母亲) → 母亲的溺爱快让她窒息了 → (使)窒息
ex: A teenage mother was accused of smothering her 3-month-old daughter.
exz: 一个少女妈妈被指控闷死自己三个月大的女儿。

en: n. A wilderness is a desert or other area of natural land which is not used by people
core: 【短语】in the wilderness (在野的；荒原；离开政界的), wilderness area (荒野保护区)
ex: ...the icy Canadian wilderness.
exz: …冰封的加拿大荒野。

en: n&v. a sound or action that you make in order to give information to someone or tell them to do something
core: 【记忆】sign(签名) + al → 用签名作为自己的标志 → 标志 | 【短语】signal processing (信号处理), digital signal (数字信号), digital signal processing (数字信号处理)
ex: At a prearranged signal the lights went out.
exz: 预定的信号一发出，灯就全灭了。

en: n. a large container for a very hot fire, used to produce power, heat, or liquid metal
core: 【短语】blast furnace (n. 鼓风炉，高炉), heating furnace (加热炉；热气炉), arc furnace (电弧炉，直接电弧炉)
ex: We had better fire up the furnace.
exz: 我们最好把炉子生起来。

en: v. to admit something that you feel embarrassed about
ex: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention.
exz: 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

zh: n. 未成年；少数；少数民族
en: n. a small group of people or things within a much larger group
core: 【记忆】min(小) + or + ity(名词后缀) → 少数 | 【短语】ethnic minority (少数民族), minority nationality (少数民族), national minority (少数民族)
ex: Gaelic is still spoken in Ireland by a tiny minority.
exz: 爱尔兰仍有极少数人在说盖尔语。

zh: n. 怀乡病，留恋过去，怀旧
en: n. a feeling that a time in the past was good, or the activity of remembering a good time in the past and wishing that things had not changed
ex: He looked back on his university days with a certain amount of nostalgia.
exz: 他带着一点留恋，回忆起大学时光。

en: adj. careful to avoid danger or risks
core: 【记忆】cau(小心) + ti + ous(多…的) → 谨慎的 | 【短语】cautious about (谨慎于…), be cautious of (留心…；谨防…)
ex: a cautious driver
exz: 一位谨慎的司机

en: n. a cloth bag filled with soft material that you put your head on when you are sleeping
core: 【短语】pillow case (开口式枕套；无边式枕套), soft pillow (软枕头), pillow block (轴台；架座)
ex: I’ll be asleep as soon as my head hits the pillow.
exz: 我头一碰到枕头就会睡着。

en: adj. a room, building, piece of land etc that is adjacent to something is next to it
core: 【短语】adjacent rock (围岩), adjacent structure (毗连建筑物), adjacent sea (近海；边缘海；邻海)
ex: We stayed in adjacent rooms.
exz: 我们住在毗连的房间里。

en: n. a written or printed copy of a speech, conversation etc
core: 【短语】academic transcript (成绩单), official transcript (官方的学生成绩单；官方成绩单)

en: n. a narrow crack in the surface of something, especially in rock
core: 【短语】crevice corrosion (缝隙腐蚀；裂隙腐蚀；接触腐蚀；隙间腐蚀)
ex: small creatures that hide in crevices in the rock
exz: 藏在岩石缝里的小生物

en: n&vt. a false spoken statement about someone, intended to damage the good opinion that people have of that person
core: 【记忆】sland(=scandal障碍物， 绊脚石) + er → 设置障碍物， 使人绊倒 → 诋毁， 诽谤
ex: He is being sued for slander .
exz: 他被控犯有口头诽谤罪。

zh: v. 使屈服、征服，克制；使柔和，使安静
en: v. to defeat or control a person or group, especially using force
ex: Police managed to subdue the angry crowd.
exz: 警察设法控制住了愤怒的人群。

zh: v. 放大，扩大；夸大，夸张
en: v. to make something seem bigger or louder, especially using special equipment
core: 【记忆】magn(大) + ify(使…) → 使…大 → 放大， 扩大
ex: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen.
exz: 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

en: v. to make a substance chemically neutral
ex: a medicine that neutralizes the acid in the stomach
exz: 能中和胃酸的药

en: n. a line of colour, especially one of several lines of colour all close together
core: 【记忆】和strip(n. 条纹)一起记 | 【短语】magnetic stripe (磁条，磁片)
ex: a shirt with black and white stripes
exz: 黑白条纹衬衫

zh: n. 一套家具，一套房间，酒店套房
en: n. a set of rooms, especially expensive ones in a hotel
core: 【短语】a suite of (一系列), presidential suite (总统套房；总统套间), deluxe suite (高级套房；豪华套间)
ex: a honeymoon suite
exz: 蜜月套房

core: 【短语】nothing but (只有；只不过), have nothing (一无所有；什么也没有), nothing to do (无所事事；闲着没事)
ex: I owe him nothing.
exz: 我不欠他什么。

en: n. a situation in which an army or the police surround a place and try to gain control of it or force someone to come out of it
core: 【短语】under siege (被包围), lay siege to (包围，围攻；努力追求), raise the siege (停止围攻；解围)
ex: The siege lasted almost four months.
exz: 这次封锁历时近四个月。

en: n. something that happens as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
core: 【记忆】con + sequ(跟随) + ence(名词后缀) → 跟随其后 → 结果， 影响 | 【短语】as a consequence (因此，结果), in consequence (因此；结果), as a consequence of (因此；由于…的结果)
ex: I don’t suppose it is of any consequence now.
exz: 现在我觉得这事一点都无所谓了。

zh: n. 粪，肥，肥粒；v. 施肥
en: n. waste matter from animals that is mixed with soil to improve the soil and help plants grow
core: 【短语】green manure (绿肥；未熟的堆肥), pig manure (猪粪；猪粪肥), chicken manure (鸡粪)
ex: ...bags of manure.
exz: …一袋袋的肥料。

zh: adj. 易动的，运动的；易变的
en: adj. moving or able to move from one job, area, or social class to another
core: 【短语】mobile phone (手机；行动电话), mobile communication (移动式通信), china mobile (中国移动通讯（世界500强之一）)
ex: a more mobile workforce
exz: 具有更强流动性的劳动力

en: n. loyalty and general agreement between all the people in a group, or between different groups, because they all have a shared aim
core: 【记忆】solid(坚实的) + arity → 坚实的状态 → 团结
ex: a gesture of solidarity
exz: 团结的表示

zh: n&vt. 堆；一堆；堆积；许多，大量；装载
en: n&vt. a large untidy pile of things
core: 【记忆】通过大量(heap)量变一跃(leap)发生质变 | 【短语】heaps of (大量；许多), a heap of ([口]一大堆；许多), bottom of the heap ([口语]失败者；输家)
ex: a rubbish heap
exz: 垃圾堆

en: v. to feel very sad and to miss someone after they have died
core: 【短语】mourn for (悼念；追悼), mourn over (哀悼)
ex: Hundreds of people gathered to mourn the slain president.
exz: 成百上千人聚集在一起悼念遇刺的总统。

zh: n. 猎狗；卑鄙的人；v. 用猎狗追，追逐
en: n. a dog that is fast and has a good sense of smell, used for hunting
core: 【短语】hound dog (猎狗，猎犬；猎犬乐队), basset hound (矮腿猎犬), afghan hound (阿富汗猎狗)
ex: A troubled hound was baying the moon.
exz: 一条受惊不安的猎狗正在对月狂吠。

en: n. a change in the  genetic  structure of an animal or plant that makes it different from others of the same kind
core: 【短语】gene mutation (基因突变), mutation breeding (诱变育种), mutation rate (突变率；变异概率；突变速率)

zh: n. 斗篷，披风；覆盖物，(煤气灯)白热罩
en: n. a loose piece of outer clothing without sleeves, worn especially in former times
core: 【短语】upper mantle (上地幔；上部地函), mantle plume ([地质]地幔柱), mantle convection (地函对流，地幔对流；地幔对流)
ex: We have the rare opportunity to seize the mantle of national leadership.
exz: 这次是我们担当国家领导职责的天赐良机。

zh: adj. 过剩的，多余的，不必要的
en: adj. more than is needed or wanted
ex: a modern building with no superfluous decoration
exz: 一栋没有多余装饰的现代建筑

core: 【短语】set up (v. 建立；装配；开业；竖立), a set of (一套；一组；一副), set out (出发；开始；陈述；陈列)
ex: This debate should be set in an international context .
exz: 这场辩论应该放在国际大背景下来看。

zh: v. 插入；n. 插入物，插页
en: v. to put something inside or into something else；n. printed pages that are put inside a newspaper or magazine in order to advertise something
core: 【记忆】in(进入) + sert(放置) → 放进去 → 插入， 嵌入 | 【短语】insert into (插入；写入), insert mode (插入模式), metal insert (金属嵌入物)
ex: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock.
exz: 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

en: v. to describe or represent something or someone
ex: His most famous painting portrayed the death of Nelson.
exz: 他最著名的画作描绘的是纳尔逊之死。

zh: n. 工作室；摄影棚；播音室
en: n. a room where television and radio programmes are made and broadcast or where music is recorded
core: 【短语】film studio (电影制片厂), photo studio (照相馆；摄像工作室), recording studio (录音室；录音棚)
ex: a TV studio
exz: 电视演播室

en: adj. feeling very sorry and embarrassed because of something you have done
core: 【短语】ashamed of (难为情，害臊；对…感到羞耻；对…感到惭愧), feel ashamed (感到羞愧)
ex: Everyone cries sometimes – it’s nothing to be ashamed of.
exz: 每个人都会有哭的时候——没什么好难为情的。

en: v. if a problem or difficult situation arises, it begins to happen
core: 【短语】arise from (由…引起，起因于), arise out of (起于……)
ex: A crisis has arisen in the Foreign Office.
exz: 外交部出现了危机。

en: v. if something repels you, it is so unpleasant that you do not want to be near it, or it makes you feel ill
core: 【记忆】re(=back向后) + pel(推) → 向后推 → 击退， 驱逐
ex: The smell repelled him.
exz: 这气味让他反感。

core: 【短语】heat flux (热流，热通量), magnetic flux (磁通量), flux density (通量密度；辐射流密度；流量密度)

en: adj. not cooked
core: 【短语】raw material (原料), in the raw (处于自然状态；未开化的；裸体), raw water (n. 未净化的水)
ex: raw meat
exz: 生肉

en: v. if a particular period of time elapses, it passes
ex: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial.
exz: 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

zh: v. 散开，扩散；adj. 扩散的；冗长的
en: v. to make heat, light, liquid etc spread through something, or to spread like this；adj. spread over a large area
core: 【记忆】dif(分开) + fus(倾泻) + e → 分开倾泻 → 散布； 漫射； 扩散 | 【短语】diffuse reflectance (漫反射率；漫反射系数；护散反射率), diffuse reflection (漫反射), diffuse light (漫射光)
ex: Their ideas diffused quickly across Europe.
exz: 他们的观点很快在欧洲传播开来。

zh: adj. 细软的 柔嫩的 精美的 微妙的 难办的
en: adj. a part of the body that is delicate is attractive and graceful
core: 【短语】delicate balance (微妙的平衡)
ex: Her wrists and ankles were slim and delicate.
exz: 她的手腕和脚踝长得纤巧优雅。

en: n. a serious promise
core: 【短语】exchange vows (订婚；结婚), under a vow (发过誓)
ex: Jim made a vow that he would find his wife’s killer.
exz: 吉姆发誓要找到杀害他妻子的凶手。

en: n. the main idea and meaning of what someone has said or written
ex: Don’t worry about all the details as long as you get the gist (= understand the main meaning ) of it.
exz: 不要去管各个细节，只要理解主要意思就行了。

en: adj. a specific thing, person, or group is one particular thing, person, or group
core: 【短语】specific surface (比表面；比表面积；表面系数), specific surface area (比表面积), specific gravity (比重)
ex: games suitable for specific age groups
exz: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

en: n. someone who is being considered for a job or is competing in an election
core: 【记忆】can(能) + did(做) + ate → 踏实能干才能当候选人 → 候选人 | 【短语】candidate for (候选人；人选), presidential candidate (总统候选人), qualified candidate (合格的候选人；合资格人员)
ex: a presidential candidate
exz: 总统候选人

en: n. someone, not usually a lawyer, who works as a judge in a local court of law, dealing with less serious crimes
ex: She will face a local magistrate on Tuesday.
exz: 她将在星期二面见一位地方治安法官。

en: n. something such as a piece of equipment or a decoration that is not necessary, but that makes a machine, car, room etc more useful or more attractive
core: 【记忆】ac(附近) + cess(走) + ory → 接近主体部件 → 附件， 零件 | 【短语】accessory equipment (辅助设备), accessory nerve (副神经), accessory ingredient (助剂；配合剂)
ex: bathroom accessories such as mirrors and towel-rails
exz: 镜子和毛巾架等浴室配件

zh: adj. 水下的；n. 潜水艇
en: n. a ship, especially a military one, that can stay under water
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + marine(海洋的； 船舶的) → 在海底航行的 → 潜水艇 | 【短语】submarine pipeline (海底管道；水下管道), nuclear submarine (核潜艇), submarine cable (海底电缆)
ex: The captain dived his submarine deep to escape from the destroyers.
exz: 海军上校使他的潜艇深深下潜以逃避驱逐艇。

en: adj. relating to or caused by heat
core: 【记忆】therm(＝thermo热) + al → 热的 | 【短语】thermal power (火力；火力发电；热功率；热电站), thermal stability (热稳定性，耐热性；热稳性), thermal conductivity (导热系数；热导率)
ex: thermal energy
exz: 热能

zh: adj. 去不掉的，擦不掉的
en: adj. impossible to remove or forget
core: 【短语】indelible ink (消不去的墨水)
ex: Her words left an indelible impression on me for years to come.
exz: 她的话多年来我都难以忘怀。

en: v. to lengthen or extend (a speech, etc); prolong in time
ex: Delay always breeds danger; and to protract a great design is often to ruin it.
exz: 推迟经常孕育危险；拖延一个伟大的工程常常意味着毁灭它。

en: v. to leave a job, school etc, especially without finishing it completely
core: 【短语】quit smoking (戒烟)
ex: He quit his job after an argument with a colleague.
exz: 他和一个同事争吵后就辞职了。

zh: v. 闲逛，漫步；漫谈；蔓延
en: v. to go on a walk in the countryside for pleasure
core: 【短语】ramble about (漫步于；闲逛)
ex: There’s plenty to discover as you ramble around this little island.
exz: 漫步这个小岛，你会有很多新发现。

en: n&v. to hit a person or animal very hard with a whip, stick etc
core: 【短语】lash out (猛击；猛烈抨击；大肆挥霍)
ex: Oliver lashed the horses to go faster.
exz: 奥利弗快马加鞭。

en: n. objects made out of baked clay
core: 【短语】pottery and porcelain (陶瓷；陶瓷器), painted pottery (彩陶), chinese pottery (中国陶瓷；中国陶器)
ex: Native American pottery
exz: 美洲印第安人的陶器

en: v. to charge someone with a crime and try to show that they are guilty of it in a court of law
ex: Shoplifters will be prosecuted.
exz: 在商店行窃者将被起诉。

zh: v. 使恶化；使加剧；使气恼
en: v. to make a bad situation, an illness, or an injury worse
core: 【记忆】ag + grav(重的) + ate(使…) → 使重 → 加重， 恶化
ex: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates.
exz: 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

en: v. to try to end a quarrel between two people, groups, countries etc
ex: The former president has agreed to mediate the peace talks.
exz: 前总统同意就和谈进行斡旋。

en: n. the part of your mind that tells you whether what you are doing is morally right or wrong
core: 【短语】a clear conscience (问心无愧), guilty conscience (内疚), have no conscience (没有良心；不辨是非)
ex: Well, at least I can face them all with a clear conscience (= the knowledge that you have done nothing wrong ) .
exz: 好吧，至少我可以问心无愧地面对他们所有人。

en: n. the natural features of a particular part of a country that you can see, such as mountains, forests, deserts etc
core: 【记忆】scen(设置) + ery(表场所， 名词后缀) → 设置景色的场所 → 舞台布景； 景色 | 【短语】natural scenery (自然风光), picturesque scenery (山清水秀；景色如画), scenery spot (景点；风景区)
ex: The best part of the trip was the fantastic scenery.
exz: 此次旅行最精彩之处就是那美妙绝伦的风景。

en: adj. a chronic disease or illness is one that continues for a long time and cannot be cured
core: 【记忆】chron(时间) + ic(形容词后缀) → 长时间的 → (疾病)慢性的 | 【短语】chronic disease ([医]慢性病), chronic renal failure (慢性肾功能衰竭；慢性肾衰竭), chronic bronchitis (慢性支气管炎)
ex: chronic arthritis
exz: 慢性关节炎

en: v. to make something continue to exist or happen for a period of time
core: 【记忆】sus(在…下面) + tain(支持) → 维持， 保持 | 【短语】sustain losses (蒙受损失)
ex: She found it difficult to sustain the children’s interest.
exz: 她发现很难保持孩子们的兴趣。

zh: n. 原料，材料；素质；东西；v. 把装满
en: n. used when you are talking about things such as substances, materials, or groups of objects when you do not know what they are called, or it is not important to say exactly what they are；v. to fill something until it is full
core: 【短语】and stuff (等等；诸如此类), food stuff (粮食), stuff with (用…把…堵住；用…装/填/塞)
ex: I’ve got some sticky stuff on my shoe.
exz: 我鞋子上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

en: v. If something is sited in a particular place or position, it is put there or built there
core: 【短语】web site (网页；网址), on site (现场；原地；原位), construction site (建筑工地；施工场地)
ex: He said chemical weapons had never been sited in Germany.
exz: 他说从未在德国部署过化学武器。

zh: n. 老练者；老手；老兵；老式古董车
en: n. someone who has been a soldier, sailor etc in a war
ex: a Vietnam veteran
exz: 越战老兵

en: v. to go somewhere with someone
core: 【记忆】ac(表加强) + company(同伴； 陪伴) → 陪伴； 伴随 | 【短语】accompany with (伴随着，兼带着；陪…同行), accompany by (随行，伴奏；在…的陪同下)
ex: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult.
exz: 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

zh: n. 一步；走或跑的速度
en: n. the speed at which something happens or is done
core: 【短语】keep pace (并驾齐驱；齐步并进), keep pace with (并驾齐驱，保持同步), change of pace (n. 改变习惯；更换口味)
ex: He quickened his pace , longing to be home.
exz: 他加快步伐，盼望着早点回到家中。

zh: adj. 每年的，一年生的；n. 年刊；一年生植物
en: adj. happening once a year；n. a plant that lives for one year or season
core: 【记忆】ann(年) + ual → 每年的， 年度的 | 【短语】annual meeting (年会), annual report (年报，年度报告；年度决算；年度财务报告), annual production (年产量)
ex: The school trip has become an annual event.
exz: 学校组织的旅行成了一年一度的活动。

en: adj. relating to space or the universe
core: 【记忆】cosm(宇宙) + ic(形容词后缀) → 宇宙的 | 【短语】cosmic ray (宇宙线), cosmic dust (宇宙尘埃), cosmic radiation (宇宙辐射)
ex: ...the cosmic laws governing our world.
exz: …主宰我们世界的宇宙法则。

en: adj. very big, impressive, or beautiful
ex: This lovely village is surrounded by majestic mountain scenery.
exz: 这座美丽的村庄四周山色壮丽。

zh: v. 给，付给，允许，供给，传达
en: v. to let someone have something as a present, or to provide something for someone
core: 【短语】give oneself (（为...）献身), give up (放弃；交出), give out (分发，发出；公布，发表；用尽，精疲力竭)
ex: Researchers were given a £10,000 grant to continue their work.
exz: 研究人员得到一万英镑的经费以继续他们的研究。

en: adj. expressing your opinions honestly and directly, even when doing this might annoy some people
ex: an outspoken critic of the education reforms
exz: 对教育改革直言不讳的批评者

core: 【短语】data storage (数据存储), storage system (存储系统；存储器存储系统), energy storage (蓄能；能量储存；储能器)

zh: adj. 唯一的，独一无二的
en: adj. being the only one of its kind
core: 【记忆】uni(单一) + que(有…特点的) → 唯一的， 独一无二的 | 【短语】unique style (独特的风格), unique feature (特色；特性；独到之处), unique opportunity (唯一机会；极难得的机会)
ex: Each person’s fingerprints are unique.
exz: 每个人的指纹都是独一无二的。

zh: n. 螺旋，螺丝；螺旋浆；vt&vi. 钉住，拧
en: n. a thin pointed piece of metal that you push and turn in order to fasten pieces of metal or wood together；vt&vi. to fasten or close something by turning it, or to be fastened in this way
core: 【记忆】s + crew(一群人) → 一群工人在流水线上生产螺丝钉 → 螺丝(钉) | 【短语】twin screw (双螺旋桨；双推进器；双驱动桥), screw pump (螺旋泵，螺杆泵), screw thread (n. 螺纹)
ex: Fix the frame in position and tighten the screws .
exz: 把框子固定在正确位置上，拧紧螺丝。

en: n. one of the small holes in your skin that liquid, especially  sweat  , can pass through, or a similar hole in the surface of a plant；v. If you pore over or through information, you look at it and study it very carefully
core: 【短语】pore size (孔径；孔隙大小；气孔尺寸), pore water (孔隙水（等于interstitial water）), pore pressure (孔隙压力；中性压力)
ex: The size of your pores is determined by the amount of oil they produce.
exz: 毛孔的大小取决于毛孔分泌油脂的多少。

en: v. to hit a surface with a lot of force, making a loud sharp sound
core: 【短语】slap on (随便穿上；胡乱涂上；断然拒绝)
ex: Sarah slapped Aaron across the face.
exz: 萨拉在阿龙的脸上掴了一巴掌。

zh: n. 枝条；木棍；v. 刺；粘；陷往
en: n. a long thin piece of wood from a tree, which is no longer attached to the tree；v. to attach something to something else using a substance, or to become attached to a surface
core: 【短语】stick with (坚持；继续做；保持联系), stick it out (坚持到底), stick in (在家)
ex: They collected sticks to start the fire.
exz: 他们捡来树枝生火。

zh: adj. 锋利的，尖锐的，强烈的；敏锐的；渴望的
en: adj. wanting to do something or wanting something to happen very much
core: 【短语】keen on (喜爱；热衷于…), keen competition (剧烈竞争), keen interest (强烈的兴趣)
ex: a keen photographer
exz: 一个摄影迷

en: n. the official legal position or condition of a person, group, country etc
core: 【记忆】stat(看作state， 声明) + us(我们) → 声明我们是谁 → 身份 | 【短语】status quo (n. 现状), current status (当前状态；目前状况), present status (现状)
ex: These documents have no legal status in Britain.
exz: 这些文件在英国并无法律效力。

en: v. to put a lubricant on something in order to make it move more smoothly
ex: Lubricate all moving parts with grease.
exz: 给所有活动部件加润滑油。

en: v. if water overwhelms an area of land, it covers it completely and suddenly
core: 【记忆】over(在…之上) + whelm(淹没， 压倒) → 征服
ex: But the various pros and cons should not blindly overwhelm one another.
exz: 但是，众多的利弊得失不应盲目的一个压倒另一个。

en: n. Pain is the feeling of unhappiness that you have when something unpleasant or upsetting happens
core: 【短语】growing pains ([医]发育期痛；青少年发育期的关节痛), at pains (尽力；用心), take pains (尽力，费苦心；耐心)
ex: ...grey eyes that seemed filled with pain.
exz: …似乎充满了痛苦的灰色眼睛。

zh: adj. 可变的，变化的；n. 可变物，变量
en: adj. likely to change often；n. something that may be different in different situations, so that you cannot be sure what will happen
core: 【短语】variable speed (变速，可变速率), random variable (随机变数，随机变量；无规变量), state variable ([控制系统]状态变量；[热力学]热力学态函数（等于thermodynamic function of state）)
ex: Expect variable cloudiness and fog tomorrow.
exz: 预计明天多云有雾，天气多变。

en: n. a short book that gives information or instructions about something
core: 【短语】student handbook (学生手册)
ex: the Fiction Writer’s Handbook
exz: 《小说写作手册》

zh: adj. 僵硬的，不易弯的；严格的
en: adj. rigid methods, systems etc are very strict and difficult to change
core: 【短语】rigid body (刚体；刚性体), rigid frame (刚性构架), rigid frame bridge (刚构桥，刚架桥；刚架式桥梁)
ex: rigid and authoritarian methods of education
exz: 死板、专断的教育方法

en: v&n. to put your arms around someone and hold them in a friendly or loving way
core: 【记忆】em(使…) + brac(胳膊) + e → 使在胳膊里 → 拥抱 | 【短语】warm embrace (温暖的拥抱)
ex: Jack warmly embraced his son.
exz: 杰克热情拥抱他的儿子。

zh: n. 象牙；象牙制品；adj. 象牙色的
en: n. the hard smooth yellowish-white substance from the  tusks(= long teeth )  of an  elephant
core: 【短语】ivory coast (象牙海岸（非洲）), ivory tower (n. 象牙塔（指脱离现实生活的小天地）), tower of ivory (象牙塔（逃避现实之处）)
ex: an ivory chess set

core: 【短语】voucher system (付款凭单制度), gift voucher (礼券（等于gift token）), cash voucher (优惠券；现金凭单)
ex: As a basic business voucher in the economic exchange, invoice is a primitive evidence for financial accounting and an important proof for taxation check.
exz: 发票作为经济交往中基本的商事凭证，是财务会计核算的原始凭证和税务稽查的重要凭据。

en: n. something that is difficult to understand or explain；v. to confuse someone or make them feel slightly anxious because they do not understand something
core: 【短语】jigsaw puzzle (n. 七巧板；智力拼图玩具), crossword puzzle (纵横字谜游戏), puzzle out (苦苦思索而弄清楚)
ex: The meaning of the poem has always been a puzzle.
exz: 那首诗的含义始终是个谜。

zh: n. 金属薄片；陪衬物；钝头剑
en: n. a light slender flexible sword tipped by a button and usually having a bell-shaped guard
core: 【短语】aluminum foil ([机]铝箔), aluminium foil (铝箔（作包装材料）；锡箔纸), copper foil (铜箔)
ex: The simple stone floor is the perfect foil for the brightly coloured furnishings.
exz: 朴素的石材地板完美地衬托出色彩鲜艳的家具。

zh: v. 同意给予，授予，承认；n. 拨款；补助款
en: v. to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for；n. an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
core: 【记忆】授予(grant)显赫的(grand)贵族爵位 | 【短语】take for granted (认为…理所当然), government grant (政府批地书，政府补助金), land grant (政府赠地；政府拨给大学或铁路之土地)
ex: Britain could grant Spain’s request .
exz: 英国可能会同意西班牙的请求。

en: n&vt. a polite or formal demand for something
core: 【记忆】re(再， 又) + quest(寻求) → 请求； 要求 | 【短语】request for (要求；对…有请求), at the request of (应…的邀请，应…的要求), on request (应要求；承索（即寄等）)
ex: To request more information, please call our toll free number.
exz: 欲知详情，请拨打我们的免费电话。

zh: adj. 微妙的；难以捉摸的；精明的
en: adj. not easy to notice or understand unless you pay careful attention
core: 【记忆】sub(在…下面) + tle → 暗藏于下面的 → 微妙的； 隐约的
ex: The pictures are similar, but there are subtle differences between them.
exz: 这些图片很相似，但它们之间有细微的差别。

en: n. a pipe or passage under the ground that carries away waste material and used water from houses, factories etc
core: 【短语】sewer pipe (污水管；下水管), sewer system (污水管道系统)
ex: ...the city's sewer system.
exz: …该城市的下水道系统。

en: n. the act of buying and using products
core: 【记忆】con(共同； 完全) + sumpt(使用) + ion → 消耗； 消费 | 【短语】energy consumption ([化]能量损耗), power consumption (能量功耗), water consumption (耗水量)
ex: art intended for mass consumption
exz: 供大众消费的艺术品

zh: adv. 从此地，从此时，因此
en: adv. for this reason
core: 【记忆】“恨死” → 恨死你， 从此不相往来 → 从此 | 【短语】from hence ([古语]从这里), hence with (拿开；带走)
ex: The cost of transport is a major expense for an industry. Hence factory location is an important consideration.
exz: 运输成本是企业的一大支出，因此工厂选址是重要的考虑因素。

zh: n. (织物)组织，结构；(材料)构造，结构
en: n. The texture of something, especially food or soil, is its structure, for example, whether it is light with lots of holes, or very heavy and solid
core: 【记忆】text(编织) + ure → 质地， 纹理 | 【短语】skin texture (肌理，皮肤结构), texture analysis (纹理分析；[计]结构分析), texture mapping (纹理映射；纹理贴图；材质贴图；贴图坐标)
ex: Matured over 18 months, this cheese has an open, crumbly texture with a strong flavour.
exz: 这种奶酪18个月后发酵成熟，气孔多，组织松脆，味道浓郁。

en: vt&vi. if something varies, it changes depending on the situation
core: 【短语】vary with (随…而变化), vary from (不同), vary in (在……方面变化；在……方面有差异)
ex: Quentin’s mood seems to vary according to the weather.
exz: 昆廷的情绪似乎随天气而变化。

zh: adj. 飞逝的, 短暂的 "
core: 【记忆】舰队(fleet)遇到问题赶紧逃跑(flee) | 【短语】a fleet of (机群；一队…), fleet management (车队管理；船队管理), fleet street (佛里特街（英国几家报馆办事处所在地）；伦敦报业；伦敦新闻界)
ex: Time is fleeting.; Time flies.

en: n. someone who is kept as a prisoner by an enemy so that the other side will do what the enemy demands
ex: The group are holding two tourists hostage (= keeping them as hostages ) .
exz: 这伙人挟持了两名游客作为人质。

zh: n&vt. 抵押品，典当物；象征

core: 【记忆】pled(看作plead， 恳求) + ge(音似： 哥) → 哥哥发誓要改邪归正， 恳求大家的饶恕 → 发誓 | 【短语】pledge oneself (宣誓；保证), pledge of allegiance (效忠誓言), cash pledge (押金)
ex: He asked her to pledge the house as security for a loan.
exz: 他要她抵押房子作为贷款担保。

en: v. to try to find out details about someone else’s private life in an impolite way
core: 【短语】pry into (窥探；打听), pry bar (撬杆；杠杆)
ex: I don’t want to pry , but I need to ask you one or two questions.

zh: n. 合成法；综合，合成物
en: n. something that has been made by combining different things, or the process of combining things
core: 【记忆】syn(共同) + thesis(论题) → 将相同的论题综合起来 → 综合 | 【短语】organic synthesis ([化]有机合成), synthesis method (合成法，综合法), chemical synthesis (化学合成)
ex: speech synthesis software
exz: 语音合成软件

zh: n&vt. 悲痛，忧伤；贫苦；危难

core: 【短语】in distress (遇难；在困境中), financial distress (财务困境，财务危机；金融困顿), respiratory distress ([医]呼吸窘迫)
ex: Luke’s behaviour caused his parents great distress.
exz: 卢克的行为使他的父母深感忧虑。

en: v. to frighten or threaten someone into making them do what you want

en: v. to disagree with something such as a plan or idea and try to prevent it from happening or succeeding

core: 【短语】orientate oneself (使认清形势)
ex: The reason for this was that he decided to orientate the map in the direction of the Pole Star since Polaris was the immovable guiding light in which the voyagers of that era placed their trust.
exz: 他之所以要这样做就是因为他决定以北极星的方向来确定地图的方位。 因为北极星是一盏不动的导航灯，那个时代的航海家们主要依靠北极星来导航。

en: n. a small object that you keep in your house because it is beautiful rather than useful
core: 【记忆】orn(装饰) + ament → 装饰； 装饰物

core: 【记忆】和team(n. 群， 队)一起记 | 【短语】teem with (富于；充满)

zh: v. 猛然抛下；突然发生；加速；n. 沉淀物

zh: n. (对品格或忍耐力的)严格考验

zh: adj. 值得(花时间、精力)的；合算的

en: n. a country ruled by a king or queen

en: adj. teaching or relating to the skills you need to do a particular job

en: v. to make someone feel ashamed, nervous, or uncomfortable, especially in front of other people

core: 【短语】field effect transistor ([计]场效应晶体管), bipolar transistor (双极型晶体管), thin film transistor (薄膜晶体管)

en: n. the quality of trying to do something even when it is difficult

en: n. an important or exciting news story that is printed in one newspaper or shown on one television station before any of the others know about it

zh: v. 归还；n. 归还；归还额

core: 【记忆】re(向后) + fund(资金) → 给回资金 → 偿付； 退款 | 【短语】tax refund (退税；退税单)
ex: I took the radio back, and they refunded my money .

en: adj. relating to the production of goods, crops, or wealth

exz: 该经济体的生产能力

en: v. to open your mouth wide and breathe in deeply because you are tired or bored

en: v. to send out gas, heat, light, sound etc

en: n. someone whose job is to keep and check financial accounts, calculate taxes etc

exz: 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

zh: n. 魔力，魅力；v. 迷住

core: 【短语】cast a glamour over (◎使迷住，迷住(某人))

exz: …演艺业的诱惑力。

en: n. the air, water, and land on Earth, which is affected by man’s activities

ex: Some of these chemicals are very damaging to the environment.

zh: n&v. 架；看台；站；立；处于；忍受

core: 【短语】stand up (v. 站起来；坚持；竖立；站得住脚；拥护), stand in (定位替身；代演员站位), stand on (坚持；依靠；位于；拘泥于；[航]持续向同一方向航行)

zh: v&n. 磨碎，折磨，压榨，磨光；苦差使

ex: a stone for grinding knives and scissors

zh: vt&vi. 嘲弄，嘲笑；adj. 假的，模拟的

en: n. a holiday, or time spent not working
core: 【记忆】vac(空的) + ation → 有空的 → 假期； 休假 | 【短语】summer vacation (暑假), on vacation (在度假中), winter vacation (寒假)
ex: We’re planning a vacation in Europe.
exz: 我们正计划去欧洲度假。

en: n. the soft fatty substance in the hollow centre of bones

zh: "a. 坚定的, 不变的，不动摇的 "

exz: 你会做出不以你能报道的任何事实为依据的一种假设。

en: adj. the best or most suitable for a particular purpose or in a particular situation

en: n. a difference between two amounts, details, reports etc that should be the same

zh: n. 出席，到场；风采，风度

core: 【记忆】pre(在…前面) + senc(看作send， 送) + e → 送到前面 → 出席 | 【短语】in the presence of (在…面前；有某人在场), in presence of (提示), physical presence (实体存在；实际存在)

en: n. a belief that some objects or actions are lucky or unlucky, or that they cause events to happen, based on old ideas of magic

en: n. somebody who is an important and respected member of a group, and is involved in many public activities

en: v. to prevent something unpleasant from happening

zh: n. 现金，钱款；v. 兑现，兑付

zh: n&vi. 露齿而笑，咧嘴一笑

ex: He came into the room with a friendly grin on his face .
exz: 他走进房间，脸上带着亲切的微笑。

en: n. if someone has a stroke, an  artery (= tube carrying blood )  in their brain suddenly bursts or becomes blocked, so that they may die or be unable to use some muscles

en: n. someone who has formally asked, usually in writing, for a job, university place etc

en: v&n. to use your hands to make something or someone move towards you or in the direction that your hands are moving

zh: adj. 第二的，中级的；次要的

zh: vt&vi. 使枯萎,使凋谢；使人感觉羞愧或迷惑 "

ex: The flowers in Isabel's room had withered.

zh: n. 乘公交车辆上下班者
core: 【短语】commuter train (市郊往返列车)

en: v. to share things among a group of people, especially in a planned way
core: 【记忆】dis(分开) + tribut(给予) + e → 分开给予 → 分发， 分送
ex: a man distributing leaflets to passers-by

ex: The cage smelled of excrement.

en: adj. if speech, writing, or an idea is intelligible, it can be easily understood
core: 【记忆】intel(在…之间) + lig(选择) + ible(能…的) → 能在众多选择中作出选择的 → 可理解的
ex: His reply was barely intelligible.

en: n. a feeling that someone or something is not important and deserves no respect
core: 【记忆】con(共同) + tempt(尝试) → 小意思！大家都能试 → 轻视 | 【短语】contempt of court (蔑视法庭；对法院的藐视罪), in contempt of (不顾；不把…放在眼里；藐视), beneath contempt (卑鄙到极点的)

exz: 公众受到了节目主持人的轻蔑对待。

en: n. the inside surface of your hand, in which you hold things
core: 【短语】palm oil (n. 棕榈油), bear the palm (获奖；获胜), palm tree (棕榈树)
ex: He held the pebble in the palm of his hand .

en: n. an unpleasant and upsetting experience that affects you for a long time
core: 【短语】trauma center (创伤中心；外伤中心), psychic trauma (精神创伤), emotional trauma (情绪创伤)

zh: n. 隐蔽处；掩蔽，遮蔽；避难所
en: n. protection from danger or from wind, rain, hot sun etc
core: 【记忆】shel(看作shell， 壳) + ter → 像壳一样的地方 → 掩蔽； 住所 | 【短语】shelter oneself (◎为自己辩解；给自己找借口), shelter from (保护某人不受打击), take shelter (寻求庇护；避难)
ex: The men took shelter in a bombed-out farmhouse.
exz: 那些男人躲在一间被炸毁的农舍里。

en: vt&n. to ignore something or treat it as unimportant
core: 【记忆】dis(不) + regard(关心) → 不关心 → 不理会， 漠视 | 【短语】in disregard of (不顾；无视)

zh: "a. 终年的,四季不断的,持久的；n. 多年生植物"
en: n. a plant that lives for more than two years

en: n. the fact of owning something

en: n. opposition to an idea, plan etc

en: n. the clarity of a piece of writing, law, argument etc is its quality of being expressed clearly

en: vt&vi. to move around like a wheel, or to make something move around like a wheel
core: 【记忆】re(再) + volv(卷， 转) + e → 不断滚动 → (使)旋转 | 【短语】revolve around (围绕…转动；以…为中心)

zh: n. 模棱两可；多义词句

zh: adj. 清洁的，保健的，卫生的

core: 【记忆】san(健康) + it + ary → 健康的 → 清洁的； 保健的 | 【短语】sanitary ware (卫生洁具；卫生器具), sanitary landfill (卫生掩埋；垃圾填坑), sanitary ceramics (卫生陶瓷)

en: n. the border of a country

zh: n. 公平；公正；无固定利息的股票

en: adj. someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure

zh: adj. 青少年的，幼稚的；n. 青少年

core: 【记忆】juven(年轻) + ile → 少年的； 幼稚的 | 【短语】juvenile delinquency (少年违法犯罪), juvenile court (n. 少年法庭), juvenile diabetes (青少年糖尿病；幼年型糖尿病)

core: 【短语】fend off (v. 避开；挡开), fend for oneself (照料自己), fend for (照料；抚养)

en: n. the distance east or west of a particular  meridian (= imaginary line along the Earth’s surface from the North Pole to the South Pole )  , measured in degrees

en: v. if fighting, violence, or a bad situation escalates, or if someone escalates it, it becomes much worse

en: n. the situation or experience of being poor

zh: n. 磁带盒；照相软片盒

en: n&v. a particular day of the month or year, especially shown by a number

zh: n&v. 围树篱；障碍；躲闪；推诿

en: n. friendly behaviour towards visitors

en: n. an important official statement about a particular situation or plan, or the act of making this statement
core: 【记忆】来自declare(v. 正式宣布) | 【短语】customs declaration (报关单；申报关税), declaration of independence (独立宣言), declaration form (n. 申报单)
ex: a ceasefire declaration
exz: 停火声明

en: v. to hate something or someone very much

exz: 两个男人互相厌恶。

en: v. to deliberately encourage people to fight, argue etc
ex: They were charged with inciting racial hatred.
exz: 他们被指控煽动种族仇恨。

en: n. the introduction of new ideas or methods
