zh: n. 命名 取名 单位
core: 【记忆】来自denominate(vt. 命名， 取名)

en: vi&n. to make an angry, unhappy, or confused expression, moving your  eyebrows  together
core: 【记忆】f(音似： 翻) + row(看作brow， 眉毛) + n → 翻眉毛 → 皱眉 | 【短语】frown on (不悦，不满), frown at (对…感到生气不满；对…皱眉), frown upon (不悦；皱眉；不赞成)
ex: She frowned as she read the letter.
exz: 她看着信皱起了眉头。

en: v. to force someone to do something they do not want to do by threatening them
ex: Potter had argued that the government coerced him into pleading guilty.
exz: 波特曾争辩说是政府胁迫他认罪。

zh: adj. 笨重的，不便携带的
en: adj. heavy and difficult to move
ex: a large cumbersome machine
exz: 大而笨重的机器

zh: n. 信任，信誉；存款；信用贷款；v. 相信
en: n. an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later；v. to believe or admit that someone has a quality, or has done something good
core: 【短语】credit card (信用卡；记帐卡), letter of credit (n. [商]（银行发行的）信用证), credit system (信用制度；信贷制度；赊购或赊销制度)
ex: The store agreed to let him have credit.
exz: 商店同意他赊购。

zh: n. 韵律，格律；有规律的反复(循环)，周期性
en: n. A rhythm is a regular pattern of changes, for example changes in your body, in the seasons, or in the tides
core: 【短语】circadian rhythm (生理节律；[化]近昼夜节律；日周期节律), sense of rhythm (节奏感；韵律感), sinus rhythm (窦性节律)
ex: Begin to listen to your own body rhythms.
exz: 开始聆听你自己身体的规律性变化。

zh: v. 碰撞，坠毁，冲过；n. 突然坠落；事故
en: v. to have an accident in a car, plane etc by violently hitting something else；n. an accident in which a vehicle violently hits something else
core: 【记忆】卡车撞上(crash)路边的一堆垃圾(trash) | 【短语】car crash (车祸；汽车碰撞), air crash (飞机失事), stock market crash (股市崩盘；股市行情暴跌)
ex: The jet crashed after take-off.
exz: 这架喷气式飞机起飞后就坠毁了。

en: adj. a toneless voice does not express any feelings
ex: ‘I’m sorry,’ he said, in a flat toneless voice.
exz: “对不起。”他以淡淡的声调说道。

en: vt&vi. to bring food or drink up from your stomach out through your mouth, because you are ill
core: 【记忆】v + o(形似嘴) + mit(词根mit指“发送”) → 张嘴发送 → 呕吐
ex: He had swallowed so much sea water he wanted to vomit.
exz: 他呛了这么多海水，所以想吐。

en: n. someone whose job is to connect or repair electrical wires or equipment
ex: I've heard an electrician got hurt when he hiked.
exz: 我听说有个电工在高空检修电线时摔伤了。

zh: a&v. 发音清晰的；说话表达力强
en: a&v. to express your ideas or feelings in words
ex: Many people are unable to articulate the unhappiness they feel.
exz: 许多人都表达不出内心的痛苦。

en: n. an entrance covered by a roof outside the front door of a house or church
ex: He was standing on the porch, waving as we drove away.
exz: 我们开车离开的时候，他站在走廊上向我们挥手。

en: n. two weeks
core: 【记忆】fort(看作fourteen， 十四) + night(夜晚) → 十四个日日夜夜 → 两星期
ex: a fortnight’s holiday
exz: 十四天的假期

en: v. to wake someone
core: 【短语】arouse the enthusiasm of (调动积极性), arouse from (v. 从…中唤醒)
ex: His revolutionary work in linguistics has aroused intense scholarly interest.
exz: 他在语言学方面的革命性著作引起了强烈的学术兴趣。

zh: n. 战士；拥护者；冠军；v. 支持，拥护；保卫
en: n. someone or something that has won a competition, especially in sport；v. to publicly fight for and defend an aim or principle, such as the rights of a group of people
core: 【记忆】“产品” → 冠军是付出无数汗水后的“产品” → 冠军 | 【短语】olympic champion (奥运冠军；奥林匹克冠军), defending champion (卫冕冠军), open champion (公开(锦标)赛冠军)
ex: the world heavyweight boxing champion
exz: 世界重量级拳击冠军

zh: n&vt. 危险，危害，冒险；做出
en: n&vt. something that may be dangerous, or cause accidents or problems
core: 【记忆】“骇死人的” → 危险 | 【短语】moral hazard (道德危机；由于投保人可能不可靠所冒的风险), hazard analysis (危害分析), fire hazard (火灾；火灾隐患)
ex: That pile of rubbish is a fire hazard (= something that is likely to cause a fire ).
exz: 那堆垃圾是火灾隐患。

en: n. a part of a written law or legal document covering a particular subject of the whole law or document
core: 【短语】arbitration clause (仲裁条款；公断条款), attributive clause (定语从句), relative clause (n. 关系从句)
ex: A confidentiality clause was added to the contract.
exz: 合同中加上了一项保密条款。

en: adj. feeling or showing a lot of interest and excitement about something
core: 【记忆】enthusias(=enthusiasm 热情， 热心) + tic → 热情的 | 【短语】enthusiastic about (热情；对…热心)
ex: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
exz: 改革的热心支持者

zh: n. 起源；原件，原稿；adj. 最初的；有独创性的
en: n. a work of art or a document that is not a copy, but is the one produced by the writer or artist；adj. existing or happening first, before other people or things
core: 【短语】original design (原设计；初始设计), original data (原始资料；源数据), original image (原始图像)
ex: The colours are much more striking in the original.
exz: 原作的色彩要鲜艳得多。

en: n. the amount of goods or work produced by a person, machine, factory etc
core: 【记忆】out(外面) + put(放) → 输出 | 【短语】output power ([化]输出功率), output voltage (输出电压), output value (n. 输出值，产值)
ex: Output is up 30% on last year.
exz: 产量比去年提高了30%。

en: adj. reasonable and likely to be true or successful
core: 【记忆】plaus(鼓掌) + ible(可…的) → 可给予鼓掌的 → 似有道理的
ex: His story certainly sounds plausible.
exz: 他的叙述听上去当然很合理。

zh: n. 恶心，晕船；vt. 使恶心
en: n. the feeling that you have when you think you are going to vomit (= bring food up from your stomach through your mouth )
ex: I was overcome with a feeling of nausea.
exz: 我感到一阵恶心。

zh: n. 折扣；v. 不全信，低估，漠视
en: n. a reduction in the usual price of something
core: 【记忆】dis(分离) + count(计算) → 不计算在内的部分 → 折扣 | 【短语】at a discount (打折扣；不受欢迎，没销路), special discount (特别折扣), discount price (折扣价格)
ex: They are often available at a discount.
exz: 它们经常可以以折扣价买到。

en: n. the loud noise that you hear during a storm, usually after a flash of lightning
core: 【记忆】th + under(在…下) → 打雷时切忌躲在树下 → 雷 | 【短语】thunder and lightning (雷电；指责), spring thunder (春雷), thunder storm (n. 雷雨)
ex: We were woken in the night by thunder.
exz: 晚上我们被雷声惊醒。

en: n. the final result of a meeting, discussion, war etc – used especially when no one knows what it will be until it actually happens
core: 【记忆】来自词组come out(出来) | 【短语】possible outcome (可能结果), therapeutic outcome (治疗结果), learning outcome (学习结果；学习成果)
ex: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
exz: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

zh: n. 表面，钟面；拨号盘；v. 打电话
en: n. the round part of a clock, watch, machine etc that has numbers that show you the time or a measurement
core: 【短语】dial the number (拨电话号码), dial telephone (转盘电话机；自动电话（等于dial phone）), dial indicator (刻度盘指示器，千分表)
ex: The lighted dial of her watch said 1.20.
exz: 她手表上的夜光表面显示时间为1点20分。

en: adj. spoken or written in secret and intended to be kept secret
core: 【短语】confidential information (机密信息；机密情报), strictly confidential (绝密；极机密), confidential data (机密数据；保密资料；机密资料)
ex: a confidential government report
exz: 一份机密的政府报告

zh: "n. 合页，铰链，关键；v. 给安铰链,随而定；n. "
en: "n. a piece of metal fastened to a door, lid etc that allows it to swing open and shut；v. to attach something, using a hinge
core: 【记忆】“很紧” → 铰链很紧， 转不动 → 铰链 | 【短语】plastic hinge (塑性铰), hinge on (以…为转移，靠…转动), door hinge (门铰链)

en: v. to like something very much
ex: I simply adore chocolate.
exz: 我简直太喜欢巧克力了。

en: adj. having an end or a limit
core: 【记忆】fin(界限， 范围) + ite → 限定范围的 → 限定的 | 【短语】finite element (有限元), finite element method (fem) (有限元素法), finite element method ([计]有限元法；[化]有限单元法)
ex: the earth’s finite resources
exz: 地球有限的资源

en: adj. having qualities considered to be typical of men or of what men do
ex: They’re nice curtains, but I’d prefer something a little more masculine.
exz: 这些窗帘很好，但我更喜欢男性化一点的。

en: v&n. If you mutter, you speak very quietly so that you cannot easily be heard, often because you are complaining about something
ex: "God knows," she muttered, "what's happening in that madman's mind."
exz: “天知道，”她低声抱怨，“那个疯子脑子里正在想什么。”

en: n. the people or groups that are competing against you, especially in business or in a sport
core: 【短语】market competition (市场竞争), fierce competition (激烈的竞争), intense competition (激烈的竞争)
ex: Going to trade fairs is an ideal opportunity to size up the competition .
exz: 参加商品交易会是估量竞争规模的理想机会。

en: n. someone who receives something
core: 【记忆】re(反) + cip(拿， 取) + ient → 不主动拿 → (被动的)接受者 | 【短语】intended recipient (接收者)
ex: ...the largest recipient of U.S. foreign aid.
exz: …最大的美国对外援助接受方。

en: n&v. an official order to stop trade with another country
core: 【短语】arms embargo (武器禁运，军火禁运), embargo on (对…的禁运), oil embargo ([法]石油禁运)
ex: Several countries embargoed arms shipments to Yugoslavia.
exz: 好几个国家对南斯拉夫实行武器禁运。

en: adj. using a system in which information is recorded or sent out electronically in the form of numbers, usually ones and zeros
core: 【记忆】digit(手指， 脚趾) + al → 用手指数的 → 数字的 | 【短语】digital library (数字图书馆), digital image (数字图象), digital signal (数字信号)
ex: digital TV
exz: 数字电视

en: n. an amount of money that is given to someone by an educational organization to help pay for their education
ex: Her latest publication is a fine piece of scholarship.
exz: 她最新出版的作品是一部优秀的学术著作。

zh: v. 把…强加于；征(税)，利用
en: v. If you impose your opinions or beliefs on other people, you try and make people accept them as a rule or as a model to copy
core: 【记忆】im(使…) + pos(放置) + e → 强行放置 → 征(税) | 【短语】impose on (利用；欺骗；施加影响于), impose a fine (处以罚款)
ex: Parents should beware of imposing their own tastes on their children.
exz: 父母应该提防把自己的兴趣强加给孩子。

zh: adj. 复杂的；n. 复合体；变态心理
en: adj. consisting of many different parts and often difficult to understand；n. a large number of things which are closely related
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + plex(重叠) → 重叠交叉的 → 复杂的 | 【短语】complex system (复杂系统), complex structure (复合结构；复结构；复数结构), complex function (复值函数)
ex: a complex system of highways
exz: 复杂的公路网

en: vi&n. permission to do something
core: 【短语】informed consent (知情同意，知会同意；知后同意), written consent (书面同意；同意书), mutual consent (双方同意)
ex: He took the car without the owner’s consent .
exz: 他没有得到车主的许可就把车开走了。

en: n. a mixture of loud noises, especially the noise of a lot of people talking at the same time
ex: the hubbub from the market
exz: 市场的嘈杂声

zh: n. 矛；矿井；车辕；轴；光线
en: n. a passage which goes down through a building or down into the ground, so that someone or something can get in or out
core: 【记忆】变速杆(shaft)用来改变(shift)速度 | 【短语】main shaft (n. 主轴；总轴), vertical shaft (立井；立轴；立柱), shaft wall (井壁砌壁；炉墙)
ex: a drive shaft
exz: 驱动轴

zh: n. 报纸文章的标题；照片说明
en: n. A caption is the words printed underneath a picture or cartoon which explain what it is about
ex: The local paper featured me standing on a stepladder with a caption, "Wendy climbs the ladder to success."
exz: 当地的报纸刊登了一幅我站在活梯上的特写，下面写着：“温迪登上了成功之梯。”

zh: n. 港，港口，安全处，避难所；v. 隐匿，包庇
en: n. an area of water next to the land where the water is calm, so that ships are safe when they are inside it；v. to protect and hide criminals that the police are searching for
core: 【记忆】“哈勃” → 哈勃望远镜停泊在太空中 → 停泊 | 【短语】pearl harbour (珍珠港), harbour city (海港城（地名，位于香港尖沙咀）), harbour engineering (港湾工程，港口工程；海港工程)
ex: as they sailed into Portsmouth Harbour
exz: 当他们驶入朴次茅斯港的时候

zh: vt&vi. 跌倒，跌落；摇摇欲坠；使倾覆
en: vt&vi. to fall down quickly and suddenly, especially with a rolling movement
core: 【短语】take a tumble (恍然大悟), tumble down (破败；半破坏), tumble in (嵌入)
ex: Oil prices have tumbled.
exz: 石油价格猛跌。

en: n. a large open container that you fill with water and use for washing yourself, washing dishes etc
core: 【短语】heat sink (散热器；吸热部件；冷源), sink in (渗入；完全被理解), sink into (陷入)
ex: Dirty plates were piled high in the sink.
exz: 脏盘子在洗涤槽里堆得很高。

zh: n. 赞助人；资助人；老顾客，主顾
en: n. someone who supports the activities of an organization, for example by giving money
core: 【短语】patron saint (n. 守护神；保护圣徒)
ex: a wealthy patron
exz: 富有的赞助人

en: n. a common illness that makes you feel very tired and weak, gives you a sore throat, and makes you cough and have to clear your nose a lot
core: 【短语】swine flu (猪流感), bird flu (n. 禽流感), flu virus ([医学]流感病毒；禽流感病毒)
ex: Steven’s still in bed with flu .
exz: 史蒂文患了流感，仍卧病在床。

zh: n. 柱; 柱状物；书报上的栏；纵列
en: n. a tall solid upright stone post used to support a building or as a decoration
core: 【短语】column chromatography (柱层析法；柱色谱法), capillary column ([化]毛细管柱), distillation column (蒸馏柱)
ex: He writes a weekly column for ‘The Times’.
exz: 他每周为《泰晤士报》写一篇专栏文章。

core: 【短语】overrun oneself (奔跑过度而伤害身体)

en: n. the formal rules for polite behaviour in society or in a particular group
ex: strict rules of professional etiquette
exz: 严格的行规

en: v. to take away an amount or part from a total
core: 【短语】deduct from (扣除), deduct money (扣钱；扣款)
ex: The company deducted this payment from his compensation.
exz: 公司从他的补偿金中扣除了这笔款项。

zh: adj. 浓密的，密集的；愚笨的
en: adj. made of or containing a lot of things or people that are very close together
core: 【记忆】在雨中， 感觉(sense)雨丝很密集(dense) | 【短语】dense fog (浓雾), dense population (稠密的人口), dense packing (致密堆积；致密填积)
ex: a dense rurally-based population
exz: 居住在乡村的密集人口

zh: v. (较淡)着色于，染色；使带有气息
en: v. to give something a small amount of a particular colour, emotion, or quality
ex: Pink tinged her cheeks.
exz: 她面色粉红。

zh: adj. 适合的，一致的，全等的
en: adj. fitting together well
ex: They want to work in an organization whose values are congruent with their own.
exz: 他们想在一家与他们自己的价值观相同的组织里工作。

en: vi&n. to lower your body close to the ground by bending your knees completely
ex: He crouched in the shadows near the doorway.
exz: 他蹲在门道近旁的阴暗处。

zh: v. 保存，保藏；n. 果酱，蜜饯
en: v. to protect something and prevent it from changing or being damaged；n. fruit that is preserved by being cooked with sugar
core: 【记忆】con + serv(保持) + e → 保持住 → 保存， 储存； 节约
ex: We must conserve our woodlands for future generations.
exz: 我们必须为子孙后代保护林地。

en: n. Fahrenheit is also a noun
core: 【短语】degree fahrenheit (华氏温度，华氏度)
ex: He was asked for the boiling point of water in Fahrenheit.
exz: 有人问他华氏温标下水的沸点。

zh: n. 市镇自治机关；法人；公司
en: n. a big company, or a group of companies acting together as a single organization
core: 【短语】transnational corporation (跨国公司), multinational corporation (跨国公司), import and export corporation ([经]进出口公司)
ex: He works for a large American corporation.
exz: 他在一家美国大公司工作。

en: v. to stop a fire from burning
core: 【短语】quench oil (淬火油), water quench (水淬（热处理）), quench hardening ([冶金]淬火硬化)
ex: a desperate bid to quench the raging flames
exz: 为扑灭熊熊大火而不顾一切的努力

zh: n. 警报，惊慌；v. 使忧虑
en: n. a piece of equipment that makes a loud noise to warn you of danger
core: 【记忆】al + arm(武器) → 受了惊吓， 拿起武器 → 惊恐 | 【短语】alarm system (报警系统), fire alarm (火警；火警警报器), alarm clock (闹钟)
ex: I forgot to set the burglar alarm.
exz: 我忘记打开防盗警报器了。

zh: adj. 令人作呕的，令人不快的，下流的
en: adj. someone who is nasty behaves in an unkind and unpleasant way
core: 【记忆】做事总是草率的(hasty)， 真是令人讨厌的(nasty)
ex: I went to school with him e_SEnD he was nasty then and he’s nasty now.
exz: 我和他一起上过学他那时很讨厌，现在还是很讨厌。

en: n. a tool with a rounded blade and a long handle used for moving earth, stones etc；v. to lift and move earth, stones etc with a shovel
core: 【短语】power shovel (电铲；机铲，动力铲；挖土机), mechanical shovel (机铲)
ex: ...a coal shovel.
exz: …一把煤铲。

en: adj. thinking that someone might be guilty of doing something wrong or dishonest
core: 【短语】suspicious of (对…起疑)
ex: His reluctance to answer my questions made me suspicious .
exz: 他不愿回答我的问题，这引起我的怀疑。

zh: n. 树干；人躯干；大衣箱
en: n. the thick central woody stem of a tree
core: 【记忆】卡车(truck)撞向树干(trunk) | 【短语】trunk road (干道；干线道路), trunk line (干线；中继线，长途电话线), tree trunk (树干)
ex: He left his bicycle leaning against a tree trunk .
exz: 他把他的自行车斜靠在树干上。

en: n. if a group of people give someone an ovation, they clap to show approval
core: 【短语】standing ovation (长时间起立鼓掌；起立致敬)
ex: The Chancellor’s entrance was greeted with a standing ovation (= everyone stood up ).
exz: 总理进来时，全体起立鼓掌欢迎。

zh: n. 马鞍，鞍座；鞍状山脊
en: n. a leather seat that you sit on when you ride a horse
core: 【短语】in the saddle (掌权；在职), saddle point (鞍点), saddle up (备马；给马装上鞍)

en: n. a very sad event, that shocks people because it involves death
ex: The tragedy happened as they were returning home from a night out.
exz: 悲剧发生在他们夜里外出归来的路上。

en: n. the scientific study of weather conditions
core: 【记忆】meteor(陨石； 天气) + ology(…学) → 研究天气的学科 → 气象学 | 【短语】agricultural meteorology (农业气象学), synoptic meteorology (天气学)
ex: This is a book about meteorology.
exz: 这本书是讲气象的。

zh: v. 浸透，浸湿；使满，使饱和
en: v. to make something very wet
core: 【记忆】sat(充足) + ur + ate(使…) → 使充足 → 使饱和
ex: Water poured through the hole, saturating the carpet.
exz: 水从洞里流进来，浸湿了地毯。

zh: n. 肘；衣服肘部；v. 用肘推、挤
en: n. the joint where your arm bends；v. to push someone with your elbows, especially in order to move past them
core: 【记忆】力在肘(elbow)， 弓(bow)在手 | 【短语】elbow joint (n. 肘关节), tennis elbow (肘部发炎；网球运动员常见的肘伤), elbow piece (弯头，肘形配件)
ex: He slipped and fell, badly bruising an elbow.
exz: 他滑倒了，严重挫伤了一只胳膊肘。

zh: adj. 可怕的，难以对付的
en: adj. very powerful or impressive, and often frightening
ex: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.
exz: 那幢建筑呈灰色，气势凛然，与漂亮沾不上边。

en: adj. connected with the structure of something
core: 【短语】structural adjustment (结构调整，薪级结构调整), structural design (结构设计), structural analysis (结构分析)
ex: structural changes in the computer industry
exz: 电脑行业的结构性改变

en: v. if you kindle a fire, or if it kindles, it starts to burn
ex: The Second World War kindled his enthusiasm for politics.
exz: 第二次世界大战激发了他的政治热情。

zh: n&v. 下降，衰退，减弱；拒绝
en: n&v. If something declines, it becomes less in quantity, importance, or strength
core: 【记忆】de(向下) + clin(弯曲) + e → 向下弯曲 → 下降； 衰退 | 【短语】on the decline (在走下坡路；在衰退中), decline and fall (衰亡，衰败), in decline (在衰退中)
ex: The number of staff has declined from 217,000 to 114,000.
exz: 员工人数已从217000人减少到114000人。

core: 【记忆】en(进入) + roll(名单) → 上了名单 → 登记 | 【短语】enroll in (参加；选课)
ex: The school will enroll new students in August.
exz: 这所学校将于八月份招收新生.

zh: n. 斜线，斜度；倾斜面，斜坡
en: n. a piece of ground or a surface that slopes
core: 【记忆】slo(看作slow， 慢的) + pe → 慢慢地走下斜坡 → 斜坡 | 【短语】slope stability (坡面稳定性), rock slope (岩石边坡；石坡；岩石坡；石流坡), slope protection (边坡保护，护坡；护坡工程)
ex: a steep slope
exz: 陡坡

en: v. to swell or make something swell because of pressure from inside
ex: Through this incision, the abdominal cavity is distended with carbon dioxide gas.
exz: 通过此切口，二氧化碳气体把胸腔充得肿胀起来。

core: 【短语】exert oneself (努力；尽力), exert an influence on (对……产生影响)
ex: He has exerted himself tirelessly on behalf of the charity.
exz: 他为这个慈善组织奋斗不懈。

en: adj. large enough to be noticed or considered important
ex: There’s no appreciable change in the patient’s condition.
exz: 病人的状况没有明显改变。

en: n. the total after a lot of different figures or points have been added together
core: 【短语】in the aggregate (总计；总共，作为总体), on aggregate (总共，总计，作为总体，作为整体), lightweight aggregate (轻骨料；轻砂石)
ex: (=  as a group or in total  ) , women outlive men by 7 or more years.
exz: 总体来看，女性比男性多活七年或以上。

en: vt&n. the feeling of wanting or needing a drink
core: 【短语】thirst for (v. 渴望；热望), thirst for knowledge (渴望求知，求知欲), have a thirst ([口语]想喝杯酒)
ex: Ice water is the only thing that really quenches my thirst (= gets rid of it ) .
exz: 只有冰水才能让我真正解渴。

en: n. a storm that has very strong fast winds and that moves over water
core: 【记忆】hurri(看作hurry， 匆忙) + cane → 来得很匆忙的风 → 飓风 | 【短语】hurricane katrina (卡特里娜飓风), hurricane lamp (n. 防风灯；飓风灯；马灯)
ex: The hurricane devastated a large section of the coast.
exz: 飓风毁坏了沿海地区的大部分。

en: n. something very lucky or very good that happens which you did not expect to happen or did not think was possible
core: 【记忆】mir(惊奇) + acle(表物) → 奇迹； 奇事 | 【短语】economic miracle (经济奇迹), to a miracle (奇妙地；好得不可思议；好到惊人程度；完全地), by a miracle (奇迹般地；依靠奇迹)
ex: It’s a miracle you weren’t killed!
exz: 你没有死真是奇迹！

en: n. A nightmare is a very frightening dream
ex: All the victims still suffered nightmares.
exz: 所有的受害者仍为恶梦所扰。

zh: adj. 对面的；相反的，对立的；prep. 在对面
en: adj. as different as possible from something else；prep. if one thing or person is opposite another, they are facing each other
core: 【短语】opposite direction (相反方向；敌对方向), opposite sex (异性), just the opposite (正好相反，恰巧相反)
ex: I thought the medicine would make him sleep, but it had the opposite effect.
exz: 我以为这药会让他睡觉，但是它却起了反作用。

zh: adj. 献身的，一心一意的，热诚的
core: 【记忆】de(表加强) + dic(分配， 分派) + ate(动词后缀) → 为…献出 → 献(身) | 【短语】dedicated line (专线；专用线路), dedicated team (特别小组；专门小组), dedicated computer (专用电脑)
ex: a dedicated and thoughtful teacher
exz: 一位富有敬业精神、待人体贴的教师

zh: adj. 脆弱的，娇嫩的；温柔的；v. 提供，投标
en: adj. tender food is easy to cut and eat, especially because it has been well cooked；v. to make a formal offer to do a job or provide goods or services for a particular price
core: 【记忆】婴儿太脆弱(tender)， 需悉心照料(tend) | 【短语】tender for (投标), open tender (公开招标), tender offer (投标报价；招标)
ex: Continue cooking until the meat is tender.
exz: 把肉一直烧到松软为止。

zh: v. 误用，使人堕落；n. 堕落者，反常者
en: v. to influence someone so that they begin to think or behave in an immoral way；n. someone whose sexual behaviour is considered unnatural and unacceptable
ex: TV violence perverts the minds of young children.
exz: 电视暴力腐蚀了孩子们的心灵。

en: n. someone who is mentally ill or has a very low level of intelligence
core: 【短语】idiot box (电视机)
ex: Are you an idiot?
exz: 你是一个白痴吗？

zh: n. 锻工车间，铁匠店；v. 锻造，伪造
en: n. a place where metal is heated and shaped into objects；v. to illegally copy something, especially something printed or written, to make people think that it is real
core: 【短语】forge ahead (继续进行，取得进展), forge piece (锻件), forge press (锻压机)
ex: Someone stole my credit card and forged my signature.
exz: 有人偷了我的信用卡，并假冒我的签名。

en: adj. noticing or realizing something
core: 【记忆】con(共同) + sci(知道) + ous → 共同知道的 → 自觉的； 意识到的 | 【短语】conscious of (意识到), become conscious of (观察到), safety conscious (adj. 有安全意识的)
ex: The driver was still conscious when the ambulance arrived.
exz: 救护车赶到时，司机仍然神志清醒。

en: adj. short, with no unnecessary words
ex: Your summary should be as clear and concise as possible.
exz: 你的总结应该尽可能地明白简洁。

en: n. a short film that is made by photographing a series of drawings
core: 【短语】animated cartoon (n. 动画；卡通片), cartoon network (卡通频道；卡通电视网（美国一个专门播放动画节目的有线电视频道）)
ex: cartoon characters such as Donald Duck
exz: 唐老鸭一类的卡通人物

zh: v. 超过，赶上；突然降临
en: v. to go past a moving vehicle or person because you are going faster than them and want to get in front of them
ex: He pulled out to overtake the van.
exz: 他把车驶出所在车道想超过那辆小货车。

en: n. the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged
core: 【记忆】来自词组lay out(布置， 安排) | 【短语】layout design (布图设计；布局设计；布线设计), general layout (总体设计；总布置图), page layout (页面布局)
ex: All the flats in the building had the same layout.
exz: 大楼里所有的公寓布局都是一样的。

en: adj. if something is outdated, it is no longer considered useful or effective, because something more modern exists
ex: outdated teaching methods
exz: 不合时宜的教学方法

en: v&n. to breathe in and out making a long sound, especially because you are bored, disappointed, tired etc
core: 【短语】with a sigh (长叹一声), deep sigh (深深的叹息), sigh for (渴望；为……叹息)
ex: ‘Well, there’s nothing we can do about it now,’ she sighed.
exz: “唉，我们现在对此无能为力。”她叹口气说。

en: adj. happening as a result of a particular event or situation
core: 【记忆】con + sequ(跟随) + ent(形容词后缀) → 随之发生的 | 【短语】consequent on (随之而来；跟着…发生的)
ex: the rise in inflation and consequent fall in demand
exz: 通货膨胀的加剧和随之而来的需求下降

en: n&v. to cut something into smaller pieces
ex: He went outside to chop some more wood for the fire.
exz: 他出去再砍些木材来生火。

en: n. a clear and detailed explanation
ex: Aristotle was valued because of his clear exposition of rational thought.
exz: 亚里士多德因其对理性思维的清晰阐述而被重视。

zh: n. 河流等出口，出路；发泄(感情等)的方法
en: n. a way of expressing or getting rid of strong feelings
core: 【短语】air outlet (排气口), outlet temperature (出口温度), outlet pressure (出口压力)
ex: Her father had found an outlet for his ambition in his work.
exz: 她父亲在工作中找到了施展抱负的途径。

zh: n. 衣柜，衣橱，全部服装；剧服，行头
en: n. a piece of furniture like a large cupboard that you hang clothes in
ex: Can you hang these in the wardrobe, please?
exz: 请你把这些衣服挂到衣橱里去好吗？

en: n. the smallest unit into which any substance can be divided without losing its own chemical nature, usually consisting of two or more atoms
core: 【记忆】mol(摩尔) + ecule → 分子 | 【短语】small molecule (小分子), water molecule (水分子), molecule weight (分子量)
ex: The molecules of oxygen gas contain just two atoms.
exz: 氧分子中只有两个原子。

en: n. a small round hard piece of medicine which you swallow
core: 【短语】stone tablet (碑碣), buccal tablet (口腔片，颊含片), tablet press (压片机)
ex: She took a couple of headache tablets .
exz: 她吃了几片头痛药。

zh: n. 天文台，气象台，了望台
en: n. a special building from which scientists watch the moon, stars, weather etc
core: 【短语】astronomical observatory (天文台), meteorological observatory (气象台；气象观测所), national radio astronomy observatory (国立射电天文台)

zh: adj. 不同的，清楚的，独特的
en: adj. clearly different or belonging to a different type
core: 【记忆】di + stinct(刺) → 刺眼的 → 明显的 | 【短语】distinct from (vt. 与……不同)
ex: two entirely distinct languages
exz: 两种完全不同的语言

zh: n. 用户电报；直通专用电传
en: n. a method of communica-tion, in which messages are written on a special machine and then sent using the telephone network
core: 【短语】telex release (电放；电放费；电报放货), tested telex (加押电传)

zh: n. 君主，最高统治者；君主政体，君主国
en: n. the system in which a country is ruled by a king or queen
core: 【短语】constitutional monarchy ([法]君主立宪制度), absolute monarchy (专制君主国；君主专制政体)
ex: the abolition of the monarchy
exz: 君主制的废除

zh: adj. 否定的；消极的；负的；阴性的；底片的
en: adj. considering only the bad qualities of a situation, person etc and not the good ones
core: 【记忆】neg(否定) + ative → 否定的 | 【短语】negative effect (负面影响；负效应；负磁力效应), positive and negative (正反；肯定和否定), negative influence (不利影响；消极作用；负影响)
ex: students with a negative attitude to school
exz: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

zh: v. (牲畜)吃草；放牧；擦过(牲畜)n擦伤
en: v. to accidentally break the surface of your skin by rubbing it against something
core: 【短语】graze on (吃（牛羊等吃草）)
ex: I fell on the gravel, severely grazing my knee.
exz: 我摔倒在砾石路上，膝盖擦伤得很严重。

en: v. to suffer or die because you do not have enough to eat
core: 【记忆】star(明星) + ve → 和明星养尊处优的生活正相反 → 挨饿 | 【短语】starve to death (饿死), starve for (渴望；急需)
ex: Thousands of people will starve if food doesn’t reach the city.
exz: 如果食品不能运到那座城市，成千上万的人就要饿死。

zh: n. 潮汐，(舆论，公众情绪)潮流趋势
en: n. the regular rising and falling of the level of the sea
core: 【短语】spring tide (大潮；涨潮), turn the tide (扭转局势；转变运气), high tide (高潮；满潮；高潮时间)
ex: Is the tide going out or coming in ?
exz: 现在是退潮还是涨潮？

zh: n. 寄生虫，寄生植物；靠他人为生的人
en: n. a plant or animal that lives on or in another plant or animal and gets food from it
ex: Kangaroos harbour a vast range of parasites.
exz: 袋鼠身上有各种各样的寄生虫。

en: n. an amount or piece of a material or substance that covers a surface or that is between two other things
core: 【记忆】lay(层面) + er → 层， 层次 | 【短语】boundary layer (边界层), thin layer (薄层；薄膜层), surface layer (表层)
ex: He pulled off layer upon layer of clothing (= many layers of clothing ).
exz: 他把衣服一件件地脱掉。

en: vt&vi. to become stronger or make something stronger
core: 【记忆】strength(力量) + en(使…) → (使)有力量 → 加强， 巩固 | 【短语】strengthen environmental protection (加强环境保护), strengthen the awareness (提高意识；强化意识), strengthen unity (加强团结)
ex: Our friendship has steadily strengthened over the years.
exz: 我们的友谊逐年加深。

en: n. a popular and fashionable style, activity, method etc
core: 【短语】in vogue (正在流行；正时兴)
ex: Suntanning first came into vogue in the mid-1930s.
exz: 晒黑皮肤最早流行于20世纪30年代中期。

en: adv. in spite of a fact that you have just mentioned
ex: What you said was true. It was, nevertheless, a little unkind.
exz: 你说的都是实话，只不过有点刻薄。

zh: n. 陈腐思想，陈词滥调

en: n&v. to officially say that people must pay a tax or charge
core: 【短语】tax levy (纳税；征收税款), levy on (征税；扣押), levy tax (征税)
ex: ...an annual levy on all drivers.
exz: …向所有司机征收的年税。

en: n. a book or cd, or a set of these, containing facts about many different subjects, or containing detailed facts about one subject
core: 【短语】encyclopedia britannica (大英百科全书)
ex: the Encyclopedia of Music
exz: 音乐百科全书

zh: n. 排水系统，下水道，排水
en: n. the process or system by which water or waste liquid flows away
core: 【记忆】drain(排水) + age(集体名词后缀) → 排水(系统) | 【短语】drainage system (排水系统，渠道系统；水系；引流装置), drainage area (排水面积), gas drainage (排瓦斯设备，瓦斯抽放)
ex: A handful of pebbles in the bottom of a flowerpot will help drainage.
exz: 在花盆底下放一把鹅卵石能够帮助排水。

en: n. a passage that has been dug under the ground for cars, trains etc to go through
core: 【记忆】海峡(channel)像条长长的地道(tunnel) | 【短语】wind tunnel (风洞), tunnel construction (隧道建设；隧道建筑), wind tunnel test (风洞试验)
ex: a railway tunnel
exz: 铁路隧道

en: v. to do something very well, or much better than most people
core: 【短语】excel in (v. 在……方面胜过；在……方面很擅长), excel at (突出；擅长于)
ex: You have excelled yourself with the new exhibition.
exz: 你新办的这次展览特别成功。

en: n. the complete circle that an electric current travels
core: 【短语】control circuit (控制电路), integrated circuit (集成电路), circuit design (电路设计)
ex: an electrical circuit
exz: 电路

zh: n. 猛推；冲锋，突击；推力
en: n. a sudden strong movement in which you push something forward
core: 【短语】thrust bearing (推力轴承；止推轴承), thrust force (推力), axial thrust (轴向推力)
ex: He jumped back to avoid another thrust of the knife.
exz: 他往后一闪，躲避再次捅来的一刀。

en: v. to make small changes to something in order to improve it and make it more suitable or effective
core: 【记忆】mod(尺度) + ify(使…) → 使…调整尺度 → 更改， 修改
ex: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year.
exz: 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

zh: adj. 最远的，最大的，极度的
en: adj. You can use utmost to emphasize the importance or seriousness of something or to emphasize the way that it is done
core: 【短语】to the utmost (极度；尽力), do one's utmost (尽全力，竭力), utmost good faith (最大诚信；绝对信任)
ex: It is a matter of the utmost urgency to find out what has happened to these people.
exz: 当务之急是弄清楚这些人出了什么事。

en: n. the ability to continue doing something difficult or painful over a long period of time
core: 【短语】endurance test (耐久试验，耐力测验；疲劳试验), endurance training (耐力训练，耐力练习), heat endurance (热稳定性；耐热性)
ex: She was pushed beyond her powers of endurance.
exz: 她被逼得忍无可忍。

zh: v. 爬上，骑上；增加；n. 山
en: v. to increase gradually in amount or degree；n. used as part of the name of a mountain
core: 【记忆】本身为词根， 意为“登上” | 【短语】mount everest (埃佛勒斯峰（喜马拉雅山主峰之一，中国称珠穆朗玛峰）), surface mount (表面黏着方式), mount up (增长；上升)
ex: Tension here is mounting , as we await the final result.
exz: 我们等待着最终结果，这里的气氛也越来越紧张。

en: n. an opinion that everyone in a group agrees with or accepts
core: 【记忆】con(共同) + sens(感觉) + us → 感觉相同 → 共识 | 【短语】reach a consensus (达成共识)
ex: The EU Council of Finance Ministers failed to reach a consensus on the pace of integration.
exz: 欧盟财政部长会议未能就一体化的进度达成共识。

zh: v. 强迫服从；实施；加强
en: v. to make people obey a rule or law
core: 【记忆】en(使…) + force(强迫) → 强制， 迫使 | 【短语】enforce the law (执法；执行法律)
ex: Parking restrictions will be strictly enforced.
exz: 停车限制将会严格执行。

en: n. a small piece of paper, plastic etc attached to something to show what it is, who owns it, what it costs etc
core: 【记忆】在包(bag)上贴标签(tag) | 【短语】price tag (价格标签；标价), name tag (胸牌；名称标签), tag along (紧跟；尾随)
ex: Staff wore name tags and called inmates by their first names.

core: 【记忆】ir(进入) + rig(水) + ation → 把水引入 → 灌溉 | 【短语】irrigation works (灌溉结构物), irrigation water (灌溉用水), drip irrigation (滴灌；滴流灌溉)

zh: v. 磨光，擦光；润饰，使优美；n. 擦光剂
en: v. to make something smooth, bright, and shiny by rubbing it；n. a liquid, powder, or other substance that you rub into a surface to make it smooth and shiny
core: 【记忆】pol(磨) + ish(使…) → 磨光， 擦亮 | 【短语】nail polish (指甲油，趾甲油), shoe polish (鞋油), polish off (草草完成；打败)
ex: I spent all afternoon polishing the silver.
exz: 我整个下午都在擦拭银器。

en: adj. neat and well cared for
core: 【记忆】tri(看作try， 试) + m(end)(修理) → 试着去修理 → 修剪 | 【短语】interior trim (内部装饰), out of trim (未准备好；失去平衡；健康情况不佳), trim down (裁减)
ex: trim suburban gardens
exz: 修剪齐整的郊区花园

en: n&vt. when a lot of people are killed violently, especially people who cannot defend themselves
ex: the only survivor of the massacre
exz: 这场大屠杀的唯一幸存者

zh: v. 摆，摇晃；动摇；犹豫不决
en: v. to become weaker or less certain
ex: Her voice wavered uncertainly.
exz: 她吞吞吐吐的。

en: adj. old and in bad condition
core: 【记忆】de + crep(发出破裂声) + it → 破旧的
ex: The buildings were in a decrepit state.
exz: 这些建筑物破旧不堪。

zh: v. 抵押，按揭，贷款购房
core: 【短语】housing mortgage (住房按揭), mortgage loan (按揭贷款；抵押借款), subprime mortgage (次级房贷)
ex: At this point, such claims have no bearing on the mortgage or housing crisis; they have bearing only on the holders of these securities themselves.
exz: 从这一点上来说，这些贷款凭证与抵押贷款或住房危机没有任何关系，他们只与拥有这些证券的持有者有关。

en: n. an idea that is suggested as an explanation for something, but that has not yet been proved to be true
core: 【记忆】hypo(在…下面) + thesis(论点) → 在论点之下， 非真正论点 → 假设， 假定； 假说 | 【短语】hypothesis testing (假设检验；假设测算), hypothesis test (假设检验), efficient market hypothesis (有效市场假说；有效率市场假说)
ex: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving.
exz: 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

zh: adv. 完全地；pron. 全部，全体
en: adv. completely
core: 【短语】all the (◎惟一的，仅有的), all of (adv. 不少于；实足), in all (总共，合计)
ex: You shouldn’t be sitting here by yourself, all alone.
exz: 你不应该一个人孤零零地坐在这儿。

en: n&vt. the management of money by governments, large organizations etc
core: 【记忆】fin(最后) + ance → 最后起作用的东西 → 财政， 金融 | 【短语】ministry of finance (财政部), public finance (财政学), international finance (国际金融)
ex: leasing and other forms of business finance
exz: 租赁及其他商业金融形式

core: 【短语】take some (不大容易), take care of oneself (照顾自己；颐养), take part (参与， 参加)

en: v. to make a law about something
ex: Most member countries have already legislated against excessive overtime.
exz: 大部分成员国已经立法禁止过度加班。

en: v. if liquid, gas etc permeates something, it enters it and spreads through every part of it
core: 【记忆】per(全部) ＋ mea(经过， 流过) ＋ te → 全部经过 → 扩散， 弥漫； 渗透 | 【短语】permeate through (渗透入；透过)
ex: The smell of diesel oil permeated the air.
exz: 空气里充斥着柴油的气味。

en: n. a hole or space inside something
core: 【短语】oral cavity (n. 口腔), nasal cavity (鼻腔), abdominal cavity (腹腔)
ex: Put herbs inside the body cavity of the fish.
exz: 把香草放进鱼肚里。

en: adj. clearly known, seen, or stated
core: 【记忆】de + fin(界限， 范围) + ite → 划定界限的 → 明确的， 肯定的 | 【短语】definite integral (定积分), positive definite ([计]正定的), definite time (定时)
ex: It’s impossible for me to give you a definite answer.
exz: 我不可能给你明确的答复。

zh: n. 骨骼；(建筑物、计划的)骨架；纲要
en: n. the most important parts of something, to which more detail can be added later
core: 【短语】steel skeleton (钢骨架), skeleton structure (骨架构造), skeleton staff (基干人员)
ex: We agreed on a skeleton outline of the proposal.
exz: 我们给提案商定了一个基本框架。

en: adj. produced or happening four times a year
core: 【短语】quarterly report (季报，季度报告)
ex: We publish a quarterly journal.
exz: 我们出版一份季刊。

en: a&n. any type of woven cloth that is made in large quantities, used especially by people in the business of making clothes etc
core: 【记忆】text(编织) + ile → 纺织品 | 【短语】textile industry (纺织工业), textile machinery (纺织机械), home textile (家纺)
ex: Their main exports are textiles, especially silk and cotton.
exz: 他们的主要出口商品是纺织品，尤其是丝绸和棉布。

zh: n. 概念的形成，概念，想法；怀孕
en: n. an idea about what something is like, or a general understanding of something
core: 【短语】artistic conception (意境), immaculate conception ([宗]无沾成胎说；圣灵感孕说), conception rate (受胎率；受孕率)
ex: the original conception of the book
exz: 此书最初的构想

en: n. a group of 12 ordinary people who listen to the details of a case in court and decide whether someone is guilty or not
core: 【短语】grand jury ([法]大陪审团), jury trial (陪审团审案), trial by jury (陪审审判)
ex: the members of the jury
exz: 陪审团成员

zh: n&v. 低沉连续的声音；诉怨
en: n&v. to make a soft low sound
core: 【短语】heart murmur (n. [医]心杂音)
ex: The wind murmured through the trees.
exz: 风在林间低语。

en: n. a very small living thing that causes infectious illnesses
core: 【短语】influenza virus (流感病毒), b virus (［病］B病毒), hepatitis b virus (乙型肝炎病毒；[病毒学]B型肝炎病毒)
ex: children infected with the Aids virus
exz: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

zh: n&v. 喘气，气喘吁吁地说
core: 【短语】last gasp (最终喘息；奄奄一息), gasp for breath (呼吸十分困难， 上气不接下气)
ex: ‘My leg!’ he gasped. ‘I think it’s broken!’
exz: “我的腿！”他倒抽一口气喊道，“我觉得腿断了！”

zh: adj. 致命的，命运的，注定的
en: adj. resulting in someone’s death
core: 【记忆】来自fate(n. 命运) | 【短语】fatal accident (死亡事故), fatal disease (绝症；不治之症), fatal error (致命错误，不可恢复的错误)
ex: potentially fatal diseases
exz: 潜在致命的疾病

en: n. If something is at a particular altitude, it is at that height above sea level
core: 【记忆】alt(高) + i ＋ tude(表状态， 名词后缀) → 海拔， 高度 | 【短语】high altitude (高海拔), in one's altitude (◎飘飘然；自高自大), altitude control (高度控制)
ex: The aircraft had reached its cruising altitude of about 39,000 feet.
exz: 那架飞机已经达到了大约三万九千英尺的巡航高度。

en: v. to be better or more successful than someone else at doing something
core: 【记忆】out(超过) + do(做) → 超越， 胜过 | 【短语】outdo oneself (尽自己最大努力；超过自己原来水平)
ex: When it comes to speed of response, a small firm can outdo a big company.
exz: 说到反应速度，小公司会胜过大公司。

en: n. your ideas or beliefs about a particular subject
core: 【短语】public opinion (民意；公众舆论), in my opinion (adv. 依我看来，在我看来), opinion about (有关…的意见)
ex: When choosing an insurance policy it’s best to get an independent opinion.
exz: 选择保险时，最好听听专家的独立意见。

en: vi&n. to be slowly destroyed by a natural chemical process, or to make something do this
core: 【记忆】骗(decoy)人变坏(decay) | 【短语】tooth decay (蛀牙；龋齿；齵齿), decay rate (衰减率；衰变率；衰变速度), radioactive decay ([物]放射性衰变)
ex: Her body was already starting to decay.
exz: 她的尸体已经开始腐烂。

en: n&vt. an official examination of a company’s financial records in order to check that they are correct
core: 【记忆】aud(听) + it → 听…报告 → 审计； 旁听 | 【短语】internal audit (内部审计，内部稽核), audit committee (审计委员会), audit report (n. 审计报告)
ex: the annual audit
exz: 年度审计

zh: adj. 即将出现的；现有的
en: adj. a forthcoming event, meeting etc is one that has been planned to happen soon
core: 【记忆】forth(往前) + coming(就要来的) → 即将到来的
ex: the forthcoming elections
exz: 即将到来的选举

en: n. a set of stories, poems, songs etc by different people collected together in one book
ex: an anthology of American literature
exz: 美国文学选集

en: n. thick thread made of cotton or wool, which is used to knit things
core: 【短语】cotton yarn (棉纱；棉纱线), blended yarn (混纺纱), spun yarn (细纱，纺成纱)
ex: The old captain would often spin (= tell ) us a yarn about life aboard ship.
exz: 老船长经常会给我们讲一些船上生活的奇闻轶事。

en: adj. a plaintive sound is high, like someone crying, and sounds sad
ex: They lay on the firm sands, listening to the plaintive cry of the seagulls.
exz: 他们躺在坚实的沙滩上，听着海鸥的哀鸣。

en: v. to deliberately give a wrong description of someone’s opinions or of a situation
ex: These statistics grossly misrepresent the reality.
exz: 这些统计资料严重歪曲了实际情况。

zh: n. 书面担保书，保证书
en: n. a written agreement in which a company selling something promises to repair it if it breaks within a particular period of time
core: 【短语】warranty period (保修期；保证期间), limited warranty (有限质量保证；有限保固), product warranty (产品保证)
ex: a three-year warranty
exz: 三年的保修期

zh: adj. 严格的，严厉的，严酷的(气候条件)
en: adj. careful, thorough, and exact
core: 【记忆】rig(看作rog， 要求) + orous → 不断要求 → 严格的
ex: a rigorous analysis of defence needs
exz: 对国防需求的缜密分析

en: adj. auxiliary workers provide additional help for another group of workers
core: 【短语】auxiliary equipment (辅助设备，附属设备；备用设备), auxiliary power (厂用电力), auxiliary system (辅助系统)
ex: an auxiliary nurse
exz: 助理护士

zh: adj. (说话，文笔)精炼的，简明的
ex: Derek’s terse reply ended the conversation.
exz: 德里克的简短回答结束了谈话。

en: n. a place where fruit trees are grown
core: 【短语】orchard road (乌节路（新加坡最出名的购物街道）), seed orchard (种子园，采种园)
ex: a cherry orchard
exz: 樱桃园

zh: n. (博士学位)论文，学术演讲，专题论文
en: n. a long piece of writing on a particular subject, especially one written for a university degree
core: 【记忆】来自dissert(vi. 论述， 写论文) | 【短语】doctoral dissertation (博士论文), academic dissertation (学位论文；学术论文)
ex: He is currently writing a dissertation on the Somali civil war.
exz: 他正在写一篇关于索马里内战的论文。

zh: adj. 鲜艳的；活泼的，有生气的；清晰的
en: adj. vivid memories, dreams, descriptions etc are so clear that they seem real
core: 【记忆】viv(生命) + id → 有生命力的 → 生动的 | 【短语】vivid description (生动的描述；生动的报导), vivid picture (逼真模式；栩栩如生的描写), vivid green (翡翠绿)
ex: I’ve got vivid memories of that summer.
exz: 我对那年夏天记忆犹新。

en: vi&n. to keep complaining in an unhappy way
core: 【短语】grumble at (对…表示不满；抱怨…)
ex: ‘This is boring,’ Kathleen grumbled.
exz: “这真无聊。”凯瑟琳抱怨道。

zh: n. 现象；非凡的人；奇迹(pl-na)
en: n. something that happens or exists in society, science, or nature, especially something that is studied because it is difficult to understand
core: 【记忆】phen(出现) + omen(预兆) + on → 出现预兆的 → 迹象 | 【短语】social phenomenon (社会现象；群集现象), natural phenomenon (自然现象), normal phenomenon (正常现象)
ex: Homelessness is not a new phenomenon .
exz: 无家可归已不是什么新现象。

en: v&n. a large public meeting, especially one that is held outdoors to support a political idea, protest etc
core: 【短语】(hold a) rally (团结；（举行）集会), pep rally (赛前动员会，鼓舞士气的集会), rally point (集结点)
ex: About 1,000 people attended the rally in Hyde Park.
exz: 大约有1,000人参加了海德公园的集会。

core: 【记忆】c + era(时代， 时期) + mic → 古时中国以陶器而闻名 → 陶瓷器 | 【短语】ceramic tile (n. 瓷砖（有釉或无釉的）), ceramic material (n. 陶瓷材料；陶瓷原料), piezoelectric ceramic (压电陶瓷)
ex: This takes a little while to switch all of your plastic storage containers over to ceramic, glass or stainless steel but its definitely worthwhile.
exz: 把你所有的塑料存储容器换成陶瓷的，玻璃的，或者不锈钢的你会浪费你一点时间。 但这绝对是值得的。

zh: n. 舌头；语言；舌状物（火舌）
en: n. the soft part inside your mouth that you can move about and use for eating and speaking
core: 【短语】mother tongue (母语；本国语言), tongue in cheek (挖苦地；不是认真的), native tongue (母语)
ex: Joe ran his tongue over his dry lips.
exz: 乔舔了舔干燥的嘴唇。

en: n. the ability to make decisions and take action without waiting for someone to tell you what to do
core: 【短语】take the initiative (采取主动；带头), on one's own initiative (主动地), subjective initiative (主观能动性)
ex: I wish my son would show more initiative.
exz: 我希望我的儿子能表现得再主动一些。

en: n. a series of numbers or letters that represent a mathematical or scientific rule
core: 【记忆】form(形式， 形态) + ula → 使具备形式、 形态的方式、 过程 → 公式； 配方 | 【短语】empirical formula (经验式；实验式), infant formula (婴儿配方；婴儿配方食品), formula one (一级方程式赛车)
ex: the formula for calculating distance
exz: 计算距离的公式

en: adj. starting to happen or exist
core: 【短语】incipient fault (潜在故障，隐患；雏断层)
ex: a sign of incipient madness
exz: 精神失常的早期征兆

zh: n. 巧合，符合，巧合的事例
en: n. when two things happen at the same time, in the same place, or to the same people in a way that seems surprising or unusual
core: 【短语】coincidence rate (符合率；符合计数率), by coincidence (碰巧)
ex: ‘I’m going to Appleby tomorrow.’ ‘ What a coincidence ! I’m going there too.’
exz: “明天我要去阿普尔比。”“太巧了！我也要去那里。”

en: v. to think that something is likely to happen in the future
core: 【记忆】en(在…之内) + vis(看见) + age → 在内部看见 → 展望
ex: The scheme cost a lot more than we had originally envisaged.
exz: 该计划的花费大大超出了我们最初所预想的数额。

en: n. something you do in order to prevent something dangerous or unpleasant from happening
core: 【短语】take precautions against (vt. 采取措施预防), precaution against (提防，防范；耐心), safety precaution (安全预防措施)
ex: Fire precautions were neglected.
exz: 防火措施被忽视了。

en: n&v. something that tests strength, skill, or ability, especially in a way that is interesting
core: 【短语】meet the challenge (迎接挑战；满足要求), rise to the challenge (接受挑战，奋起应付挑战), take up the challenge (应战)
ex: They threw down the challenge that he couldn’t wash 40 cars in one hour (= invited him to try to do it ) .
exz: 他们激将他，说他不可能在1小时内擦洗40辆汽车。

en: v. to destroy something or someone completely
ex: Just one of these bombs could annihilate a city the size of New York.
exz: 这种炸弹只要一颗就能彻底毁灭纽约那么大的一座城市。

core: 【短语】drug addict (吸毒者；滥用药物者)

zh: adj. 守旧的，保守的；n. 保守主义，保守党人
en: adj. not liking changes or new ideas；n. someone who supports or is a member of the Conservative Party in Britain
core: 【短语】conservative party (n. 保守党), conservative estimate (审慎估计，保守估计), conservative government (保守政权)
ex: a very conservative attitude to education
exz: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

zh: n. 加；边界；v. 给加上边，徐徐移动
en: n. the part of an object that is furthest from its centre；v. to move gradually with several small movements, or to make something do this
core: 【短语】on the edge of (adv. 几乎；濒于；在…边缘), edge detection (边缘检测), on the edge (在边缘上；坐立不安)
ex: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge.
exz: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

en: n&v. information or a story that is passed from one person to another and which may or may not be true
core: 【记忆】“辱骂” → 谣言往往比辱骂更伤人 → 谣言
ex: U.S. officials are discounting rumours of a coup.
exz: 美国政府官员对一场政变的传闻将信将疑。

zh: v. 误用, 滥用；虐待"
en: v. to use something for the wrong purpose, or in the wrong way, often with harmful results
core: 【短语】misuse of authority (滥用职权)
ex: Even harmless drugs can be misused.
exz: 即使是无毒副作用的药物也有使用不当的时候。

en: n. information which is false or which emphasizes just one part of a situation, used by a government or political group to make people agree with them
core: 【短语】propaganda department (宣传部)
ex: the spreading of political propaganda
exz: 政治宣传的开展

zh: v. 继承，经遗传而得(特性等)
en: v. to receive money, property etc from someone after they have died
ex: inherited wealth
exz: 继承的财富

en: n. a substance, usually liquid, produced by part of a plant or animal
core: 【短语】internal secretion (n. 内分泌), milk secretion (乳汁分泌), gastric secretion ([生]胃液分泌)
ex: These secretions are used by the caterpillar as a defence.
exz: 这些分泌物被毛虫用作自卫武器。

en: n. the number of people who attend a game, concert, meeting etc
core: 【短语】attendance at (出席), in attendance (出席；值班；负责), attendance record (考勤记录)
ex: We have an average attendance of 4,000 fans per game.
exz: 每场比赛平均有4,000名球迷来观战。

en: n&a. someone who has not learned to read or write
ex: ...a subclass of illiterates.
exz: …文盲阶层。

en: n. a state of confusion, excitement, or anxiety
core: 【短语】financial turmoil (金融风暴；金融危机；金融混乱)
ex: She lived through the turmoil of the French Revolution.
exz: 她经历过法国大革命的混乱之后仍旧活着。

zh: v. 是的符号，提示，表示
en: v. to mean something
core: 【记忆】de(向下) + not(知道) + e → 深究 → 表示， 指示； 意味着
ex: What does the word ‘curriculum’ denote that ‘course’ does not?
exz: curriculum一词的哪些含义是course没有的？

core: 【记忆】ad(表加强) + her(黏附) + e → 黏附； 遵守
ex: But this means they cannot always adhere to the strict codes of practice dictated in UN headquarters.
exz: 但是这就意味着它们无法总是坚持联合国总部规定的严格的实践规章。

zh: v. 捏，拧，掐，夹痛，紧压；n. 压力，重压
en: v. to press a part of someone’s skin very tightly between your finger and thumb, especially so that it hurts
core: 【短语】feel the pinch ([口]感到经济拮据), a pinch of (一撮，少许), pinch roll (夹送辊；导正滚轮；拉辊)
ex: We have to stop her pinching her baby brother.

core: 【短语】flip side ([引申]另一方面；唱片的反面；相对立的人), flip chip (倒装法；覆晶技术), flip over (翻页；翻过来)
ex: We flipped a coin to see who would go first.
exz: 我们抛硬币决定谁先去。

en: v. to cut the wool off a sheep
core: 【短语】shear stress ([物]剪应力；剪切应力), shear strength (切变强度), shear wall (剪力墙；抗震墙，耐震壁；风力墙)
ex: Her long fair hair had been shorn.
exz: 她长长的金发已经剪掉了。

zh: v. (鸟)盘旋，翱翔，(人)逗留在附近徘徊
en: v. If you hover, you stay in one place and move slightly in a nervous way, for example because you cannot decide what to do
core: 【记忆】爱人(lover)在自己身边徘徊(hover) | 【短语】hover over (在…盘旋)
ex: Judith was hovering in the doorway.
exz: 朱迪丝在门口徘徊。

en: n. a solid substance made of fat or oil and used to make candles, polish etc；v. to rub a layer of wax into a floor, surface etc to protect it or make it shine
core: 【短语】paraffin wax (n. 固体石腊), on the wax (正在变大；在增加), wax printing (蜡染)
ex: wax crayons
exz: 蜡笔

en: adv. in a happy way
ex: ‘Morning, Albert,’ she called gaily.
exz: “早安，艾伯特。”她快乐地喊道。

zh: n. 滑；幻灯片；v. 滑动
en: n. a large structure with steps leading to the top of a long sloping surface which children can slide down；v. to move smoothly over a surface while continuing to touch it, or to make something move in this way
core: 【记忆】s + lid(盖子) + e → 盖子太滑， 从桌子上滑了下去 → 滑动， 下滑 | 【短语】on the slide (在滑板上；日益恶化), slide show (放映幻灯片), slide block (滑块；滑架)
ex: a slide show
exz: 幻灯片放映

zh: n. 团，块，肿块；v. 合在一起，结块
en: n. a small piece of something solid, without a particular shape；v. to put two or more different people or things together and consider them as a single group, sometimes wrongly
core: 【短语】lump sum (总额；汇总), lump coal (块煤), lump ore (块矿)
ex: Strain the custard to remove lumps.
exz: 滤去牛奶蛋糊里的面块。

en: n. an official visit to a building or organization to check that everything is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
core: 【短语】quality inspection (质量检查), inspection system (检查体系), commodity inspection (商品检验)
ex: An inspection was carried out at the school.
exz: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

en: n. a building with a large flat central area surrounded by seats, where sports or entertainments take place
ex: a sports arena
exz: 运动场

en: adj. using money, time, goods etc carefully and without wasting any
core: 【短语】economical efficiency (经济效率，经济效果；经济有效), economical and practical (经济实用；经济实惠), economical operation (经济运行)
ex: A small car is more economical to run.
exz: 开小型汽车比较省油。

zh: adj. 有磁性的，有吸引力的
en: adj. concerning or produced by  magnetism
core: 【短语】magnetic field (磁场), magnetic resonance (磁共振；磁谐振), magnetic separation (磁选；磁性分离；磁力分离；磁力选矿)
ex: magnetic forces
exz: 磁力

zh: n. (织物上的)绒毛；v. 抖开，抖松
en: n. soft light bits of thread that have come from wool, cotton, or other materials；v. to make something soft become larger by shaking it
ex: He was picking bits of fluff off his trousers.
exz: 他在揪裤子上的绒毛球。

en: n. someone whose job is to receive or pay out money in a shop
ex: The cashier absconded with the money.
exz: 出纳员携款潜逃。

zh: n. (文学)少女，未嫁女人；adj. 未婚女子的
en: n. a young girl, or a woman who is not married
core: 【短语】maiden name (（女子的）婚前姓；娘家姓), iron maiden (铁娘子；铁处女（英国伦敦的重金属乐队）)
ex: ...stories of noble princes and their brave deeds on behalf of beautiful maidens.
exz: …高贵的王子以及他们英雄救美的故事。

en: v. to make someone suddenly surprised or slightly shocked
ex: Sorry, I didn’t mean to startle you.
exz: 抱歉，我不是故意吓你一跳的。

zh: n&a&v. 寒冷，扫兴的，(使)感冒
en: n&a&v. a feeling of coldness
core: 【记忆】c + hill(小山) → 山上 → 高处不胜寒 → 寒冷 | 【短语】chill out (冷静，冷静下来), wind chill (风寒)
ex: There was a slight chill in the air .
exz: 空气中有些微的寒意。

en: n&vt. to arrange for a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc to be kept for you to use at a particular time in the future
core: 【记忆】re(再， 又) + serv(保持) + e → 预订； 保留 | 【短语】federal reserve (（美国）联邦储备系统), nature reserve (n. 自然保护区), in reserve (备用的；留下的)
ex: Do you have to reserve tickets in advance?
exz: 你必须预先订票吗？

zh: n. 代替人，代用品；v. 代替
en: n. someone who does someone else’s job for a limited period of time, especially in a sports team or school；v. to use something new or diffe-rent instead of something else
core: 【短语】substitute for (代替，取代), substitute fuel (代用燃料), substitute material (代用材料，代用品)
ex: Germany brought on a substitute at half time.
exz: 德国队在比赛半场时换上一名替补队员。

en: n. a large building used for concerts or public meetings
core: 【记忆】aud(听) + it + orium(表场所、 地点， 名词后缀) → 听(讲座等)的地方 → 礼堂； 观众席
ex: ...a high school auditorium.
exz: …一所中学的礼堂。

en: n&vt. a feeling of respect for someone, or a good opinion of someone
core: 【记忆】e(音似： 一) + stee(看作steel, 钢铁) + m(看作man, 人) → 一个有钢铁般意志的人值得尊敬 → 尊重； 尊敬 | 【短语】self esteem (自尊)
ex: Peden was greatly esteemed by the people of Ayrshire.
exz: 佩登深受艾尔郡人的尊敬。

en: n. the act of creating something
core: 【记忆】creat(e)(创造) + ion → 创造 | 【短语】value creation (价值创造), job creation (提供就业机会), poetry creation (诗歌文本)
ex: a job creation scheme
exz: 创造就业机会的计划

zh: adj. 明白的，明显的；v. 显示，出现
en: adj. plain and easy to see；v. to show a feeling, attitude etc
core: 【记忆】mani(手) + fest(打) → 用手打人， 怒意很明显 → 明显的 | 【短语】manifest destiny (天定命运), assembly manifest ([计]程序集清单；装配件清单)
ex: a manifest error of judgment
exz: 明显的判断错误

zh: v. 授予(称号，学位等)；协商
en: v. to officially give someone a title etc, especially as a reward for something they have achieved
core: 【短语】confer with (协商；交换意见), confer on (vt. 授给（授予）)
ex: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states.
exz: 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

en: prep&ad. directly under another object or covered by it
ex: He got out of the car and looked underneath.
exz: 他下车往底下看了看。

zh: v. 升起，扯起，向上推；n. 起重机，升降机
en: v. to raise, lift, or pull something up, especially using ropes；n. a piece of equipment used for lifting heavy objects with ropes
core: 【短语】mine hoist (矿井提升机；矿井吊车), electric hoist (电动起重机；电葫芦；电动卷扬机), chain hoist (链式起重机；手动葫芦)
ex: The crew hurried to hoist the flag.
exz: 船员们急忙把旗子升起来。

zh: n. 容量；容积；理解力；地位；资格
en: n. the amount of space a container, room etc has to hold things or people
core: 【记忆】cap(拿住) + ac + ity(表状态、 情况， 名词后缀) → 能拿住 → 能力 | 【短语】production capacity (生产能力；生产力), bearing capacity (承载量；结果能力；产仔能力), capacity for (…的能力)
ex: The room had seating capacity for about 80.
exz: 这房间能坐80个人左右。

zh: n. 燃料；刺激感情之物；v. 供给燃料
en: n. a substance such as coal, gas, or oil that can be burned to produce heat or energy；v. if you fuel a vehicle, or if it fuels up, fuel is put into it
core: 【短语】fuel cell (燃料电池), fuel consumption (耗油量), fuel oil (燃料油，燃油，重油)
ex: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
exz: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

en: adv. in a way that was not planned, but as a result of something else
ex: Quite incidentally, I got some useful information at the party.
exz: 我在聚会上无意中得到了一些有用信息。

en: v&n. to laugh quickly, quietly, and in a high voice, because something is funny or because you are nervous or embarrassed
ex: If you can’t stop giggling you’ll have to leave the room.
exz: 如果你再咯咯地笑个不停，就给我离开屋子。

zh: n. 护卫者；护航舰；v. 护送，护卫
en: n. a person or a group of people or vehicles that go with someone in order to protect or guard them；v. to take someone somewhere, especially when you are protecting or guarding them
ex: a police escort
exz: 警察护卫队

en: n. a game used to make money for a state or a  charity  in which people buy tickets with a series of numbers on them. If their number is picked by chance, they win money or a prize.
core: 【短语】lottery ticket (彩票；奖券), welfare lottery (福利彩票)
ex: a lottery ticket
exz: 彩票

zh: v. 保持，保有；聘请(律师)
en: v. to keep something or continue to have something
core: 【记忆】re(再， 又) + tain(拿住) → 一再拿住 → 保留； 保持
ex: You have the right to retain possession of the goods.
exz: 你有权保留这些物品。

zh: n. 潜流；(思想，情绪)暗流

en: n. a word with the same meaning as another word in the same language
ex: The term "industrial democracy" is often used as a synonym for worker participation.
exz: “工业民主”这一词语常被用作“工人参与”的同义词。

en: n. a surface that consists of soil with grass on top, or an artificial surface that looks like this
core: 【短语】on the turf (◎以赛马为业；赛马场上的赌客), artificial turf (人造草皮)
ex: soft green turf
exz: 柔软的绿色草皮

en: v. to need to pay someone for something that they have done for you or sold to you, or to need to give someone back money that they have lent you
ex: How much do I owe you (= often used to show that you want to pay for something )?
exz: 我该付你多少钱？

en: v. To deplete a stock or amount of something means to reduce it
core: 【记忆】de + plet(满， 填满) + e → 不满 → 倒空； (使)枯竭
ex: ...substances that deplete the ozone layer.
exz: …消耗臭氧层的物质。

en: n. a strong building or group of buildings used by soldiers or an army for defending an important place
core: 【短语】fort worth (沃思堡市（美国城市）), fort lauderdale (劳德代尔堡（美国佛罗里达州东南沿海城市）)
ex: The fort flanked on a swamp.
exz: 堡垒侧面靠着沼泽。

en: v. to make someone believe something that is not true
ex: I was angry with him for trying to delude me.
exz: 他想骗我，因此我很恼火。

zh: adj. 机灵的；制作精巧的，灵巧的
en: adj. an ingenious plan, idea, or object works well and is the result of clever thinking and new ideas
ex: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators.
exz: 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

en: v. to consider two or more things or people, in order to show how they are similar or different
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + par(相等) + e → 放在一起看看是否相等 → 对比 | 【短语】compare with (与…相比较), compare notes (交换意见), compare favourably with (比…毫不逊色，比得上)
ex: The report compares the different types of home computer available.
exz: 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

zh: adj. 内地的，内陆的；adv. 在内地，向内地
en: adj. an inland area, city etc is not near the coast；adv. in a direction away from the coast and towards the centre of a country
core: 【短语】inland revenue (税务局；税收；国内税收), inland waterway (内陆航道；内陆水路；内陆水道), inland trade (国内贸易)
ex: the largest area of inland water in the southeast
exz: 东南部最大的内陆水域

zh: v. 镇压；平定；抑制；隐瞒
en: v. to stop people from opposing the government, especially by using force
core: 【记忆】sup(向下) + press(压) → 压下去 → 压制， 镇压 | 【短语】suppress inflation (遏止通货膨胀)
ex: The uprising was ruthlessly suppressed.
exz: 起义受到了残酷的镇压。

en: n. a feeling of extreme fear
core: 【短语】in terror (恐惧地；惊恐；处于恐惧状态), white terror (白色恐怖), reign of terror (恐怖统治)
ex: There was a look of sheer terror (= complete terror ) on his face.
exz: 他脸上的表情异常惊恐。

en: n. a way of doing something, especially the correct or usual way
core: 【记忆】proce(e)d(前进) + ure → 程序； 过程 | 【短语】working procedure (运行程序；办理手续), criminal procedure (刑事诉讼程序), civil procedure (民事诉讼；民事诉讼法；民事诉讼程序)
ex: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
exz: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

en: n. a false reason given for an action, in order to hide the real reason
core: 【短语】on the pretext of (以...为借口), find a pretext for (为…找口实)
ex: He’ll phone on some pretext or other.
exz: 他会以这样或那样的理由打电话的。

zh: n&v. 拍打，挥动，垂下物；袋盖；慌乱
en: n&v. the noisy movement of something such as cloth in the air
core: 【记忆】f(看作fly， 飞) + lap(拍打) → 拍动 | 【短语】skin flap (皮瓣), pocket flap (袋盖), valve flap (阀瓣)
ex: the flap of the sails
exz: 船帆的拍动

en: adj. no longer useful, because something newer and better has been invented
core: 【短语】obsolete equipment (陈旧设备)
ex: obsolete weapons
exz: 已被淘汰的武器

zh: adj. 故意的，从容的；v. 仔细考虑
en: adj. intended or planned；v. to think about something very carefully
core: 【记忆】de(表加强) + liber(权衡) + ate → 反复权衡 → 深思熟虑的 | 【短语】take time to deliberate (做事要深思熟虑), deliberate on (审议；仔细研究，考虑)
ex: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her
exz: 对她的故意羞辱

en: n. a formal and very serious promise
core: 【短语】oath of office (就职宣誓), under oath (宣誓；发誓说真话), on oath (宣誓；发誓)
ex: The president took the oath of office (= made the official public promises that every president makes when starting their job ) .
exz: 总统宣誓就职。

core: 【记忆】de(去掉) + plet(满， 填满) + ion → 使不满 → 削减； 消耗 | 【短语】ozone depletion (臭氧消耗；臭氧枯竭), depletion region ([电]耗尽区；势垒区；阻挡层)

en: vt&n. a description of what is likely to happen in the future, based on the information that you have now
core: 【记忆】fore(前面) + cast(扔) → 预先扔下 → 预报； 预测； 预想 | 【短语】weather forecast (天气预测，天气预报), demand forecast (需求预测), sales forecast (销售预测)
ex: The weather forecast is good for tomorrow.
exz: 天气预报说明天是晴天。

en: adj. a part of your body that is sore is painful, because of infection or because you have used a muscle too much
core: 【短语】sore throat (咽喉痛), pressure sore (褥疮), sore eyes (眼痛)
ex: I had a sore throat and aching limbs.
exz: 我喉咙疼，四肢酸痛。

en: adj. using or connected with the  metric system  of weights and measures
core: 【短语】metric system (公制；米制；十进制), metric space (度量空间), metric ton (n. 公吨)
ex: a metric tonne
exz: 一公吨

en: vt&vi. If you plead the case or cause of someone or something, you speak out in their support or defence
core: 【短语】plead guilty (服罪；[经]被告服罪), plead for (v. 请求；为…辩护), plead with (向…恳求；恳求…)
ex: He appeared before the committee to plead his case.
exz: 他出现在委员会上为他的案子辩护。

en: n&vt. to twist and pull something roughly from the place where it is being held
core: 【短语】monkey wrench (n. 活动扳手；螺旋钳), torque wrench (扭力扳手；转矩扳手；定力矩扳手), pipe wrench (管扳钳；管子钳)
ex: I wrenched the packet from his grasp.
exz: 我用力夺过他攥在手里的纸袋。

en: n. a doctor who does operations in a hospital
core: 【记忆】surge(波动) + on → 做外科医生， 情绪不能太波动 → 外科医生 | 【短语】plastic surgeon (整形外科医生), surgeon general (卫生局局长；军医处处长), orthopedic surgeon (整形外科医生；骨科医师)
ex: ...a heart surgeon.
exz: …一位心脏外科医生。

en: n. money paid to someone because they have suffered injury or loss, or because something they own has been damaged
core: 【短语】compensation system (补偿制度), error compensation (误差补偿，平差), compensation method (补偿法)
ex: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
exz: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

en: n. a number that tells you where you can find the information you want in a book, on a map etc
core: 【记忆】来自refer(v. 参考； 提到) | 【短语】for reference (以供参考；备案), with reference to (关于（等于in reference to）), reference value (参考值；标准值；参照值)
ex: a list of towns, each with a map reference
exz: 一份城镇清单，每个城镇都有地图参照号

zh: v. 挤作一团，乱堆；n. 一堆，一团
en: v. if a group of people huddle together, they stay very close to each other, especially because they are cold or frightened；n. a group of people or things that are close together, but not arranged in any particular order, pattern, or system
core: 【记忆】大家聚集在一起(huddle)处理(handle)问题
ex: We lay huddled together for warmth.
exz: 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

zh: n. 船坞；码头；刑事被告席；v. 引入船坞
en: n. a place in a port where ships are loaded, unloaded, or repaired
core: 【短语】dock in (进坞), loading dock (n. 码头；灌油码头；装货码头), in the dock (在受审)
ex: A crowd was waiting at the dock to greet them.
exz: 一群人在码头等着迎接他们。

zh: n&a. 古怪(的)，偏执(的)，不同心(的)
en: n&a. An eccentric is an eccentric person
core: 【记忆】ec(=e出) + centr(中心) + ic → 偏离中心的 → 古怪的， 反常的 | 【短语】eccentric wheel (偏心轮), eccentric shaft (偏心轴), eccentric load (偏心载荷)
ex: Askew used several names, and had a reputation as an eccentric.
exz: 艾斯丘用过几个名字，并以“怪人”著称。

zh: adj. 模糊的，不明确的，无定限的
en: adj. an indefinite action or period of time has no definite end arranged for it
core: 【短语】indefinite integral (不定积分), indefinite equation (不定方程式)
ex: The next day the union voted to begin an indefinite strike.
exz: 第二天工会投票表决决定开始无限期罢工。

zh: n. 承保险别；新闻报道(范围)；保证金
en: n. when a subject or event is reported on television or radio, or in newspapers
core: 【记忆】cover(覆盖) + age(集体名词后缀) → 覆盖范围 | 【短语】media coverage (媒体报道), insurance coverage ([经]保险责任范围), coverage rate (覆盖率)
ex: live coverage of the match (= the match is broadcast at the same time that it is happening )
exz: 这场比赛的现场直播

zh: adj. 固定的，定置的；不变动的，不移动的
en: adj. standing still instead of moving
core: 【记忆】station(位置) + ary → 总在同一位置的 → 静止的 | 【短语】stationary phase ([化]固定相；稳定期), stationary state (（能量上的）定态；静止状态), stationary process (平稳过程；恒定程序；定常过程)
ex: How did you manage to drive into a stationary vehicle?
exz: 你是怎么开车的，竟会撞上一辆停着的车子？

en: n. the largest number or amount that is possible or is allowed
core: 【记忆】max(大， 高) + imum → 最大的， 最高的 | 【短语】maximum value (最大值), maximum likelihood (极大似然；最大似然率), maximum number (最大数)
ex: We might have a third child, but that’s the absolute maximum .
exz: 我们可能会要第三个孩子，但这绝对是极限了。

en: v. to prepare a book, piece of film etc for printing or broadcasting by removing mistakes or parts that are not acceptable
core: 【短语】edit box ([计]编辑框), edit mode ([计]编辑方式), edit window (编辑窗口)
ex: The newspaper edits letters before printing them.
exz: 这家报社刊登读者来信前先作校订。

en: adv. in some way, or by some means, although you do not know how
core: 【短语】somehow or other (设法，想办法；莫名其妙地；以某种方法), somehow you will (不知道什么原因你就会做到（歌词）)
ex: Don’t worry, we’ll get the money back somehow.
exz: 别担心，我们总会把那些钱拿回来的。

zh: adj. 顽固的，倔强的，不易屈服的，较难治愈的
en: adj. determined not to change your ideas, behaviour, opinions etc, even when other people think you are being unreasonable
ex: He was the most obstinate man I’ve ever met.
exz: 他是我遇到过的最固执的人。

en: n. a strong thread made of several threads twisted together, used for tying or fastening things
core: 【记忆】st + ring(铃) → 一串清脆的铃声 → 一串 | 【短语】a string of (一系列，一串), drill string ([机械]钻柱), pipe string (n. 管柱，一段管线；管道支线)
ex: Her key hung on a string around her neck.
exz: 她的钥匙穿了根绳子挂在脖子上。

en: n. a period of 24 hours
core: 【短语】every day (每天；每个白天), one day (（将来）有一天；总有一天；（过去）某一天), all day (整天)
ex: We spent three days in Paris.
exz: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

en: adj. many
core: 【记忆】numer(数) + ous(多…的) → 数目众多的 → 众多的
ex: Numerous attempts have been made to hide the truth.
exz: 为掩盖事实作了很多尝试。

zh: n. 辞职书；放弃；听从，顺从
en: n. when someone calmly accepts a situation that cannot be changed, even though it is bad
ex: She gave a sigh of resignation.
exz: 她无奈地叹了一口气。

en: adj. heavily loaded with something, or containing a lot of something
core: 【短语】laden with (充满，载满), osama bin laden (奥萨马·本·拉登)
ex: snow-laden branches
exz: 积满雪的树枝

en: n. a natural tendency to behave in a particular way or a natural ability to know something, which is not learned
core: 【记忆】in(在…之内) + stinct(刺激) → 内在的刺激 → 本能， 直觉 | 【短语】by instinct (出于本能), instinct for (有…的天分；生来就), on instinct (本能，凭直觉)
ex: Her instinct told her that something was wrong.
exz: 直觉告诉她有些不对劲。

en: n&v. a situation in which something is finished or no longer exists
core: 【短语】the end of (…的最后), in the end (终于，最后), at the end (最终，最后；在终点)
ex: At last it seemed the war might be coming to an end.
exz: 终于战争似乎即将结束。

zh: adj. 消灭了的，熄灭了的，绝种的
en: adj. an extinct type of animal or plant does not exist any more
core: 【记忆】ex(没有) + tinct(刺) → 用针刺使没有的 → 灭绝的 | 【短语】become extinct (灭绝；绝种)
ex: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
exz: 恐龙已灭绝数千万年了。

en: n. the main subject or idea in a piece of writing, speech, film etc
core: 【短语】theme park (n. （游乐园中的）主题乐园), main theme (雪天使圆舞曲；主题曲), theme song (主题歌；信号曲；老套话)
ex: The book’s theme is the conflict between love and duty.
exz: 本书的主题是爱与责任之间的冲突。

en: n. the introduction to a play, a long poem etc
ex: The prologue to the novel is written in the form of a newspaper account.
exz: 该小说的前言是以新闻报道的形式写的。

en: n. a simple drawing or plan that shows exactly where something is, what something looks like, or how something works
core: 【记忆】dia(穿过) + gram(写， 图) → 画带有交叉点的图 → 图解， 图表 | 【短语】block diagram (框图；方块图), phase diagram ([物理]（表示物质的各种相态平衡关系的）相图), flow diagram (流程图；作业图)
ex: ...a circuit diagram.
exz: …电路图。

zh: adj. 适合的，恰当的；n. 试衣；建筑物中的装置
en: adj. right for a particular situation or occasion；n. an occasion when you put on a piece of clothing that is being made for you, to see if it fits properly
core: 【短语】curve fitting (曲线拟合), pipe fitting (管件；管道配件), data fitting (数据拟合)
ex: I thought the memorial was a fitting tribute to the President.
exz: 我认为这座纪念碑恰如其分地表达了对总统的敬意。

en: v. to put a piece of equipment somewhere and connect it so that it is ready to be used
core: 【记忆】in(进入) + stall(放) → 放进 → 安置； 安装
ex: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
exz: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

zh: v. 使变淡，稀释；adj. 稀释的
en: v. to make a liquid weaker by adding water or another liquid；adj. a dilute liquid has been made weaker by the addition of water or another liquid
core: 【短语】dilute solution ([化]稀溶液), dilute acid (稀酸), dilute hydrochloric acid (稀盐酸)
ex: diluted fruit juice
exz: 稀释的果汁

en: n. a floor or level of a building
core: 【记忆】可与store ( n. 商店)一起记
ex: A staircase leads to the upper storey .
exz: 有一段楼梯通往上面一层。

en: n. how likely it is that something will or will not happen
core: 【记忆】奇奇(odd)相加(add)为偶 | 【短语】at odds with (与…争执，意见不一致；与…不和；差异), odds and ends (零星物品，零碎东西), against all odds (困难重重)
ex: (= it is likely ) that he will commit the same crime again.
exz: 他可能还会犯同样的罪行。

en: vt&vi. to move around quickly in a twisting circular movement, or to make something do this
core: 【短语】swirl chamber (涡流室，涡流式燃烧室；涡良烧室)
ex: The river had become a swirling torrent.
exz: 河水变成了翻滚的洪流。

zh: v. 使放心，使消除疑虑
en: v. to make someone feel calmer and less worried or frightened about a problem or situation
ex: Teachers reassured anxious parents.
exz: 老师们安慰焦急的父母。

core: 【记忆】cas(掉落) ＋ ual + ty(表物) → 掉落下来； 造成事故 → 伤亡(人员)； 伤亡事故 | 【短语】casualty insurance (灾害保险；不幸事故保险)
ex: We have had our first casualty. One runner has dropped out with cramp.
exz: 我们有了第一位伤员，有一位队员因腿部痉挛退出了。

zh: n. 火柴；比赛；对手；婚姻;相称v相当,相配
en: n. an organized sports event between two teams or people
core: 【短语】football match (足球赛；足球比赛), match with (使和……相匹配), well matched (相称，相配)
ex: It’s our last match of the season.
exz: 这是我们本赛季最后一场比赛。

en: n. a period of 10 years
core: 【记忆】deca(十) + de → 十年， 十年期 | 【短语】over the past decade (在过去的十年里)
ex: ...the last decade of the nineteenth century.
exz: …19世纪的最后10年。

en: v. to be more than a particular number or amount
core: 【记忆】ex(出) + ceed(走) → 走出 → 超过， 胜过 | 【短语】exceed in (在…方面超过)
ex: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
exz: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

zh: n. 私人教师；[英]大学导师
en: n. someone who gives private lessons to one student or a small group, and is paid directly by them
core: 【短语】private tutor (私人教师，家庭教师), tutor system (导师制)
ex: The children were educated at home by a succession of tutors.
exz: 这些孩子在家接受教育，连续请过几任家庭教师。

en: n. nearness in distance or time
core: 【记忆】prox(近) + im + ity → 接近， 邻近； 亲近 | 【短语】close proximity (极为贴近), in close proximity to (与…靠得很近，接近), proximity sensor (近距离传感器)
ex: Here the rich and the poor live in close proximity (= very near to each other ) .
exz: 在这里，富人和穷人比邻而居。

zh: adj. 全世界的，世界主义的
en: adj. a cosmopolitan place has people from many different parts of the world – use this to show approval
core: 【记忆】cosmo(世界， 宇宙) + polit(城市) + an → 世界城 → 世界性的； 世界主义者
ex: a vibrant, cosmopolitan city
exz: 一个充满活力的国际性都市

zh: a&n. 基督教的；基督教徒
en: a&n. a person who believes in the ideas taught by Jesus Christ
core: 【短语】christian religion (基督教), christian era (公元；基督纪元), christian science (基督教科学派)
ex: He was a devout Christian.
exz: 他曾是一个虔诚的基督教徒。

zh: n. 催化剂；造成变化的人或事
en: n. a substance that makes a chemical reaction happen more quickly without being changed itself
core: 【短语】phase transfer catalyst (相转移催化剂), hydrogenation catalyst (加氢催化剂), catalyst bed (催化剂床)
ex: I very much hope that this case will prove to be a catalyst for change.
exz: 我非常希望这件事终将成为促成变化的催化剂。

en: v. to send something somewhere, especially in order to sell it
v. to use a building, car etc under a lease；n. a legal agreement which allows you to use a building, car etc for a period of time, in return for rent
core: 【记忆】l + ease(安心) → 有了租约， 可以安心了 → 租约 | 【短语】lease contract (租契；租赁契约), lease term (租赁期), financial lease (融资性租赁；财务租赁)
ex: I’m interested in leasing your cottage.
exz: 我有兴趣租下你的小屋。

zh: v. 月亮变小，月亏；衰退
en: v. when the moon wanes, you gradually see less of it
core: 【短语】on the wane (逐渐衰落)
ex: My enthusiasm for the project was waning.
exz: 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

zh: n. 配额，限额(进口及移民人数)
en: n. an official limit on the number or amount of something that is allowed in a particular period
core: 【记忆】“阔的” → 出手阔绰， 没有限额 → 限额 | 【短语】quota system (n. 配额制；定额分配制), quota management (定额管理；配额管理), above quota (超额)
ex: The government has decided to scrap quotas on car imports.
exz: 政府决定取消汽车进口配额。

zh: v. 降低，使沮丧；使萧条
en: v. to make someone feel very unhappy
core: 【记忆】de(向下) + press(挤压) → 情绪向下挤压 → 使沮丧
ex: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
exz: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

en: v. to make something clearer or easier to understand
core: 【记忆】clar(清楚) + ify(使…) → 使清楚 → 澄清
ex: Reporters asked him to clarify his position (= say exactly what his beliefs are ) on welfare reform.
exz: 记者们要求他阐明他在福利改革问题上的立场。

zh: adj. 极度的，尽头的；n. 极端，相反的性质
en: adj. very great in degree；n. a situation, quality etc which is as great as it can possibly be – used especially when talking about two opposites
core: 【记忆】extre(看作extra， 以外的) + me(我) → 在我能忍受的极限以外 → 极端， 过分 | 【短语】to the extreme (走向极端), in the extreme (非常；极度), extreme value (极值，极端值)
ex: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
exz: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

en: n. a piece of equipment that uses radio waves to find the position of things and watch their movement
core: 【短语】radar cross section (雷达截面，雷达目标有效截面), phased array radar (相控阵雷达), weather radar (天气雷达)
ex: The coastline can now be monitored by radar.
exz: 现在能用雷达监测海岸线了。

en: v. If one thing pertains to another, it relates, belongs, or applies to it
ex: ...matters pertaining to naval district defence.
exz: …与海军区域防卫有关的问题。

zh: adj. 假设的；约定的；同意的
en: adj. any particular time, situation, amount etc that is being used as an example
core: 【短语】given up (已放弃), given time (给定时间), given year (计算年)
ex: On any given day in the Houston area, half the hospital beds are empty.
exz: 在休斯敦地区，任何一天医院的床位都有一半是空的。

zh: adj. 地震的，地震强度的
en: adj. relating to or caused by  earthquakes
core: 【短语】seismic data (地震资料；地震数据), seismic exploration ([工程]地震探查), seismic response (地震响应)
ex: increased seismic activity
exz: 越来越频繁的地震活动

zh: n. 顶点，高峰；峰会(最高级会谈)
core: 【短语】summit conference (高峰会议；首脑会议)
ex: But are these the summit of our values, of our aspirations of society?
exz: 但这些是我们的价值观、我们对社会的抱负的顶点吗？

zh: adj. 航海的，船舶的，海员的
en: adj. relating to ships, boats, or sailing
core: 【短语】nautical mile (n. 海里（合1.852公里）), nautical chart (海图；航海图), nautical almanac (n. 航海天文历，航海历)
ex: nautical equipment
exz: 航海装备

zh: n. 许可，特许，执照；放纵
en: n. an official document giving you permission to own or do something for a period of time
core: 【短语】driving licence (驾驶执照；汽车驾驶执照), export licence (出口许可证，输出许可证), business licence (营业执照)
ex: The dealers applied for an export licence.
exz: 经销商申请了出口许可证。

zh: n. 靶，标；批评对象；指标
en: n. something that you are trying to achieve, such as a total, an amount, or a time
core: 【记忆】tar(音似： 她) + get(得到) → 我的目标是得到她 → 目标 | 【短语】on target (到达目标上空；正追踪目标；切题，切中要害), target market ([经]目标市场), target language (目的语；目标语言；译入语)
ex: There is no target date for completion of the new project.
exz: 这个新的项目何时完工没有预定日期。

en: adj. thinking about things in a detailed and intelligent way, so that you can examine and understand things
core: 【短语】analytical method (分析法), analytical chemistry ([化]分析化学), analytical solution (分析解；分析解法)
ex: She’s got an analytical mind.
exz: 她思维缜密。

core: 【短语】clean and jerk (挺举), knee jerk ([医]膝反射)
ex: Wilcox jerked his head to indicate that they should move on.
exz: 威尔科克斯扭扭头，示意他们该走了。

en: vt&n. to save someone or something from a situation of danger or harm
core: 【短语】rescue work (n. 救济事业), rescue workers (救援人员), search and rescue (搜索与营救)
ex: Survivors of the crash were rescued by helicopter.
exz: 空难的生还者被直升机救了出来。

en: n. a comfortable piece of furniture big enough for two or three people to sit on；v. to be expressed in a particular way
core: 【短语】on the couch (在沙发上；[美口]接受心理分析), couch potato (成天躺著或坐在沙发上看电视的人；极为懒惰的人)
ex: Tom offered to sleep on the couch.
exz: 汤姆说他来睡沙发。

zh: adj. 战略的，战略方针的
en: adj. done as part of a plan, especially in a military, business, or political situation
core: 【短语】strategic management (战略管理，策略管理；企业战略管理), strategic alliance (战略联盟（两家公司的合作安排，两者决定分享资源，互补长短）；策略联盟), strategic planning (公共建筑物的长远规划；策略计划)
ex: UN forces made a strategic withdrawal.
exz: 联合国部队作了战略性撤退。

en: n. a sudden strong desire to do something without thinking about whether it is a sensible thing to do
core: 【记忆】im(使…) + puls(推) + e → 冲动 | 【短语】impulse response (脉冲响应), on impulse (一时冲动，一时心血来潮), impulse noise (脉冲噪声，冲激噪声)
ex: The eye converts light signals to nerve impulses.
exz: 眼睛把光信号转变成神经冲动。

en: adj. ultraviolet light cannot be seen by people, but is responsible for making your skin darker when you are in the sun
core: 【短语】ultraviolet radiation (紫外线；紫外线照射), ultraviolet light (紫外线), ultraviolet ray (紫外线)
ex: Ozone in the stratosphere is important because it absorbs some of the Sun’s dangerous ultraviolet radiation.
exz: 在平流层的臭氧是重要的，因为它吸收了一些太阳中危险的紫外线辐射。

zh: adj. 音调悦耳的，旋律的
en: adj. something that sounds melodious sounds like music or has a pleasant tune
ex: He spoke in a quiet melodious voice.
exz: 他说话的声音轻柔悦耳。

zh: adj. 决定性的；紧要关头的
en: adj. something that is crucial is extremely important, because everything else depends on it
core: 【记忆】cruc(十字形， 交叉) + ial(形容词后缀) → 十字路口 → 决定性的， 至关重要的
ex: The conservation of tropical forests is of crucial importance .
exz: 保护热带雨林至关重要。

en: n. a product that is bought and sold
core: 【记忆】com(共同) + mod(样式) + ity → 市场上的商品种类繁多 → 商品， 货物 | 【短语】commodity inspection (商品检验), commodity economy (商品经济), commodity price (商品价格)
ex: agricultural commodities
exz: 农业商品

en: v. to think of a new idea, plan etc and develop it in your mind
core: 【记忆】con(共同) + ceiv(抓住) → 怀有一种想法 → 想出 | 【短语】conceive of (设想；想象)
ex: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s.
exz: 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

en: n. if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it
core: 【记忆】mono(单个) + poly(多) → 独占某商品绝大多数的市场份额 → 垄断， 专卖 | 【短语】natural monopoly (自然独占；天然垄断), monopoly position (垄断地位), monopoly power (垄断势力)
ex: a monopoly in copper trading
exz: 对铜交易的垄断

zh: adj. 怪诞的；离奇的，古怪的；超自然的
en: adj. very strange and unusual, and difficult to understand or explain
ex: A really weird thing happened last night.
exz: 昨晚发生了一件非常奇怪的事。

zh: adj. 光滑的；平稳的；v. 使光滑；使平稳
en: adj. a smooth surface has no rough parts, lumps, or holes, especially in a way that is pleasant and attractive to touch；v. to make something such as cloth or hair flat by moving your hands across it
core: 【短语】smooth muscle (平滑肌), smooth surface (光滑表面；光滑面；平滑面), smooth operation (正常运转；平稳运转，稳定运转)
ex: Her skin felt smooth and cool.
exz: 她的皮肤摸上去又滑又凉。

en: adj. moving or doing things in a careless way, especially so that you drop things, knock into things etc
ex: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt.
exz: 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

zh: adj. 手提式的，便携式的
en: adj. able to be carried or moved easily
core: 【记忆】port(拿， 运) + able(可…的) → 可以拿的 → 便于携带的； 手提式的 | 【短语】portable computer (便携式计算机), portable equipment (便携设备，手提设备；移动式设备), portable type (便携式)

core: 【记忆】origin(起源) + ate(动词后缀) → 起源， 发生 | 【短语】originate from (发源于), originate in (vt. 起源于（发生于）)

en: prep&n. used to show that one number or amount is added to another；adj. used to talk about an advantage or good feature of a thing or situation

core: 【短语】explosive welding (爆炸焊接；爆炸成形), emulsion explosive (乳胶炸药), explosive gas (易爆气，爆炸气；爆炸性气体)

ex: The rumours will do untold damage to his reputation.

en: n. a tendency to behave in a particular way or suffer from a particular illness

en: n. a way of dealing with a problem or making a bad situation better
core: 【记忆】re + med(治疗) + y → 治疗 | 【短语】remedy for (补救，解决；对…治疗法), sovereign remedy (◎灵药；特效药), legal remedy (法律补偿)

en: n. Archives are a collection of documents and records that contain historical information. You can also use archives to refer to the place where archives are stored.

en: adj. very good or beautiful, and very impressive

exz: 我们把包扔在附近的格兰德旅馆，急匆匆地向市场赶去。

en: n. the amount of sound produced by a television, radio etc
core: 【记忆】和volute(a. 向上卷的)一起记 | 【短语】sales volume (销售量), volume fraction (体积分率，体积分数；容积率), traffic volume (交通量)
ex: the volume of trade
exz: 贸易量

en: n. a union of two or more political parties that allows them to form a government or fight an election together
core: 【短语】coalition government (联合政府), coalition force (联军)
ex: the centre-right coalition government
exz: 政治上中间偏右的联合政府

zh: n. 口，孔；开始；张开；职位空缺
en: n. a hole or space in something
core: 【短语】opening up (开放，扩大开放；疏通，打通；开发矿山), opening ceremony (开学典礼；开幕式；开幕仪式；开幕典礼), at the opening (开盘价；按开市价盘；开盘指令；开盘委托)
ex: There are very few openings in scientific research.
exz: 科学研究领域很少有职位空缺。

zh: n. 打击，巨大的成功；v. 打，打击，打倒
en: n. Hit is also a noun；v. to touch someone or something quickly and hard with your hand, a stick etc
core: 【短语】hit the ball (击球；顺利，成功), hit it off (合得来), hit hard (使受到沉重的打击，使…遭受严重的挫折)
ex: First a house took a direct hit and then the rocket exploded.
exz: 首先一幢房子被直接击中，接着火箭弹爆炸了。

en: v. to prove the truth of something that someone has said, claimed etc
ex: Katzen offered little evidence to substantiate his claims .
exz: 卡曾拿不出什么证据来证明他的说法。

en: v. to say that something is true or that someone has done something wrong, although it has not been proved
core: 【记忆】al(向) + leg(送) + e → 用力向某人寄送 → 断言， 宣称
ex: She alleged that there was rampant drug use among the male members of the group.
exz: 她指称该组织中有大量的男性成员吸毒。

core: 【记忆】pre(预先) + scrib(写) + e → 预先写好 → 规定； 指示 | 【短语】prescribe for (开处方，开药方)
ex: Planning, as they employ the term, means: plans made by others will prescribe to me what I am to do and how to do it.
exz: 按照他们使用这个词的方式，“计划”的意思是指：由他人所制定的计划将规定我应该做什么以及如何做。

en: v. To expend something, especially energy, time, or money, means to use it or spend it
ex: Children expend a lot of energy and may need more high-energy food than adults.
exz: 孩子们耗能多，可能比成人需要更多高能量的食物。

en: adj. always thinking of the things you can do to make people happy or comfortable
ex: Paul is very thoughtful.
exz: 保罗非常体贴人。

en: n. birds such as chickens and ducks that are kept on farms in order to produce eggs and meat
core: 【记忆】poul(小鸡) + try → 家禽； 禽肉 | 【短语】poultry farm (n. 家禽饲养所), poultry feed (家禽饲料), poultry and eggs (禽蛋类)
ex: ...a poultry farm.
exz: …一个家禽饲养场。

zh: v. 供应伙食；提供娱乐节目
core: 【记忆】cat(小猫) + er → 小猫饿了， 喂点猫粮 → 提供饮食 | 【短语】cater for (迎合；供应伙食；为…提供所需)
ex: ...a full-service restaurant equipped to cater large events.
exz: …一家承办大型活动及提供全方位服务的饭店。
